name: Wendy Rittenhouse
subject: NOT GUILTY.
body:
Kyle was just ACQUITTED and is now officially FREE! This was a victory for the truth, for justice, and for every American's God
_Sponsored message_
| | | | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z1a9ph1h854j31sjkdboh5p3f06ihdbtfvpgvjb8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5h60ob2clh2bs)
---
|
---
Friend,

**Kyle was just ACQUITTED and is now officially FREE!**

This was a victory for the truth, for justice, and for every American's God-given and unalienable right of self-defense.

We are so overcome with emotion, and as hard as that was, we are thankful.

We are thankful for the millions of Americans who stood with Kyle from the start.

We are thankful for the many others who watched the trial with an open mind, realized that they had been lied to for a year and a half, and spoke out.

And we are thankful to the jury which put aside bias, considered the facts, and came to the right decision.

Now, we will try to return to something that resembles a normal life – **however that requires one more major push to settle our case-related debts and pay off what we hope will be our final legal bills.**

**[So please, take all that positive energy I know you're feeling and make an urgent donation to help us close this very ugly chapter in our lives.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zbk33s7l29j82f3iob67ndsnflkbapsod67clr40_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5h60ob2clh2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zb6p7fimgg47ll89r31vj5bceoc99nqrd82en2e8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5h60ob2clh2bs)
|
---
Any funds left over will be transferred into Kyle's scholarship fund so that he'll be able to graduate from college debt-free.

You'll be hearing from us again, but for now, and from the bottom of our hearts – thank you. Thank you. Thank you.

With love,

Wendy Rittenhouse
|
---

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Kevin McCarthy threatened to remove me from my committees
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
On Thursday, Republican House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy stood on the House Floor and all but threatened to censure me and remove me from all my committees if he were to take the Speaker’s Gavel. All because I investigated his boss — Donald J. Trump — and exposed Trump’s crimes against our nation. And because Democrats censured one of his most extreme members for posting a video of himself killing Rep. Ocasio-Cortez. Republicans _want to punish their own members for voting for a bipartisan infrastructure bill, but those who glorify violence against fellow Members of Congress? That’s a-okay._ **We cannot let Kevin McCarthy ever – and I mean _ever_ – hold the Speaker’s Gavel. He is no better than the amoral former president he worships. Can you help us fight back?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38820433/317225285/-751938712?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211120_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGRkZjU4Ny0xMjRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1xjDn3uV9tor6oDEX4OogwATg-J9cQAC-c_cjfg_3gY=)

clean_body: | On Thursday, Republican House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy stood on the House Floor and all but threatened to censure me and remove me from all my committees if he were to take the Speaker’s Gavel. All because I investigated his boss — Donald J. Trump — and exposed Trump’s crimes against our nation. And because Democrats censured one of his most extreme members for posting a video of himself killing Rep. Ocasio-Cortez. Republicans want to punish their own members for voting for a bipartisan infrastructure bill, but those who glorify violence against fellow Members of Congress? That’s a-okay. We cannot let Kevin McCarthy ever – and I mean ever – hold the Speaker’s Gavel. He is no better than the amoral former president he worships. Can you help us fight back? Moments like this can be the difference between winning and losing – especially when facing a right-wing incumbent like Marco Rubio, who is already sitting on a multimillion-dollar war chest and has the full GOP establishment behind him. **So we set a goal to raise $75,000 before midnight tonight, and we're counting on your contribution to get us there, friend: **

The Midterm Election results will define the future we leave behind for our children and grandchildren. We cannot hesitate. The time to strike is now. **[Are you with us?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2wc4e-1lp46-4qqlpo1/ "Are you with us?")**

We refuse to lie to you, and we won’t sugarcoat it for you either. The Radical Left is energized, and they’re determined to destroy every lasting legacy President Trump left on this great nation.

The odds are stacked against us, and **no Conservative is safe.**

We CANNOT afford for our base to sit on the sidelines. If we want to bring on a RED WAVE and take back our President’s Majority, we need to work hard and earn it.

Defeating Gov. DeSantis won’t be a walk in the park. He’s got a big war chest (funded by right-wing, billionaire donors), and he’s prepared to do whatever it takes to win reelection and advance his personal political ambitions.

However, Floridians are taking notice of his abysmal track record -- and his approval rating has _plummeted._ Recent polls even have Charlie either within the margin of error or flat-out beating Gov. DeSantis!

All of this tells us that we can win this race -- but we’ll need our group of dedicated grassroots supporters to do it. We started early, and are aggressively building a campaign to engage and empower Floridians who deserve and demand results -- better jobs, lower prices, and schools where students and teachers thrive.

This is a campaign to bring Floridians together for the common good: better schools, better jobs, a stronger economy, a cleaner environment, a better life for all Floridians. If we roll up our sleeves and get back to work, there’s no stopping us in 2022.

Peter,

I just announced my run for governor and my team is ready to hit the ground running and create the change New York needs – but we can’t do that without the necessary resources to win. We need office supplies like pens and clipboards to sign up as many fearless fighters as possible. Yard signs and banners to spread our message of justice and equality. name: Team Hahn
subject: Thanking our leaders for delivering
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kara Hahn for Congress Kara Hahn for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38822868/317238056/922507959?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjdlY2RlNy0xYTRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oXi0gFAinTGbGra2hgzHouG7UPdon7pRfScYLDrd-dE=)

Team,

If you live in New York, you know as well as anyone that American infrastructure has been in dire need of repair and improvement.

That's always been easier said than done, especially when our state and local governments have been forced to patch & stitch our railways, airports, roads, and bridges without sufficient federal support.

But that's changing; not "eventually," not "soon," but _now_ , team. **Thanks to the Democratic Congress and President Biden for passing the _Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act_ , New York will receive $1 trillion in federal support.**

A win this big, with tangible and transformative policy that will uplift countless communities nationwide, merits a big thank you to our leaders for paving the way forward.

We can't think of a more fitting person to show our gratitude to than Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer.

**[Team, will you sign our thank you card to Senator Schumer today and thank him for his leadership passing the _Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38822869/317238057/-1124594160?ms=em21_211120_Infrastructurefr&refcode=em21_211120_Infrastructurefr&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjdlY2RlNy0xYTRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oXi0gFAinTGbGra2hgzHouG7UPdon7pRfScYLDrd-dE=&emci=382f26ac-5c49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=0f7ecde7-1a4a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=25369896)**
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38822870/317238058/-1124594160?ms=em21_211120_Infrastructurefr&refcode=em21_211120_Infrastructurefr&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjdlY2RlNy0xYTRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oXi0gFAinTGbGra2hgzHouG7UPdon7pRfScYLDrd-dE=&emci=382f26ac-5c49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=0f7ecde7-1a4a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=25369896)
---
[SIGN THE CARD](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38822872/317238060/-1124594160?ms=em21_211120_Infrastructurefr&refcode=em21_211120_Infrastructurefr&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjdlY2RlNy0xYTRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oXi0gFAinTGbGra2hgzHouG7UPdon7pRfScYLDrd-dE=&emci=382f26ac-5c49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=0f7ecde7-1a4a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=25369896)
**Here's some of what's got us so excited:** In New York alone, $14 billion will be allocated for roads and bridges, $10.5 billion for transit systems across the state (including $1.5 billion for the Long Island Rail Road), $100 million for continued broadband deployment, $3 billion for clean water, and hundreds of millions of dollars for climate resiliency projects.

Nothing abstract about these numbers. They tell an undeniable story: **Democrats are getting things done.**

Senator Schumer collaborated with colleagues across the aisle and branches of government to deliver a real win for the American people. We think that deserves a moment of recognition; how about you, team?

**[If you agree, sign our thank you letter to Senator Schumer and leave a note for his office. Let him know we're grateful to have him deliver on long-needed investment for New York's roads, bridges, and rails!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38822874/317238062/-1124594160?ms=em21_211120_Infrastructurefr&refcode=em21_211120_Infrastructurefr&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjdlY2RlNy0xYTRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oXi0gFAinTGbGra2hgzHouG7UPdon7pRfScYLDrd-dE=&emci=382f26ac-5c49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=0f7ecde7-1a4a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=25369896)**

clean_body: | = Team, If you live in New York, you know as well as anyone that American infrastructure has been in dire need of repair and improvement. That's always been easier said than done, especially when our state and local governments have been forced to patch & stitch our railways, airports, roads, and bridges without sufficient federal support. But that's changing; not "eventually," not "soon," but now , team. Thanks to the Democratic Congress and President Biden for passing the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act , New York will receive $1 trillion in federal support. A win this big, with tangible and transformative policy that will uplift countless communities nationwide, merits a big thank you to our leaders for paving the way forward. We can't think of a more fitting person to show our gratitude to than Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer. | Here's some of what's got us so excited: In New York alone, $14 billion will be allocated for roads and bridges, $10.5 billion for transit systems across the state (including $1.5 billion for the Long Island Rail Road), $100 million for continued broadband deployment, $3 billion for clean water, and hundreds of millions of dollars for climate resiliency projects. Nothing abstract about these numbers. They tell an undeniable story: Democrats are getting things done. Senator Schumer collaborated with colleagues across the aisle and branches of government to deliver a real win for the American people. We think that deserves a moment of recognition; how about you, team? Have a great weekend, and thanks for taking the time to hear from us. \-- Team Hahn = *

name: Wendy Rittenhouse
subject: NOT GUILTY
body:
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58826618:Jk-HQ42NS:m:1:3298722022:EA714588FF6EC7C8D2213E00EE1E2179:r)
---
|
---
Peter,

**Kyle was just ACQUITTED and is now officially FREE!**

This was a victory for the truth, for justice, and for every American's God-given and unalienable right of self-defense.

We are so overcome with emotion, and as hard as that was, we are thankful.

We are thankful for the millions of Americans who stood with Kyle from the start.

We are thankful for the many others who watched the trial with an open mind, realized that they had been lied to for a year and a half, and spoke out.

And we are thankful to the jury which put aside bias, considered the facts, and came to the right decision.

Now, we will try to return to something that resembles a normal life, **however that requires one more major push to settle our case-related debts and pay off what we hope will be our final legal bills.**

**[So please, take all that positive energy I know you're feeling and make an urgent donation to help us close this very ugly chapter in our lives.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58826618:Jk-HQ42NS:m:1:3298722022:EA714588FF6EC7C8D2213E00EE1E2179:r)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58826618:Jk-HQ42NS:m:1:3298722022:EA714588FF6EC7C8D2213E00EE1E2179:r)
|
---
Any funds left over will be transferred into Kyle's scholarship fund so that he'll be able to graduate from college debt-free.

You'll be hearing from us again, but for now, and from the bottom of our hearts, thank you. Thank you. Thank you.

With love,

Wendy Rittenhouse
|

name: Rod Dorilas
subject: Do you know how many black Republicans there are in Congress?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
body:
Never believe the Left’s narrative that America is a racist country; that the American dream doesn’t exist anymore; or that
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2i0u96embm4s1rldnjq7u1s4me6o4qj1ivqm528_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf2ctle4r62tr3edj34cj3m1h33d30eurb1ohnmmpm0p5jc8qeedpjc4qj3clke1jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coo75ddicupb8phkcsqj8dtgmlin48d245p25oh4cdj6eob2c5g61pb24no)
|

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zde7delu2u9hbm1ro8eqk5pvp5gprrue97vho9co_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5h62o30slh2bs)

---
Fellow American,

Never believe the Left’s narrative that America is a racist country; that the American dream doesn’t exist anymore; or that the Constitution is a relic of the past that disproportionately benefits Anglo Americans.

I’m speaking with authority on the matter: **I’m a first generation Haitian-American whose parents came to this country, quite literally penniless, to pick crops in South Florida during the 1980s**. Now, less than forty years after my parents experienced food insecurity and homelessness, I’m running for Congress – as a Republican. **I guess you could say that I don’t fit the Left’s definition of a conservative**.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkp23u9mkr2nfvplebja4udpm5p2dmpgd2h8g41g_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5h62o30slh2bs)
My name is Rod Dorilas and I’d like to tell you a few important things about me and why I’m writing to you today.
* I’m a military veteran (**I joined at 17**),
* I’m a lawyer (**I utilized the GI bill to pay for law school**)
* I’m a former Trump Administration appointee, having held various jobs during the four years President Trump held office.

**The thing I’m most proud about? My family built our own American Dream without the help of the government, or left-wing socialist politicians. And I’m running for Congress because some folks in DC just don’t understand that the government is not going to help make individuals successful – grit, determination and personal responsibility are keys to success.**

In his 1967 inaugural address as Governor of California, Ronald Reagan said, “ _**freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction**_.” Coming from an immigrant family, I believe it’s my responsibility to fight to make sure that people in this country know how precious freedom - and the United States - truly is.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrjjcble7r0h8lne7u7g5v32etj4rtnivmiv1pe8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5h62o30slh2bs)
I’m asking you to continue reading the rest of this email, but if you cannot, **[please consider chipping in whatever you can spare to my campaign today](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zaif1cvd0nuk06p50ngqfqos75bnp0sl8573qe00_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5h62o30slh2bs)**. I’ve accomplished a lot in my short career, but I’m not independently wealthy and can’t fund my own campaign. I know I would be an effective voice for our party – I just need to make sure people in my district know who I am and what I stand for.

[** Send a 1st Generation American to Congress >>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrmjmuelhstv55grp9e2o1cq05euk81asigqi088_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5h62o30slh2bs)
Every morning that I read the news, it’s more doom and gloom. No one talks about the American Dream anymore. But, my parents and I are living proof that it still exists – and will continue to exist for future generations of immigrants and native-born Americans alike if we wake up to the dangers posed by socialism NOW. That is going to take hard work on all of our parts.

I know a thing or two about hard work, which I believe is one of the key characteristics missing in the folks representing us in Congress today. **I wasn’t happy with the high school I would have had to attend based off my parents address, so I traveled via public train and bus every day to attend one of my choice**. Having the option to attend a high school of my own choosing enabled me to become the man I am today.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7hd75jeq85rrjkt7v0pitbeku686ddubqh7a8f8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5h62o30slh2bs)
**I’d love to know where else in the world, immigrants from one of the Earth’s poorest nations could rise from homelessness and become successful business owners in a matter of two decades. All the while, raising their children with such success that one of them decides to seek federal office. **

Rising from poverty in Haiti to the middle class in South Florida wasn’t quick or easy, but _**what is worth having in life that is easy?**_ I learned from my parents that hard work and grit – along with perseverance – pays dividends. Yet today, many Americans would rather depend on government handouts.

If you’ve found this email inspiring on any level, **[would you please consider a contribution to my campaign for Congress today?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3h3r87jgtvqgq93ee05bqvl6a3pm64t60vfji18_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5h62o30slh2bs)** I don’t believe in handouts of any kind, but I won’t be able to do anything about the ones that exist – or stop new entitlements – without first making my way to Congress.

[** Send a 1st Generation American to Congress >>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdrrshqd4lng14qon8r22crhacapv5b218nj4nbo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5h62o30slh2bs)
Thank you for taking the time to read this email today. I sincerely appreciate your consideration.

For Country,

Rod Dorilas

[** I'M WITH ROD >> **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zehuhc77rh2f0lt73l5iufj1japsqcbbrfn9r7l0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5h62o30slh2bs)

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

[**Will you stand with Rod?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp4tifsru18ttpnv467jferune7rpnkopau4q7b0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5h62o30slh2bs)
---

| Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, [please use this preferences page](http://e.goppresidential.com/prefs/9z2zfgmr6j3n3d9oegtjeno8mv0slfant3fvljqgfrg).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjhn1qhtaa9baf1486nsq919tde736p2n2d5bn2o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5h62o30slh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China. Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left. | Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Wendy Rittenhouse
subject: NOT GUILTY.
body:
Kyle was just ACQUITTED and is now officially FREE! This was a victory for the truth, for justice, and for every American's God
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlang8j2pb2g58ojau6vk233amduptjq7uhpuua8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqb9ojgmjgratbk6kom9p74ssr78sr6m5g76phjmdpmao5ncopn9ptn64qe8d1gcv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3imtj3ao5jc9jrcoj666ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933cpjm2oj1c1h6aoh5u)
| | | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3bfdaiv0o0eocu53io5j2pnb2i6fbovtt98n890_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5h62o32clh2bs)
---
|
---
Friend,

**Kyle was just ACQUITTED and is now officially FREE!**

This was a victory for the truth, for justice, and for every American's God-given and unalienable right of self-defense.

We are so overcome with emotion, and as hard as that was, we are thankful.

We are thankful for the millions of Americans who stood with Kyle from the start.

We are thankful for the many others who watched the trial with an open mind, realized that they had been lied to for a year and a half, and spoke out.

And we are thankful to the jury which put aside bias, considered the facts, and came to the right decision.

Now, we will try to return to something that resembles a normal life – **however that requires one more major push to settle our case-related debts and pay off what we hope will be our final legal bills.**

**[So please, take all that positive energy I know you're feeling and make an urgent donation to help us close this very ugly chapter in our lives.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrdmtrjuobvrdekmadi7074jm3l3kfraeqrksv1o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5h62o32clh2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zoripulffhennrphg27l8lbn141bqip06b4u6g6g_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5h62o32clh2bs)
|
---
Any funds left over will be transferred into Kyle's scholarship fund so that he'll be able to graduate from college debt-free.

You'll be hearing from us again, but for now, and from the bottom of our hearts – thank you. Thank you. Thank you.

With love,

Wendy Rittenhouse
|
---

defending him!

vultures in the media and the Silicon Valley Cartel have been
exposed for who they are.

And I'm going to hold them accountable.

AWAY

And they want to make sure they have as much of it as possible.

That's why they're willing to sacrifice real
Americans like Kyle Rittenhouse if it means they can use him to
divide our country and force communism on us under the guise of
"equality" and "inclusivity."

These are the types of people I'm fighting
every single day in the Halls of Congress.

Will you help me fight back with a generous
donation of $10, $15, $25, $50, or even $100 right now?

ever.

You see, my campaign has spent hundreds of

On top of that, I've had to defend myself in
the court of public opinion when the Democrats, Fake News Media
and the Silicon Valley Cartel tried to kick me out of Congress.

Hit piece after hit piece after hit piece.

The left never let up. Now, the January 6
Witch Hunt Committee is coming after Patriots like Steve Bannon.

And I'll be next.

I'm able to fight back with patriots like you

$100.

And as of now, the RINOS in Georgia have

out with a more "moderate" Republican.

So they put a bunch of Democrats in my
district in their hopes to take me out.

So please, rush a generous donation of $10,
$15, $25, $50 or $100 right away.

Any amount you can contribute will help my
team and I fight back and DEFEAT the DEMOCRATS.

The 2022 elections are gearing up to be the
most pivotal elections in our nation's history.

If we don't take back the House and fire
Nancy Pelosi, I fear out country will be lost.

You and I cannot let that happen. With your
help, we can Save America and Stop the Communist takeover of our
country!

-- Marjorie Taylor
Greene

Congresswoman (R-GA)

**_Des Moines Register:_ Kim Reynolds improperly used COVID relief funds for staff salaries**
Friend,

If you've been tracking Kim Reynolds' actions throughout the COVID-19 pandemic, this recent headline should come as no surprise. Time and time again, she's put her personal ambition and party politics ahead of the people of this state. Let's review: **FIRST:** Reynolds blasted President Biden's COVID-19 pandemic relief bill, saying it punished states like Iowa that had disregarded pandemic protections.

**THEN:** She rejected $95 million in funding from the federal government for COVID testing in schools.

**NOW:** Reynolds took $450,000 in federal assistance to pay 21 staff salaries. Worse still, she CONCEALED it from public scrutiny by passing it through a different department. **Kim Reynolds can't be trusted to lead this state. We must reject her blatant waste, fraud, and abuse of federal funds to get Iowa back on the right track.**

clean_body: Des Moines Register: Kim Reynolds improperly used COVID relief funds for staff salaries | = Des Moines Register: Kim Reynolds improperly used COVID relief funds for staff salaries Friend, If you've been tracking Kim Reynolds' actions throughout the COVID-19 pandemic, this recent headline should come as no surprise. Time and time again, she's put her personal ambition and party politics ahead of the people of this state. Let's review: FIRST: Reynolds blasted President Biden's COVID-19 pandemic relief bill, saying it punished states like Iowa that had disregarded pandemic protections. THEN: She rejected $95 million in funding from the federal government for COVID testing in schools. NOW: Reynolds took $450,000 in federal assistance to pay 21 staff salaries. Worse still, she CONCEALED it from public scrutiny by passing it through a different department. Kim Reynolds can't be trusted to lead this state. We must reject her blatant waste, fraud, and abuse of federal funds to get Iowa back on the right track. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks in advance, Team Ras Smith Democrat for Governor = | | Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor Ras Smith for Governor P. If you'd like to make another contribution, I will fight tooth and nail to ensure every cent goes towards advancing the conservative agenda and winning back the House -- The fight is far from over, and we're only getting started. name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I hate reaching out with bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |

Hi there, I hate reaching out with bad news, but this can't wait. My team just told me that a right-wing super PAC recently placed a 6-figure ad buy in New Hampshire, attacking me and rallying their far-right base. New Hampshire is a real swing state. In 2016, I won by 1,017 votes -- less than half of a percentage point -- and news outlets across the country are calling me one of the most vulnerable Democratic Senators up for reelection. This is a critical moment in the campaign: letting these attacks go unanswered could tip the scales against us. My team and I are working hard to keep this seat and our Senate blue, but we urgently need your help. **[If we're going to win, it's going to take a grassroots effort. We don't need megadonors like Republicans, but we do need people like you, friend, to give $5 or more before our weekend fundraising deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38824636/317246863/-1803038125?refcode=e20211120_mwh-urgent&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2MwNTc4Yi0yMDRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r49-L1cD-nyjCvLyKCT4Zc1XW_O5f0HYds0BRQTexBU=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Chip in $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38824637/317246864/-1803038125?refcode=e20211120_mwh-urgent-el&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2MwNTc4Yi0yMDRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r49-L1cD-nyjCvLyKCT4Zc1XW_O5f0HYds0BRQTexBU=)

clean_body: | | | Hi there, I hate reaching out with bad news, but this can't wait. My team just told me that a right-wing super PAC recently placed a 6-figure ad buy in New Hampshire, attacking me and rallying their far-right base. New Hampshire is a real swing state. In 2016, I won by 1,017 votes -- less than half of a percentage point -- and news outlets across the country are calling me one of the most vulnerable Democratic Senators up for reelection. This is a critical moment in the campaign: letting these attacks go unanswered could tip the scales against us. My team and I are working hard to keep this seat and our Senate blue, but we urgently need your help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = = = This recent ad buy is just the tip of the iceberg. So far, Republicans have flooded New Hampshire with over $4.5 million in an attempt to unseat me. Mitch McConnell and the rest of the GOP have endless resources, and they're willing to do whatever it takes to win. I don't like asking for donations, but it's critical that we hit this weekend's fundraising goal to build the resources we need to respond to these attacks and reach voters where they are. = Thank you for being on my team! With every good wish, Maggie Hassan | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Maggie for NH PO Box 298 Concord, NH 03302 United States To receive fewer emails, click Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible. | | Paid for by Maggie for NH

Dan Crenshaw here.
This week, radical socialists in the House - led by Nancy Pelosi and AOC - passed Joe Biden's multi-trillion dollar socialist wish list that will destroy jobs, cut funding for hospitals, and provide a tax cut to the rich. We need to fight back and make sure this bill never reaches Joe Biden's desk. Robert Francis O'Rourke - better known as Beto - jumped into the governor's race in Texas and the Biden Administration continued to lie about the illegal immigration crisis on our southern border. I'm fighting back on all of these fronts.

If Bernie Sanders had a wishlist, it would look identical to what socialists in Congress passed this week.
The so-called "Build Back Better" bill includes:
🔴Tax hikes on oil and gas 🔴Trillions in government handouts 🔴A government takeover of your healthcare 🔴Trillions for the Green New Deal 🔴Amnesty for illegal immigrants
[SIGN THE PETITION TO STOP THE SOCIALIST SPENDING SPREE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_ouFORNLt6CmwgdTVl8y8Wm_2Sldx8qkx49ScUh7uaNbFsU4oP5oFiXgv1-bQr3FbLtlJAjyFi-rX46MEMgU0G91TGE74Qh8qnddzihi4LU52hyMaSDSWOXauYgiq0Sc3US54Nw9GvenvMjFzB8cC5QLmwJn-6pvEkthaIOKs8yWfURzKGq02jKdBRa8_62XhPSkFJQ6oqslvUdlVYEteG1mI7ijJM38DMs-JkC8JZ0AhZPXyrNBdAXNNrkCG8ANqnzTd2cvm0sUYZ0x-kszhu0RaivMFe8LkyZFw1AD57JYfuT3dMNUnn25WBzNRlQZacu5MN0Cu6w2dgDVXEFh5d1eQ49ccv2J&c=RxGFDe2REzZ_e4tMy5wEWiB89NsrGYacZY2rlKfBilPFZ9L6ll22lA==&ch=sl_tZliz7BvNXWwRne91Xro_FcTU3EEIYoJA96iR3raPgu6IFjqWbA==)

This is the definition of socialism: give tax breaks to the rich elite while letting the working class fight for the crumbs.
And it's all happening while inflation is the highest it's been in 30 YEARS.
This bill passed the House but we can still stop it from ever becoming law. If we ramp up our public pressure campaign, we can stop this bill in its tracks.
I'm ready to do that but I need your help.

clean_body: This week: a socialist spending spree, Joe's failing grade, and Beto's latest fantasy | | | | | | | | == | Peter- Dan Crenshaw here. This week, radical socialists in the House - led by Nancy Pelosi and AOC - passed Joe Biden's multi-trillion dollar socialist wish list that will destroy jobs, cut funding for hospitals, and provide a tax cut to the rich. We need to fight back and make sure this bill never reaches Joe Biden's desk. Robert Francis O'Rourke - better known as Beto - jumped into the governor's race in Texas and the Biden Administration continued to lie about the illegal immigration crisis on our southern border. I'm fighting back on all of these fronts. As always, thank you for your support and please stay up to date with me on ==, ==, and ==. Now, here's your brief. | | | | | | BERNIE'S WISHLIST | == | If Bernie Sanders had a wishlist, it would look identical to what socialists in Congress passed this week. The so-called "Build Back Better" bill includes: 🔴Tax hikes on oil and gas 🔴Trillions in government handouts 🔴A government takeover of your healthcare 🔴Trillions for the Green New Deal 🔴Amnesty for illegal immigrants == And rather than "tax the rich" as socialists like AOC and Bernie like to sloganeer about, this bill gives a massive TAX BREAK to the richest Americans, while giving the IRS free rein to monitor your bank account. This is the definition of socialism: give tax breaks to the rich elite while letting the working class fight for the crumbs. And it's all happening while inflation is the highest it's been in 30 YEARS. This bill passed the House but we can still stop it from ever becoming law. If we ramp up our public pressure campaign, we can stop this bill in its tracks. I'm ready to do that but I need your help. | | | == | | | | | | | | JOE'S FAILING GRADE | == | More than 1 MILLION illegal immigrants have been encountered at our southern border this year. More illegal immigrants crossed the border last month than any month this century. There have been a record 100,000 overdose deaths in the U.S., primarily from fentanyl, almost all of which comes from drug smugglers crossing the southern border. And what grade does Joe Biden's Homeland Security Secretary give himself? An "A for effort." == That is an actual quote from Alejandro Mayorkas, who oversees the crisis at our southern border. This administration has done nothing to stop the illegal immigration surge except punish border patrol agents for doing their jobs and propose giving $450,000 to illegal immigrants. This is not a joke. It's clear that Joe Biden has failed at the border and Alejandro Mayorkas - who oversees the implementation of policies that created this crisis - should lose his job. Don't you agree? | | | == | | | | | | | | BETO'S FANTASY | Remember this face? | == | That's right. It's Robert "Beto" Francis O'Rourke. And he's back for another political race. == No, it's not for Senate (he lost that one). No, it's not for President (he lost that one too). And no, it's not to help liberal candidates "turn Texas blue" (he failed miserably to do that). Nope, this time he's running to be Governor Beto. Even after Republicans won in blue Virginia and nearly won in deep-blue New Jersey, Beto thinks he has a shot of winning in Texas... this guy just LOVES to lose. Remember, Beto said that he wants to confiscate guns, tax churches, and tear down the border wall. And Nancy Pelosi, National Democrats, and every Hollywood celebrity will pump millions into this governor's race. We can't let Beto win in Texas. We need to make him lose AGAIN and keep Texas red. Will you help us? | | | == | | | | | | | | ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | | | | | | RECOMMENDED READS DAILY WIRE: == FOX: == NATIONAL REVIEW: == Thank you for reading! In service, | | Dan Crenshaw | | | | | == | | | Thank you for fighting for our conservative values. Your support is extremely valuable and crucial for Republicans to take back the House and Senate in 2022. Dan Crenshaw is counting on you to help him restore America and teach our kids to to be grateful for our Founding, our Constitution, our Flag, and our People. If he succeeds, Hershel Walker will oust Raphael Warnock and Democrats will lose control of our razor-thin 50/50 Senate Majority. Then Mitch McConnell will regain control over Washington and clear the path for Donald Trump to run for president in 2024. Peter, we're fighting back hard. _The New York Times_ reports that Donald Trump will likely face racketeering charges, as the Grand Jury may soon hold him to account for his authoritarian election interference. name: Bob Lorinser
subject: How's your connection? I was on the Zoom call and someone couldn’t connect
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
I hope your internet connection is strong enough to receive this e-mail. Yet again today, I was on a telemeeting with local leaders in the First District, and someone providing an important update on their township couldn’t connect. This highlights the dire need for rural broadband in our district, and my opponent's shortcomings in getting things done. **It's another example of my opponent's shortcomings in getting things done for Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38824964/317248434/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2U1OTIzNi0yMzRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8p8NGYwqvyKWyNNna7fuijfc7wr3V-q4Ce9iNwcYujM=) Can you [**pitch in**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38824965/317248435/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2U1OTIzNi0yMzRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8p8NGYwqvyKWyNNna7fuijfc7wr3V-q4Ce9iNwcYujM=)****[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38824966/317248436/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2U1OTIzNi0yMzRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8p8NGYwqvyKWyNNna7fuijfc7wr3V-q4Ce9iNwcYujM=)today to ensure we win this election so that I can fight for the real needs of rural Michigan, like access to high-speed internet? [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38824967/317248437/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2U1OTIzNi0yMzRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8p8NGYwqvyKWyNNna7fuijfc7wr3V-q4Ce9iNwcYujM=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38824968/317248438/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2U1OTIzNi0yMzRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8p8NGYwqvyKWyNNna7fuijfc7wr3V-q4Ce9iNwcYujM=) Good morning, Friend. I hope you're having a good Saturday. This morning I was in a telemeeting with local leaders in the First District, and someone providing an important update on their township couldn’t connect. This highlights the dire need for rural broadband in our district. For six years Jack Bergman promised Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula he would work to expand broadband services in our rural communities. Over half a decade later, still nothing. In fact, he continually votes against it. The Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill, which Jack adamantly opposed, sets aside $65 billion for America’s spotty broadband system. I will push for this initiative and similar like it because 68% of people living in rural areas of tribal lands don't have access to broadband, according to research by the FCC. A 2018 U.S. Government Accountability Office report indicates the real number may be even higher. My opponent has been trying to invite broadband expansion to the area since he took office, but he exclusively concentrated on attracting private corporate investment, and although there’s a role for private enterprise, all his efforts failed. I applaud several organizations, specifically Michigan Broadband Cooperative, Connected Nation Michigan, and Center for Change, who are leading the way in advancing the conversation of broadband access in rural Northern Michigan. At a local level, rural broadband can significantly improve our students’ learning. It can assist our daughters to pursue their passions in STEM programs to become engineers, scientists, and world leaders. It can help our sons realize their dreams of studying international business and communicating around the globe. Access to consistent, reliable broadband will also enable Northern Michigan residents to work from home, which positively transforms our economy and attracts opportunity and investment to the area. At a state level, the infrastructure bill provides $100 million to extend broadband coverage and provide nearly 2.5 million low-income Michigan households the opportunity to apply for funds to help afford internet access, a goal I champion. **No child should have to sit outside a fast-food restaurant to connect to wifi to do their homework.** Approximately 1.2 million households, many of whom live in the district, do not have a permanently fixed broadband connection. This is unacceptable. Can you **[pitch in](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38824969/317248439/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2U1OTIzNi0yMzRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8p8NGYwqvyKWyNNna7fuijfc7wr3V-q4Ce9iNwcYujM=)** today to ensure we win this election so that I can fight for the real needs of rural Michigan? Let's take this seat back. – Dr. Bob | |

name: Andrea Salinas
subject: Showing up for Oregon farmworkers
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38825015/317249271/-1943795144?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzBmMjg0Yi0yMzRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G8q9OldEA8lM4ZgsLEpn7nhyOSiOHct03X5D03mLe3A=&emci=aa7488ce-7649-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=430f284b-234a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=5643047)
---

| | Oregon's farmworkers have put their safety and health on the line through a deadly pandemic. They braved raging wildfires with toxic air and inhospitable heat to ensure that Oregonians have food in our stores and our families are fed. But due to federal labor law, they aren't required to be paid overtime for the extra hours that they work. **It's a historic injustice, and right here in Oregon, we're going to fix it.** In 1938, the Fair Labor Standards Act established the minimum wage and overtime pay for workers across the nation. But farmworkers were excluded. Fast forward to 2021, Oregon today has 174,000 migrant and seasonal farmworkers. And they're still not eligible for overtime pay. That's 1740,000 Oregonians cheated out of wages they earned and deserve. **Excluding farmworkers from overtime pay was wrong in 1938, and it is still wrong today.** That's why, this spring, I will again introduce legislation to require overtime pay for farmworkers in Oregon. And why I'll take the fight nationwide when I'm elected to Congress. Time and time again, farmworkers have shown up for us. And time and time again, we've let farmworkers down. It's time we show up for them and ensure that they're treated fairly and paid the wages they've earned. _Andrea_ Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | clean_body: | | | Oregon's farmworkers have put their safety and health on the line through a deadly pandemic. They braved raging wildfires with toxic air and inhospitable heat to ensure that Oregonians have food in our stores and our families are fed. But due to federal labor law, they aren't required to be paid overtime for the extra hours that they work. It's a historic injustice, and right here in Oregon, we're going to fix it. In 1938, the Fair Labor Standards Act established the minimum wage and overtime pay for workers across the nation. But farmworkers were excluded. Fast forward to 2021, Oregon today has 174,000 migrant and seasonal farmworkers. And they're still not eligible for overtime pay. That's 1740,000 Oregonians cheated out of wages they earned and deserve. Excluding farmworkers from overtime pay was wrong in 1938, and it is still wrong today. That's why, this spring, I will again introduce legislation to require overtime pay for farmworkers in Oregon. And why I'll take the fight nationwide when I'm elected to Congress. Time and time again, farmworkers have shown up for us. And time and time again, we've let farmworkers down. It's time we show up for them and ensure that they're treated fairly and paid the wages they've earned. Your voice matters, and Tina truly appreciates your feedback as we put our efforts towards supporting you, your family, and all of our communities. Thanks for filling out the survey! Team Tina Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek P.O. Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. You can .

name: Mark Takano
subject: Trans Day of Remembrance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38825659/317251822/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWNhZjdmYy0yMzRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YeNVyHL8mxmx4ev3PP_8HMQzDd1ie-MJY21T-1cl3Uk=)

| **Content warning: Violence, suicide, LGBTQ+ discrimination**
---
Peter,

Today is Transgender Day of Remembrance. Tragically, it’s a day that is more important than ever.

Trans people and especially Trans people of color have faced disproportionately high rates of sucide and murder.

And it’s no coincidence that as legislators around the country attempt to delegitimize and undermine the trans experience with blatantly transphobic laws, **violence against trans people has reached a shocking new high this year.**

As a member of the LGBTQ+ community, my heart hurts for all trans and gender nonconforming people who face hate, discrimination, and isolation -- often at the hands of their own families.

And as a Member of Congress, I reaffirm my commitment to fight transphobia and discrimination in all it’s forms.

Today we remember and mourn all those that have been lost. Let it be a reminder to advance our fight for equality and dignity for all.

In solidarity,

Mark Takano
| | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517
www.marktakano.com

He's been a voice for veterans, seniors, students, local businesses and hardworking families. But now, our Democratic House Majority is seriously at risk. The leadership of progressive Democrats like Mark will be critical to holding Republicans accountable and ensuring the healing of our country during this challenging time.

This is all hands on-deck.

|

| | | Peter, I really need your help.

My fundraising deadline was yesterday, and I missed the goal by only $5,000... I was crushed when I heard the news.

**But I 've extended it for 30 minutes because I believe in our team and your dedication to our fight to take back the Senate!**

I can't stress enough how much I need your help. I can't let my team down - and we can't let the radical Left win.

subject: I'll keep this quick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38827285/317256159/683353327?refcode=20211120_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzJmNWU0ZS0yYjRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6pCFHfi1HmbdCZ2XjtT6jyz2tD4piD-LixRC8shxldw=) Friend, this will be quick – and I really need your help: 1\. We knew Georgia was going to be a critical battleground – _again_ – but now, POLITICO reports that our race will decide which party controls the Senate. 2\. Republicans have made me their top target for next year's critical elections, and they're already outspending us on misleading attack ads in order to smear my record and turn Georgia red. 3\. Our grassroots campaign is **falling****$17,871****short** of what we need to fight back, hit our midnight fundraising goal and win this race. **Unless we close this budget gap by midnight, the GOP's attacks could leave a major mark.** **We cannot hand Georgia – and our critical Senate majority – back to Mitch McConnell and the GOP when everything from our voting rights to health care is under attack.** But according to analysts at _The Washington Post_ , that's exactly what could happen if we lose this battleground race. **Please, friend, I'm counting on you. With time running out before our critical midnight deadline, I'm asking you to give every dollar you can spare right now: ** [**Will you split a donation between me and Seth Moulton before 11:59 p.m. tonight to hit our goal, win in Georgia and take back the Senate for Democrats?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38827286/317256160/683353327?refcode=20211020_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzJmNWU0ZS0yYjRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6pCFHfi1HmbdCZ2XjtT6jyz2tD4piD-LixRC8shxldw=) We're so close, friend – thank you. — Raphael Warnock

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Regardless of my opponent, this will be a hard-fought race
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Folks,
In 2016, I won by only 1,017 votes, beating the incumbent Republican in one of the closest races in history.
**Regardless of who my opponent is in 2022, this will be a hard-fought race, and I'm not taking anything for granted.**
With our 50-50 Senate majority, Republicans only have to flip one seat to retake control, and Mitch McConnell is all in on New Hampshire. If I lose, Democrats will lose our slim majority — affecting everything from health care protections to the fate of Roe v. Wade.
Make no mistake, no matter who emerges as the Republican nominee, this will still be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country. Winning in a swing state like New Hampshire isn’t easy, and it isn’t cheap. Mitch McConnell and his dark money allies are already flooding the state with millions of dollars in attack ads, and they will continue to do everything in their power to flip this seat red.
With all eyes on New Hampshire, it's critical that my campaign has the resources necessary to build a robust on-the-ground campaign that is ready for whatever the GOP throws our way. [**Can you split a donation between my campaign and Mark Kelly’s to keep the Senate blue?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-hassan-nov21?refcode=em211120-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=1679_6688874_m_INDJ&akid=1679%2E6688874%2Em_INDJ)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will automatically be evenly split between Maggie Hassan and Mark Kelly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-hassan-nov21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em211120-1-subs&t=20&refcode2=1679_6688874_m_INDJ&akid=1679%2E6688874%2Em_INDJ)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-hassan-nov21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em211120-1-subs&t=21&refcode2=1679_6688874_m_INDJ&akid=1679%2E6688874%2Em_INDJ)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-hassan-nov21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em211120-1-subs&t=22&refcode2=1679_6688874_m_INDJ&akid=1679%2E6688874%2Em_INDJ)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-hassan-nov21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em211120-1-subs&t=23&refcode2=1679_6688874_m_INDJ&akid=1679%2E6688874%2Em_INDJ)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-hassan-nov21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em211120-1-subs&t=24&refcode2=1679_6688874_m_INDJ&akid=1679%2E6688874%2Em_INDJ)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-hassan-nov21?express_lane=true&refcode=em211120-1-subs&t=25&refcode2=1679_6688874_m_INDJ&akid=1679%2E6688874%2Em_INDJ)**
---
****
The stakes of this election are high, and this race could decide the fate of the Senate. That's why I'm reaching out to you today, team. Defending our Senate majority is the only way we can stop Mitch McConnell from blocking our progress and enacting his right-wing agenda. What happens in New Hampshire could shape the course of our country for decades.
I’m no stranger to tough fights, and I know we can win this. But it’s not going to be easy, and it’s going to take all of us working together. [**Piece by piece, one dollar at a time, we are going to build the strongest campaign we can. That starts with you, friend — please split a donation between Mark Kelly’s and my campaign today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-hassan-nov21?refcode=em211120-1-subs&t=26&refcode2=1679_6688874_m_INDJ&akid=1679%2E6688874%2Em_INDJ)
Thank you for your support. I couldn’t be more grateful to have you with me.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=27&akid=1679%2E6688874%2Em_INDJ).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. | | |
---
Friend, I'm 2 points behind Marco Rubio in the polls, and experts say this race will come down to who has the resources to compete.

**That's why this is so concerning: Florida can decide Senate control, and I'm currently $11,424 short of my midnight fundraising goal. ****So my team sent me your updated supporter record:**

**Deadline: 11:59 p.m.**

This race is about more than just my unlikely story of opportunity – it's about a meaningful movement for Floridians and the country, it's about defending the Senate. Mitch McConnell only needs one seat to flip a 50/50 Senate – and we can't let Florida be the seat securing him Senate control.

We can win this – CNN is calling this seat a top pickup opportunity – but we have a steep hill to climb. The GOP is pouring more than $10 MILLION into organizing Florida to register a groundbreaking number of Republican voters _._

**Republicans are working in overdrive to make sure no Democrat can flip Florida ever again, friend. This is our moment: It has never been more important to build the infrastructure to fight back, and we need to make early investments. We can't do that if we miss this goal. **
I know this people-powered movement is strong enough to defeat Marco Rubio and the GOP, but we need to raise another $50,000 RIGHT NOW to register more Democratic voters and flip Florida blue**. Please, friend, I'm counting on you to help me reach this goal:**

name: Team Cranley
subject: About John
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Cranley Committee
body:
John is the candidate who can defeat DeWine in 2022 and turn our state around. | Team — here are 5️⃣ things we want you to know about John Cranley... **1\. John will always work to do what’s right.** Driven by his faith, John’s calling is helping people through public service — that means making sure our government works in the best interests of the people and ending the cycle of corruption in Columbus. It’s why he co-founded Ohio’s chapter of the Innocence Project, which has since led to the release of 33 people who were wrongfully convicted. And it’s why he and Dena have always made the time to volunteer at soup kitchens and deliver meals to Ohioans in need on Thanksgiving. **__[Donate to elect a leader you can trust>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38828646/317260921/-1406512299?amount=25&refcode=ea.6726d5c3-2d4a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ms=ea.6726d5c3-2d4a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzI2ZDVjMy0yZDRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d8uHLBgnkLl3a6E-DJ1J9w_Jsl5m9v9cKLDZCO_X3jU=)__** **2\. John’s political role model is FDR.** President Franklin Delano Roosevelt turned America’s fortunes around after the Great Depression and during World War II. He got folks back to work and built a robust middle class. FDR was idealistic and he was pragmatic enough to get stuff done. That’s exactly the kind of leader John always strives to be. **__[Donate to support a pragmatic idealist who can get it done>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38828647/317260922/-1406512299?amount=25&refcode=ea.6726d5c3-2d4a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ms=ea.6726d5c3-2d4a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzI2ZDVjMy0yZDRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d8uHLBgnkLl3a6E-DJ1J9w_Jsl5m9v9cKLDZCO_X3jU=)__** **3\. In two terms as mayor of Cincinnati, John led a major economic comeback.** Cincinnati gained thousands of jobs, lowered the poverty rate, and raised income levels. The city invested in communities — expanding access to pre-school and public transit options, prioritizing diversity and inclusion, and revitalizing neighborhoods. Now, Cincinnati’s population is growing, even as other Midwestern cities are in decline. **__[Donate to write Ohio’s comeback story>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38828648/317260923/-1406512299?amount=25&refcode=ea.6726d5c3-2d4a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ms=ea.6726d5c3-2d4a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzI2ZDVjMy0yZDRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d8uHLBgnkLl3a6E-DJ1J9w_Jsl5m9v9cKLDZCO_X3jU=)__** **4\. John always has a plan.** After nearly a decade of leading a major American city, John knows that it pays to be prepared and lead by action. John’s ready to fix Ohio’s failing infrastructure, incentivize small-business growth, expand broadband access, clean up our rivers and Lake Erie, open rural health care centers, make it easier to hold public officials accountable for corruption, and more. He’s ready to get to work on Day One to fix the problems facing our state. **__[Donate to elect a problem solver>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38828649/317260924/-1406512299?amount=25&refcode=ea.6726d5c3-2d4a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ms=ea.6726d5c3-2d4a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzI2ZDVjMy0yZDRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d8uHLBgnkLl3a6E-DJ1J9w_Jsl5m9v9cKLDZCO_X3jU=)__** **5\. John has the big ideas and bold solutions to lead a comeback for Ohio.** Under John’s leadership, Cincinnati broke ground on the largest municipally led solar installation in the country, which will create more than a hundred good-paying jobs. He’ll develop similar projects across the state as governor to end our dependence on fossil fuels and expand the job market. John plans to send hardworking Ohio families an energy dividend by increasing taxes on energy companies, unlike the Republicans, who wanted Ohio’s taxpayers to pay to prop up failing power plants. clean_body: John is the candidate who can defeat DeWine in 2022 and turn our state around. | Team — here are 5️⃣ things we want you to know about John Cranley... 1\. John will always work to do what’s right. Driven by his faith, John’s calling is helping people through public service — that means making sure our government works in the best interests of the people and ending the cycle of corruption in Columbus. It’s why he co-founded Ohio’s chapter of the Innocence Project, which has since led to the release of 33 people who were wrongfully convicted. And it’s why he and Dena have always made the time to volunteer at soup kitchens and deliver meals to Ohioans in need on Thanksgiving. = 2\. John’s political role model is FDR. President Franklin Delano Roosevelt turned America’s fortunes around after the Great Depression and during World War II. He got folks back to work and built a robust middle class. FDR was idealistic and he was pragmatic enough to get stuff done. That’s exactly the kind of leader John always strives to be. = 3\. In two terms as mayor of Cincinnati, John led a major economic comeback. Cincinnati gained thousands of jobs, lowered the poverty rate, and raised income levels. The city invested in communities — expanding access to pre-school and public transit options, prioritizing diversity and inclusion, and revitalizing neighborhoods. Now, Cincinnati’s population is growing, even as other Midwestern cities are in decline. = 4\. John always has a plan. After nearly a decade of leading a major American city, John knows that it pays to be prepared and lead by action. John’s ready to fix Ohio’s failing infrastructure, incentivize small-business growth, expand broadband access, clean up our rivers and Lake Erie, open rural health care centers, make it easier to hold public officials accountable for corruption, and more. He’s ready to get to work on Day One to fix the problems facing our state. = 5\. John has the big ideas and bold solutions to lead a comeback for Ohio. Under John’s leadership, Cincinnati broke ground on the largest municipally led solar installation in the country, which will create more than a hundred good-paying jobs. He’ll develop similar projects across the state as governor to end our dependence on fossil fuels and expand the job market. John plans to send hardworking Ohio families an energy dividend by increasing taxes on energy companies, unlike the Republicans, who wanted Ohio’s taxpayers to pay to prop up failing power plants. And he’ll legalize marijuana — not only because it is time to end this cruel, outdated war on drugs, but also because it'll provide tax revenue that we can reinvest in our communities. = Look, John is the candidate who can defeat Mike DeWine in 2022 and turn our state around — but he needs your support now. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thanks, Team Cranley = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.** = = = = Paid for by the John Cranley Committee JOHN CRANLEY COMMITTEE 30 GARFIELD PLACE SUITE 900 CINCINNATI, OH 45202 United States Click here to

body:
Will Biden kick Kamala to the curb?
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?2wdg5--fgxr-4qqlpo4&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

| | | **BREAKING: Psaki defends Kamala Harris' position in the Biden administration amid sinking poll numbers— FOX NEWS** Fellow Conservative,
Kamala Harris continues to make history! She is in the running to be the most unpopular Vice President in history.

And it's not just Republicans and independents who are turning against her. According to reports from the White House, Joe Biden is no fan of Kamla either.

**There's even rumors he’s looking to replace her as his VP. **With whom you may ask?

Mayor Pete Buttigieg... That’s right, Fellow Conservative, and we honestly can’t decide who would be worse for the job. **[So if you have an opinion on this, please let us know by filling out the poll>>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2wdg5-1lplx-4qqlpo7/ "So if you have an opinion on this, please let us know by filling out the poll>>>>")**

---
| | | [Pete Buttigieg](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2wdg5-1lplz-4qqlpo9/ "Pete Buttigieg")

**YOUR RESPONSE HAS NOT BEEN RECEIVED YET!**

**[Let us know if you approve or not ASAP!](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2wdg5-1lpm2-4qqlpo8/ "Let us know if you approve or not ASAP!")**

Thank you for your feedback,

House Conservatives Polling HQ

**ATTN TRUMP PATRIOTS: TRUMP’S 2024 RUN HINGES ON FLIPPING 5 SEATS RED!**

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. She’s determined to ERASE Trump’s legacy and OBLITERATE his allies in Congress... _because she knows if we TAKE BACK THE HOUSE, Trump will run for PRESIDENT!_

We’re facing an uphill battle. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER. **[Fellow Conservative, can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2wdg5-1lpm5-4qqlpo1/ "Fellow Conservative, can we count on you to step up?")**

Will you sign your name today to tell the Senate to pass the Build Back Better Act?

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38829066/317261936/-1995343361?refcode=abd_em_fr_2021.10.04_bX_logo_x__f1_s1_c1__header&amount=25&utm_campaign=abd_em_pet_2021.11.20_b1_bbb_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&ms=ABD_EM_PET_2021.11.20_b1_BBB_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDA2YmJkZi0yZjRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ii7-LkzQ5r72SWsqKCx_wQXlTp3qjaoDiadIyXssYak=)

Friends --

We are ecstatic! The House passed President Biden’s Build Back Better Act!!

This historic bill is a once-in-a-generation investment for our country, giving help to the people who need it most.

It will fund universal pre-K, Medicare expansion, renewable energy credits, affordable housing, a year of expanded Child Tax Credits and major Obamacare subsidies -- all while lowering costs for working families.

But -- none of this will happen if the Senate doesn’t pass this bill as well. We know Senate Democrats will be hard at work getting it done, but they need to hear from you.

**[Will you sign your name today to tell the Senate to pass the Build Back Better Act?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38829067/317261937/756423435?refcode=ABD_EM_PET_2021.11.20_b1_BBB_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_campaign=abd_em_pet_2021.11.20_b1_bbb_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&ms=ABD_EM_PET_2021.11.20_b1_BBB_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDA2YmJkZi0yZjRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ii7-LkzQ5r72SWsqKCx_wQXlTp3qjaoDiadIyXssYak=&emci=a1c91609-6b49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=cd06bbdf-2f4a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=3200050)** | [SIGN YOUR NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38829068/317261938/756423435?refcode=ABD_EM_PET_2021.11.20_b1_BBB_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_campaign=abd_em_pet_2021.11.20_b1_bbb_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&ms=ABD_EM_PET_2021.11.20_b1_BBB_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDA2YmJkZi0yZjRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ii7-LkzQ5r72SWsqKCx_wQXlTp3qjaoDiadIyXssYak=&emci=a1c91609-6b49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=cd06bbdf-2f4a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=3200050)

body:
The guy who fills up my bowl every night is running to become Maryland’s next governor.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38829102/317262026/-923212789?refcode=BLU-KING-20211120-a-EM&&&&amount=25&refcode2=ea032801-304a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTAzMjgwMS0zMDRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=crJkghAb56kDQBk_PHwsLsY3HTTek6_I59OR86wtLco=)

| Hi, I’m Max! We’ve only got a few minutes before the squirrel outside my window comes back and that’s gonna require all my attention, so we’ll make this quick.

The guy who fills up my bowl every night is running to become Maryland’s next governor. I know he’s going to be great, but he needs all paws on deck in order to win. Can you join our campaign by texting **MAX to 48178** so you don’t miss any updates?
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38829103/317262027/-923212789?refcode=BLU-KING-20211120-a-EM&&&&amount=25&refcode2=ea032801-304a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTAzMjgwMS0zMDRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=crJkghAb56kDQBk_PHwsLsY3HTTek6_I59OR86wtLco=)
Whether it’s in the backyard or on the campaign trail, I love running. I’ve spent more time doing the former, so it’s been a lot of fun learning new tricks about running for office, including parade walking, voter contact, and email writing. To be dog-gone honest with you, I much prefer when John spends his time giving me belly scratches than writing campaign emails, but I know that sharing campaign updates with supporters like you is really important to him.

I’m not supposed to beg for treats, but just this once I’m _begging_ you to text**MAX to 48178.** I’ve heard if you text that code right now, you’ll get to see more pictures of John’s goodest supporter (me)!

Sorry, squirrel’s back, gotta run!

Max the Dog

clean_body: The guy who fills up my bowl every night is running to become Maryland’s next governor. | = | Hi, I’m Max! We’ve only got a few minutes before the squirrel outside my window comes back and that’s gonna require all my attention, so we’ll make this quick. The guy who fills up my bowl every night is running to become Maryland’s next governor. I know he’s going to be great, but he needs all paws on deck in order to win. Can you join our campaign by texting MAX to 48178 so you don’t miss any updates? = Whether it’s in the backyard or on the campaign trail, I love running. I’ve spent more time doing the former, so it’s been a lot of fun learning new tricks about running for office, including parade walking, voter contact, and email writing. To be dog-gone honest with you, I much prefer when John spends his time giving me belly scratches than writing campaign emails, but I know that sharing campaign updates with supporters like you is really important to him. I’m not supposed to beg for treats, but just this once I’m begging you to textMAX to 48178. I’ve heard if you text that code right now, you’ll get to see more pictures of John’s goodest supporter (me)! Sorry, squirrel’s back, gotta run! Max the Dog * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20107 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, visit his . **This is a _huge_ deal, folks:** House Democrats just passed the _Build Back Better Act_ — moving us one step closer to lowering household costs and making a huge investment in climate action. We’re going to deliver real change for New Mexicans and people across the country — all while taking care of our planet for future generations. But first, the Senate needs to pass this bill and send it to President Biden’s desk. I fought hard to help craft a bill that tackles climate change and supports folks as they recover from the pandemic and beyond. And I’ll fight even harder to make sure we pass it in the Senate. **Please, chip in $10 or any amount to support my work to address climate change and help make daily life better for New Mexicans and people in every area of our country. I’m proud that my major climate plans made it into the _Build Back Better Act_ — that includes providing household rebates for purchasing and installing electric appliances and equipment, and creating climate careers through a Civilian Climate Corps.
This could be our last real shot at enacting policies that address the climate emergency with the urgency it deserves. Thanks for being part of my work to get this done.

clean_body: This is a huge deal, folks: House Democrats just passed the Build Back Better Act — moving us one step closer to lowering household costs and making a huge investment in climate action. We’re going to deliver real change for New Mexicans and people across the country — all while taking care of our planet for future generations. But first, the Senate needs to pass this bill and send it to President Biden’s desk. I fought hard to help craft a bill that tackles climate change and supports folks as they recover from the pandemic and beyond. And I’ll fight even harder to make sure we pass it in the Senate. Please, chip in $10 or any amount to support my work to address climate change and help make daily life better for New Mexicans and people in every area of our country. We’re so close to getting these bold changes across the finish line. If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = I’m proud that my major climate plans made it into the Build Back Better Act — that includes providing household rebates for purchasing and installing electric appliances and equipment, and creating climate careers through a Civilian Climate Corps. This could be our last real shot at enacting policies that address the climate emergency with the urgency it deserves. Thanks for being part of my work to get this done. — Martin | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. body:
COVID-19 is real. Vaccines work. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38829297/317262357/823540626?refcode=ea.09e7ad43-314a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ms=ea.09e7ad43-314a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWU3YWQ0My0zMTRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tUWv7tPzSj7BEsNcsyBEYH8opPFBeaS7ABBCZWyApvs=&emci=de41104f-7c49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=09e7ad43-314a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=1049176)
Peter, Over the nearly two years of this pandemic — the worst in a _century_ — our society has seen a troubling trend. Far, far too many of our friends, family, and neighbors have fallen prey to misinformation spread by bad actors that makes them question vaccines, see masking as a political issue, or even disregard the threat of the virus. And all too often, that misinformation is spread by politicians in a position of public trust. **[Today, we need 200 Cooper supporters to sign our petition and join Roy in calling on the GOP to protect American lives and STOP spreading COVID misinformation. Add your name right now>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38829298/317262358/693098641?partner=Roy%20Cooper&refcode=ea.09e7ad43-314a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ms=ea.09e7ad43-314a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWU3YWQ0My0zMTRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tUWv7tPzSj7BEsNcsyBEYH8opPFBeaS7ABBCZWyApvs=&emci=de41104f-7c49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=09e7ad43-314a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=1049176)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38829299/317262359/693098641?partner=Roy%20Cooper&refcode=ea.09e7ad43-314a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ms=ea.09e7ad43-314a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWU3YWQ0My0zMTRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tUWv7tPzSj7BEsNcsyBEYH8opPFBeaS7ABBCZWyApvs=&emci=de41104f-7c49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=09e7ad43-314a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=1049176)
