**More than 750,000 Americans have died from this virus.**
That is more than one in every 500 people in the nation. More Americans than were killed in the 1918 flu pandemic. More than were killed in every foreign war since the founding of our country — combined.
This is a national tragedy the likes of which we have truly never known.
Ultimately, the most basic duty of the government and elected officials is to serve and protect the people. Republicans who spread COVID misinformation have failed in that.
**Enough is enough.**
**[Peter, add your name to our petition now to tell them it’s time to stop the lies and defend public health and safety. Click here to sign>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38829300/317262360/693098641?partner=Roy%20Cooper&refcode=ea.09e7ad43-314a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ms=ea.09e7ad43-314a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWU3YWQ0My0zMTRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tUWv7tPzSj7BEsNcsyBEYH8opPFBeaS7ABBCZWyApvs=&emci=de41104f-7c49-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=09e7ad43-314a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=1049176)**
Thank you,
Team Cooper

name: Mia McLeod
subject: I’m running to become SouthCarolina’s next governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mia for South Carolina
body:
It’s time to build a South Carolina as strong as we are. | | | _Mia McLeod is running to become our next governor because she has the experience and the courage to build a South Carolina that’s as strong as we are. If you no longer want to receive updates from our campaign, you can[unsubscribe here.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4G3cdy8v6-1NSOaVSJqG3IJkPdgquBxFNnSpiFvELjP1aa5c5x2Mio0YKxl2MsaUqBQ23KBQXw032-w8FDQgiI8KtxdR5NelEQP8U5fCVsbXTIvwhn9pem1oVa-dzGBti5XDXuEtWu4eso5khk1oI831FDr85bK2p8uJzMkbkhuLhaB96Nwms1iF1Y329TAS428iaDokIjnF0YTuNx0I8zdDIhwORQzxbAx57mqOFTOkZX-pzp7q_hyG5jmllj43uE75FZapgLRrS5IAHFlgqXMqpqkZtl_v-A1TcZqG4RMudKSVXBAk0mNaJWxrCEquSLUXUp4rvGym0r4rYQzIbDm0mB1A_o92ixB3lnq4QbN9Zp3DYxRX22jUU0nfPYtdweGpFVHeQOnWZy7AwPucy-ig/3h6/jiYjf9C1QKKcH51ikFa8ZA/h0/2Hl2yrwpv0fafkQTh0dBVthhoKCe_jAXKTLAcT7CmKU)_ Friends, I was born a seventh-generation South Carolinian in Bennettsville — a place so neglected by politics as usual that some call it the “corridor of shame.” Sadly, forgotten communities like where I am from are not rare in South Carolina. Wanting to change that culture of systemic inequality inspired me to fight for my own education, and propelled me into a life of public service. In the legislature I’ve been fighting for high quality education for all students, healthcare that is accessible throughout our state, pay equity and good paying jobs for all South Carolinians. As a mother of two Black young men, this advocacy has always been personal for me. Too many of our best and brightest have to move to neighboring states to find opportunity. I’m fighting to make sure they can stay here in South Carolina and thrive. Now more than ever, we need bold, new leadership. The past few years have illustrated the failures of Governor Henry McMaster and revealed that our broken government only works for a select few. **That’s why I’m running to become the next Governor of South Carolina.** **[It’s time for us to build a South Carolina together that is as strong as we are. Will you join me and add your name as a grassroots supporter of my campaign?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkgzD3rFgPYcV9RGKaidLN3iSCj6OWPYpfyeieT4tUUBFof0rguewFOcv1qpgZMtCBSpsSprn5pp19XjOE_wf9w4RcxxfayjUaUsKP9TcM7d3M3pLNxMSchuClQaSfQlPDZS34ZhY6WeQ1lpaHtl3uvVYQllMHdkowuG4NS57BpkNalRQffqOsb3JrK0jOVzyDxivb1HcNWWkSMmr8_49FDVxGSDtiiqGzZBVCCCQDOreE8pLFwEfmdbPo8QHqDOu0IOMh7oB7eMZL7wMHCxB2gWYcqYcQSIAXH70_WG93ZfYSfVJa6I9bDnznCTq_1Jpue7FDtd4SEyQwbGetDxd9Q_PYWKxXPVnPlZIuLn9J9Sg/3h6/jiYjf9C1QKKcH51ikFa8ZA/h1/9bsv8ZV5un53i3Tw04x3Iv6YlGN5S1sk9lHdAMeu3bM)** | | [JOIN TEAM MIA ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkgzD3rFgPYcV9RGKaidLN3iSCj6OWPYpfyeieT4tUUBFof0rguewFOcv1qpgZMtCBSXit9W2PbO7tPSsA1zEOzm9L3oIjrBgncqRFkPLp8yj9LRvegNTi_V2Dk5KWCmSvY3ngUTdT-GYoMyZeheax04hxNDJy7Y0duy2tiOdEmRX6Bv7zd_vwTE373HapPOFb1hgCB9GptxIAy2ub0lpumlfxicJktMyceSC1Yxohqr_wPcKJ6cSFfwYQezQetoOUYO7fmivR8ksdN-99iauwkGYo6kfy5nzG2941lV9e4brwcHHwepOOTGVEDvVRGfriJQODp0jVgexprKVOpMVNFMRUT7ts0gJfn6k93I7AaJQ/3h6/jiYjf9C1QKKcH51ikFa8ZA/h2/YUJpPxdIQv7ozb9oQe76AT7HdlJl3dIdoOBF6he0zAw)
---
Taking on the political establishment is nothing new to me. For ten years I have been standing up to the old guard and protecting a woman’s right to make her own health care decisions. I’m taking on corporate monopolies with landmark legislation to benefit ratepayers who are being fleeced by public utilities.
I’m fighting for parents who, like me, dream of a better future for our children;
For students and young people seeking education and opportunity;
For families working hard to make ends meet.
**I’ll never shy away from fighting for what is right — whether it means standing up to the McMaster administration, or even taking on my own party to ensure that the people of South Carolina come first.**
Rejecting the status quo politics of the past is how we’ll create a path for a better future. A South Carolina where access to quality education, jobs, and healthcare don’t depend on your zip code.
**Now, I’m running for Governor to say no to politics as usual and the same old tired leadership of yesterday.**
**[It will take all of us to build a transformative movement for change, which is why I need you in this fight. I hope you’ll join me by adding your name as a grassroots supporter.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkgzD3rFgPYcV9RGKaidLN3iSCj6OWPYpfyeieT4tUUBFof0rguewFOcv1qpgZMtCBJGats43gQwPcbVLm1VB5dD_CmAAPH8W3aVncY_x4-gyZ-XKTCOOYbzgam9TyYpIe2TnXw5ZIa0jVl-ePpN_2l0RFM8w1YP9wGFIewOGkFYg0iCla4I5AE3Kfhl1zX1LoxL5D75w5UPuJ-cRkhwGdtTIa9BtN1iJljGgl_Gnz-CVwxmHG__uqK7fsn3FnOQ_3xmGl7ljhBslxPhjFDUjw9EaA9FQB_7IFVMBfqR7Amjv0TQ6yEk8fYjjZJ1nrtY3wpXtvwtXPNvEjgUS4G8XtIO04sHVVknB_K1s7TrQkvKw/3h6/jiYjf9C1QKKcH51ikFa8ZA/h3/GcVbqtUti5LXKedTxvCM2yEpKQ8mt-TTrYrOvoHqh10)**
| [JOIN TEAM MIA ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkgzD3rFgPYcV9RGKaidLN3iSCj6OWPYpfyeieT4tUUBFof0rguewFOcv1qpgZMtCAxvSlMMC4nRav9UNFnDLsckhVCYQL-HRgMgruVI5bOFSZsDPIlxd4cl208avvY2E6W9f1p_1M-vrfPFu9MyTpjNyVxyS1HNtz0OIH0mQvaR7cBjqUPjLTsS-ARIbGH-d42ABi4JeJbrs2WmIy0yyC1jY8ODobYJg7-q32Q3ZgyTH5Emf_zPCybXgoFUPGVFHN8n1YFN7gmJs16jB1afoaJM_Dtk-6WvJy69-o43NaaQz0KNjoL9SJuThZLJmglRnD8DrYErt6jDU4RwiMM_3oPluPKXrnOZeGLgdv3693ZKw/3h6/jiYjf9C1QKKcH51ikFa8ZA/h4/cnFjb7Aw2juBEOd595bQlJu9-mF0YdOTnYD-G8Vt0-k)
---
Thank you, friend. I’m honored to have you alongside me in this fight to build a better, stronger South Carolina.
— Mia McLeod

clean_body: It’s time to build a South Carolina as strong as we are. | | | Mia McLeod is running to become our next governor because she has the experience and the courage to build a South Carolina that’s as strong as we are. If you no longer want to receive updates from our campaign, you can Friends, I was born a seventh-generation South Carolinian in Bennettsville — a place so neglected by politics as usual that some call it the “corridor of shame.” Sadly, forgotten communities like where I am from are not rare in South Carolina. Wanting to change that culture of systemic inequality inspired me to fight for my own education, and propelled me into a life of public service. In the legislature I’ve been fighting for high quality education for all students, healthcare that is accessible throughout our state, pay equity and good paying jobs for all South Carolinians. As a mother of two Black young men, this advocacy has always been personal for me. Too many of our best and brightest have to move to neighboring states to find opportunity. I’m fighting to make sure they can stay here in South Carolina and thrive. Now more than ever, we need bold, new leadership. The past few years have illustrated the failures of Governor Henry McMaster and revealed that our broken government only works for a select few. That’s why I’m running to become the next Governor of South Carolina. | | Taking on the political establishment is nothing new to me. For ten years I have been standing up to the old guard and protecting a woman’s right to make her own health care decisions. I’m taking on corporate monopolies with landmark legislation to benefit ratepayers who are being fleeced by public utilities. I’m fighting for parents who, like me, dream of a better future for our children; For students and young people seeking education and opportunity; For families working hard to make ends meet. I’ll never shy away from fighting for what is right — whether it means standing up to the McMaster administration, or even taking on my own party to ensure that the people of South Carolina come first. Rejecting the status quo politics of the past is how we’ll create a path for a better future. A South Carolina where access to quality education, jobs, and healthcare don’t depend on your zip code. Now, I’m running for Governor to say no to politics as usual and the same old tired leadership of yesterday. | Thank you, friend. I’m honored to have you alongside me in this fight to build a better, stronger South Carolina. — Mia McLeod | Please, disregard if you are a registered lobbyist. | | | Paid for by Mia for South Carolina | | Sent via . name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Give Thanks for America – update from the Mississippi Center for Public Policy
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/progressupdate-8132142?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,

**Thanksgiving is almost upon us – and I am super excited.**

Why? A new arrival in America, this will be my family’s first ever Thanksgiving!

For over three hundred years, Americans have celebrated this special day – and Americans have a lot to celebrate.

My family might be joining in for the first time this year, but we will be celebrating as enthusiastically as anyone, right down to eating turkey and ham, as well as watching the Ole Miss vs Mississippi State football game afterwards.
---
|
---
_**Crumble, my dog from England,
celebrates being in America**_
| Before signing off for Thanksgiving week, here are a few highlights I wanted to share with you:

**Mississippi has underperformed economically for years because of burdensome regulations.** **[Matthew Nicaud looks at what we need to do to change this.](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=7051ff416f&e=5703353baa)**

With **Washington hosing federal money around,** **[Josiah Dalke looks at the downsides.](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=cc6094e181&e=5703353baa)**

**[In this article for _RealClearPolicy_ ,](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=9a15b974c1&e=5703353baa)** I suggest that **school freedom offers conservatives are roadmap back to power.**

Last but not least, I was delighted to be singled out for an attack by the ultra-progressive _Guardian_ in the UK. My crime? I had dared to suggest that the USA is more prosperous than Europe. **America is indeed more prosperous and innovative than Europe – and America is like that because she has limited government and more freedom –** as I delighted in pointing out to _the Guardian_ **[here.](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=0988c01dac&e=5703353baa)**

**Have a wonderful Thanksgiving!**
---
| |
---

Warm Regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
| |
---
| | **_BEST OF BROADCAST_**
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=a64fdf5274&e=5703353baa)
---
"The Truth Behind Medicaid Expansion in Mississippi" ~ _Free Mississippi_ 11/17/21
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=df74d529f8&e=5703353baa)
---

|

subject: Happy Native American Heritage Month!
body:
In celebrating this month, however, it's difficult to ignore the great challenges faced by these communities, in particular, the fight against COVID. | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnn_0kk2sIZD1RcgDoNoNMH39eD3Q7od7YQTh0He9uZLp5KUQkvxGwE8LD0tmzaJAccmq6Mg3rVjQSP9fQFOFqWzRXAZ18xzgrx04EJH_dQO5016LKBxuIkOKU7o7IF6C2V2R8uL4M4L1XVcMnl7SzZ6FJxNH_TPjs5GQMORmqGHZyBmKG7vlrllA4CQB3-J_9fAoi4rFv7OVTNEsQxbfn0rqmt8AsACt_3P0GkueKXoeiXcoiVLY19-AytusNsvkd4ItkACYkBmOdFUcd_T1KUlMEI3-ZvU1tWBhhmb8iCQ4VtFv3e2xi1Hk-B1xYixJ7A/3h6/KYMW9aQSTQCQ5RDbvXGUKw/h0/oNpUKOVdYr1JNfHDf_YS2OAMGYkVo9xuaQR3wqt_ZKw)

Hi friends, **Team Gansler is proud to wish all Marylanders Happy Native American Heritage Month!**
---
| [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnn_0kk2sIZD1RcgDoNoNMH39eD3Q7od7YQTh0He9uZLp5KUQkvxGwE8LD0tmzaJAccmq6Mg3rVjQSP9fQFOFqWzRXAZ18xzgrx04EJH_dQO5016LKBxuIkOKU7o7IF6C2V2R8uL4M4L1XVcMnl7SzZ6iyfGvfWMOVPONGcFlGXeiQ17ad4VJOtmKJuZ1VdPID6KYBog6ZNswQfoJm_wUcWt0vrZF2E_7w3YmPQS7K-ejYxvVOBj0nt33Kf45yQbBjBWtJYsr2A2-wQHfNz6xh73F7R00G1d_kwawd3PWgGK3p-u1casuUtcq9P4eY8HHO8/3h6/KYMW9aQSTQCQ5RDbvXGUKw/h1/rjZZ-ePIu26n7BE2ZI7dRshiLjPyGRp1DrKmTyKo55A)
---
This is a special time to reflect, recognize, and honor the historical and cultural impact of Native American communities here in Maryland, and across the country. Tribes like the Piscataway Indian Nation, Piscataway Conoy Tribe, and the Accohannock Indian Tribe have enriched the quality and character of our state for generations. In celebrating this month, however, it's difficult to ignore the great challenges faced by these communities, in particular, the fight against COVID. Maryland is one of only 14 states that do not publish clear data on COVID's impact on the Native American population. According to the 2020 census, there are 31,845 people in Maryland who identify as American Indian and Alaska Native alone, with an additional 96,805 identifying as American Indian and Alaska Native in combination with one or more races. **Yet, Maryland lumps them together as "Other" in its COVID data, and** **without data, it is nearly impossible to get resources.** This failure will change in a Gansler Administration, but Native American Marylanders should not have to wait until 2023 to prove how they have been impacted by COVID. **[We're calling on the Hogan Administration to count and see Native American Marylanders, immediately.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnn_0kk2sIZD1RcgDoNoNMH39eD3Q7od7YQTh0He9uZLp5KUQkvxGwE8LD0tmzaJAccmq6Mg3rVjQSP9fQFOFqWzRXAZ18xzgrx04EJH_dQO5016LKBxuIkOKU7o7IF6C2V2R8uL4M4L1XVcMnl7SzZ6aq1oFhbkWM_oYUCIZlcHTkLsYwceOd04M9ZCzUrSW_Ec9Xgx-_v4A97StqF_tjvSwt5PpwpQyQh5nIT_YmPOQGnxyrj46RAqg_36XH4NOdcadC0mBF3uBYKS3VV4BiRdA6tZSViAmeX_V_tIpO5MXtFaQ8tcyuhPdEC6e4naEfk/3h6/KYMW9aQSTQCQ5RDbvXGUKw/h2/4bmjWTA4YX50r0uL82FkIYnXfGYjc4mBYLWCcUCPcrw)**
---
[ **SIGN THE PETITION ->**
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnn_0kk2sIZD1RcgDoNoNMH39eD3Q7od7YQTh0He9uZLp5KUQkvxGwE8LD0tmzaJAccmq6Mg3rVjQSP9fQFOFqWzRXAZ18xzgrx04EJH_dQO5016LKBxuIkOKU7o7IF6C2V2R8uL4M4L1XVcMnl7SzZ6pSm0F8fCRiV6IvzXG0T-xTPtPrN6mrvpJLW_vDQ4SmUE_l6QvdXI-fWLACKG0PqcknRHZQHRrfrfWyl5PHtIWXBUIkb6l-ldkrrXncOjBxyZY7goZ8L7jK2KCe2A6L-D3Pw8C02ppWdttoePOwlg0OOozGjPEsocC7mEmqwq4S8/3h6/KYMW9aQSTQCQ5RDbvXGUKw/h3/K1EnWXiGdamNUrvVGRGA5J6IkrINiBsy2Kumujlqd0o)
---
**To Native American Marylanders all over the state: We see your strength and we join you in your joy, and we will name and work to correct the inequities you face.** Thank you, Team Gansler

name: Lena Moffitt, Evergreen Action
subject: Weekend action alert!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
It'll take less than a minute.
| Friend, ICYMI: Yesterday, the House passed the Build Back Better Act. This is a big freakin' deal for the climate movement. But now, it's gotta pass the Senate, too, and we need your help to do it! We know it's the weekend, but with so much on the line, we wanted to make sure you didn't miss out on the climate movement's make-or-break moment. [**_We created a weekend action just for folks like you: Click here to send a letter to your senator today, urging them to pass the Build Back Better Act. It'll take less than a minute, and we've already prefilled a letter that'll go straight to your senator's office. It couldn't be easier or quicker—or more important._**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/send-letter-pass-bbba-senate-democrats/?utm_source=ema_2021-11-20_bbb_house_vote_weekend_&source=ema_2021-11-20_bbb_house_vote_weekend_&t=3&akid=12908%2E53494%2E8R-pXF) | [SEND A LETTER](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/send-letter-pass-bbba-senate-democrats/?utm_source=ema_2021-11-20_bbb_house_vote_weekend_&source=ema_2021-11-20_bbb_house_vote_weekend_&t=4&akid=12908%2E53494%2E8R-pXF)
---
[__](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/send-letter-pass-bbba-senate-democrats/?utm_source=ema_2021-11-20_bbb_house_vote_weekend_&source=ema_2021-11-20_bbb_house_vote_weekend_&t=5&akid=12908%2E53494%2E8R-pXF)
Thank you for your commitment to the movement (even on a Saturday),
Lena Moffitt
Campaigns Director, Evergreen Action
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Sam Ricketts, Evergreen Action** <evergreenaction.com>
Date: Fri, Nov 19, 2021
Subject: BREAKING: The House just passed the Build Back Better Act. Here's what's next:
[](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4009?t=6&akid=12908%2E53494%2E8R-pXF)
Friend,
**The House just passed the Build Back Better Act, the most significant investment in climate action in U.S. history.**
Now, we're one step closer to staving off the worst impacts of the climate crisis and fulfilling the climate promises that Biden ran and won on. **Now, the Senate must pass the bill and send it to Biden's desk without delay.**
[**_Will you sign our petition calling on Senate Democrats to finish the job? After you sign, we'll give you a chance to double your impact and call your senators directly to make sure they get the message!_**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4009?t=7&akid=12908%2E53494%2E8R-pXF)
[FINISH THE JOB](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4009?t=8&akid=12908%2E53494%2E8R-pXF)
---
Historic investments. Millions of good jobs building the clean energy economy. Environmental justice. Pollution reductions. Clean energy tax incentives. Civilian Climate Corps. Clean Energy Accelerator. When we say this bill contains transformational climate action, we mean it.
I really need to emphasize this: If passed, this will be a huge victory for climate champions across the movement and in Congress who've been fighting for this for years. (Today's vote is already a huge victory for this community. In no small part due to our recent organizing campaign targeting conservative House Democrats, which many of you participated in, all but one—Jared Golden (ME-02)—voted for this bill!) This bill is an essential investment toward President Biden's goal of cutting climate pollution in half over the coming decade and avoiding the worst impacts of this crisis.
**But we're not in the clear yet: Senate Democrats must pass the Build Back Better Act ASAP, and we need to make sure our senators are hearing from us directly.** [**_Add your name right now to urge Senate Democrats to pass the Build Back Better Act—with its bold climate investments—ASAP. Then, we'll give you a chance to call your senators directly. (It's quick and easy. We'll even give you a script!)_**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4009?t=9&akid=12908%2E53494%2E8R-pXF)
This is our moment. Let's get this passed and then keep building toward a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future together.
Onward,
Sam Ricketts
Co-Director, Evergreen Action
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4009?t=10&akid=12908%2E53494%2E8R-pXF)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=12908%2E53494%2E8R-pXF).Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible.| PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION

name: Team Holly
subject: Bridge to the future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
https://www.holly4congress.com/ [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
Peter,
I’m writing today to share my deepest appreciation for all of our nation’s veterans. Growing up on army bases and in a family full of veterans, I learned discipline very early on and that service is meant to be selfless.
Today, we want to honor members of the Armed Forces that have defended our nation’s freedom and protected our country's future.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88943/images/Image%20from%20iOS%20%2851%29.jpg]Today also reminds us that we must do more to protect our veterans when they re-enter civilian life. After returning home many veterans are not given adequate support. GA-14 has a considerable veteran population yet we only have one VA hospital in the district and no veterans’ cemeteries . We must do better. We will do better. That's why I'm running to change the way that we treat our veterans when they return home.
We owe a debt to those who’ve placed their lives on the line to protect our freedom as Americans, and we have to do better to provide for their care and to honor their sacrifices.
Sincerely,
Holly McCormack.
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em1111] Join the #MackPack [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/ [https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/] https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress [https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress] https://www.instagram.com/hollyforcongress/ [https://www.instagram.com/hollyforcongress/] http://www.hollyforcongress.org/ [http://www.hollyforcongress.org/]
Paid for by Holly for Congress
Holly McCormack for Congress
862 Lafayette St

Ringgold, GA 30736

| | ICYMI, Peter, Lori Saine just launched a nasty attack ad against Dr. Caraveo. **[Rush $25 right now to fight back against Lori Saine’s baseless attacks >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38830377/317267520/1424041718?refcode=em_YC_FR_MM4_112021_op_b_l1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTZjZTRkZi0zNTRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ev-_BfkX417iKxOInUrYieCoEFSF9ks0lEWl-om7C0M=)**

In the video, Saine calls Dr. Caraveo a whole slew of names including crazy, whiny, extreme, dangerous, and anti-America.

Saine thinks she can use baseless name calling and invoke Trumpist language like “Make America Free Again” to win over the families of Colorado’s 8th congressional district, but we know she’s wrong.

Coloradans don’t want more divisive politics. Coloradans want leaders they can count on to get us out of this crisis, get our economy back on track, and fight for health care and education reform. And as far as we can tell, Lori Saine doesn’t have a plan for any of that.

name: 850% Match Alert
subject: The FIGHT is here and now, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
| | | Conservatives are preparing for battle, and right now, **we need you with us more than ever before. **

The Midterm Election results will define the future we leave behind for our children and grandchildren. We cannot hesitate. The time to strike is now. **[Are you with us?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58826343:6BDd1420N:m:1:3253819041:8DE7C275CEEE8A5D8DA3DD4129BF41BE:r "Are you with
us?")**

**[Will you commit TODAY by chipping in an 850% matched contribution to help us start the RED WAVE?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58826343:6BDd1420N:m:1:3253819041:8DE7C275CEEE8A5D8DA3DD4129BF41BE:r "Will you commit TODAY by chipping in an 850% matched contribution to help us start the RED
WAVE?")**

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58826343:6BDd1420N:m:1:3253819041:8DE7C275CEEE8A5D8DA3DD4129BF41BE:r)
---

Button")
---
_850% Match Activated until 11:59 PM_
We refuse to lie to you, and we won't sugarcoat it for you either. The Radical Left is energized, and they're determined to destroy every lasting legacy President Trump left on this great nation.

_They have the money, and the manpower._

The odds are stacked against us, and **no Conservative is safe.**

We CANNOT afford for our base to sit on the sidelines. If we want to bring on a RED WAVE and take back our President's Majority, we need to work hard and earn it.

**[That's why I'm asking you to take a stand right now with President Trump and House Conservatives. If you commit to starting the RED WAVE by 11:59 PM, we will match your contribution by 850%!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58826343:6BDd1420N:m:1:3253819041:8DE7C275CEEE8A5D8DA3DD4129BF41BE:r "That’s
why I’m asking you to take a stand right now with President Trump and House Conservatives. If you commit to starting the RED WAVE by 11:59 PM,
we will match your contribution by 850%!")**

---
| | | [JOIN THE RED WAVE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58826343:6BDd1420N:m:1:3253819041:8DE7C275CEEE8A5D8DA3DD4129BF41BE:r "Generic Button")
---
_850% Match Activated until 11:59 PM_
Every second we wait, the stakes get higher and higher. **We need you on our team.**

House Conservatives need us to step up more than ever before. We need to show the liberal establishment that we are ready to fight for our President.

**[Are you with us?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58826343:6BDd1420N:m:1:3253819041:8DE7C275CEEE8A5D8DA3DD4129BF41BE:r "Are you with
us?")**

Onwards to battle,

House Conservatives

name: MaxSteinerForCongress.com
subject: Can you help send postcards to voters, friend? ✉️
body:
A good old-fashioned campaign method: sending out postcards! |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38830710/317268724/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODAxZjNhNi0zOTRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C3gB8sakslrKr76KwJKb7pmkuWSys2117_Gr3uqu6dc=)
Friend,

Max has been out and about, campaigning across the North State hosting events and talking to as many voters as possible. We'll never be able to reach everyone ourselves, which is why we've been focusing on another old-fashioned (but very effective) campaign method: sending postcards to undecided voters!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38830711/317268725/925719408?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODAxZjNhNi0zOTRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C3gB8sakslrKr76KwJKb7pmkuWSys2117_Gr3uqu6dc=&emci=2788b61b-324a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=2801f3a6-394a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=11663292) There’s nothing quite like getting a personalized note from a neighbor about why they’re standing with Max. And the great news is that volunteers can have very persuasive stories. The more postcards we send -- the better.

**We’re gearing up to write and send thousands of postcards, but we need to know if you're interested in helping out. Sign up using this link to receive a batch of postcards to personalize and send to voters.**
| **[Sign up for postcards →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38830712/317268726/925719408?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODAxZjNhNi0zOTRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C3gB8sakslrKr76KwJKb7pmkuWSys2117_Gr3uqu6dc=&emci=2788b61b-324a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=2801f3a6-394a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=11663292)**
---

As a reminder, draft maps for our district show an improvement in Democratic registration. If this map is finalized, it will be a huge boost to our campaign.

Our goal is to get the word out to new voters before LaMalfa does. If we do that, we'll have a great shot at flipping this district. That’s why these postcards are so important:

**[Sign up to send postcards as a volunteer today>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38830713/317268727/925719408?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODAxZjNhNi0zOTRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C3gB8sakslrKr76KwJKb7pmkuWSys2117_Gr3uqu6dc=&emci=2788b61b-324a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=2801f3a6-394a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=11663292)**

Team Max HQ

body:
THIS is what real change looks like — and it was made possible thanks to the leadership and courage of progressives in Congress. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xQsZ_uHW9ME9h2VPudEgVBlT0rAEcoX_uBPlqDgEOfEQIhz_Vu9SFmd68KrwuQ3aKi7nPZoMC1hdvv-aBtd_WQ6FKSfaxIkIrA17ayJt0nD3RjG4UQwn_Mjp4kRSXGf_3mwKMP2OmGG1hS88d7JSYz7M-Rq976NooLSm1YMpGNEEjlprA9OR1dDkpY-j8i7YDOJLI5MMbmlcNwrtRjsTgtBcu_l_QbuRVxSCq7TxduXxT5imAvrgtGQPuV5MRfEbYy2vpp4aM3ziH_tRghI6CvHtetGfRH2s82seuGjGRAFvNhZddo7IfXQ3NQLzhzlwCeUDDUshsOjJW1IVnOfbv9qMw8thbFxk4HuFNadL1xWYEJiA_6_3g8YQ-nrRq9No-soIGG9v005u_zrVuM2YRXP3IZ-KaG0OOqdcJRTWXcXAhuEN9G7HzpyHMwFFrVhWE/3h6/zZM2VbIqR4CDS0UxDeUKDQ/h0/BJwlcFapPlwGKhyL_Y4jT8aFuW3sbUlR1V56wKLVdd8) Peter,
Congress just passed the Build Back Better Act — and I’m _thrilled_ for this historic investment in working class communities! Despite corporate Democrats’ attempts to derail it, we’re getting:
✅ Green jobs
✅ Paid family leave
✅ Affordable child care
✅ Medicaid and Medicare expansion,
✅ Cheaper prescription drugs,
✅ And so much more.
THIS is what real change looks like, and it was made possible thanks to the leadership and courage of progressives in Congress. When corporate Democrats wanted to kill investments in people to satisfy their corporate donors, the progressives refused to back down. **** **_[I’m ready to deliver for working people in Congress — and if you’re looking for a leader who will fight like hell for transformational legislation just like Build Back Better, please chip $5 to our campaign today.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xWIurlfE4kaqpZPqSu1iEiWF1SiairJ_Suthq5OCNen-T07zSjdpWXTjEL3caRDiWw9I1E3on-dLH1fZ523RSLda0mJdfZxC77F_pEOHRa9NkhGaC4N-LXc-xIwQ8Ymc5gySc-vayjRSzIUT4NQ0QEIwZnlYtAoR4TlRRwA01GMHErqwryHhuZK92RfpjN3QXoN4kRjdR-pB_n7EjgvNl6aRWjemZc8eCUOCp0WU8j5UKYc1Nkwc2zCFyjX1U82PemrYhAuh6hjI92Lo2SZczB3oCmP4pXkaNM6-Y2wEYzKubFLSWChEuQFxMCwWQNXV-g2yigoE4j3QMmtxJouVJjV_XFSg6FynJM7IsRKd5zQp4FrYLjHT-36QvQkV9jA8z6KGQ2dDMhydoW3YRsq4jcy-jZ2QVSzkOG2a6kZKR3vtmjF2Gwbx0EF1Jfpv22dFb1z_LPEnR5qswMoR65--WI/3h6/zZM2VbIqR4CDS0UxDeUKDQ/h1/vzhrJNWDCTnXbRXAMqy2C8ntNLTplRIqAV4wp2-4QK0) _** **** **[Contribute $5 »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xWIurlfE4kaqpZPqSu1iEiWF1SiairJ_Suthq5OCNen-T07zSjdpWXTjEL3caRDiXIlLQxuKGmshqn9HhseSCMpLj3tUXAMWFJVEQCWKRzcnR4nCt99O9C0I8kXdOqVSWdbzUricz9qaPwqK8D5VR-xCI9wwsCeU6atmgLrb2HVksr9aSuY62UuDWjVkC8eJYgIv-a7wlvJkFN8TEwwo3RuH_BzCtMB-JLpKqEBhc7yjmjUnCJ0SAMfl0OjAXKM0DQQ1CjCa56Z3GD8vRiJEtfGTd7_Dg-6TjvSNzw_V3vQmgkjSKoyX4Gw87LxPT0N7qLegFi_ybZ9d1XgTnSSwSuDCfq9Rz9Nui65Od5NYJlLWeef33bNqO6j5gtITWf5vIjJYsoHxE4YXYu437QALfujELyzjaOeiAZS4HbI1nmHb-kjddEMNzxc1r9uXrN9g5S6U040CIjrtKpvCpR_dYr/3h6/zZM2VbIqR4CDS0UxDeUKDQ/h2/eACW9kcbowUwD9T3HVWFuTkOb7ueG3ItCs7ylt2l4xY)** This bill passed yesterday no thanks to my deficit hawk opponent, Congressman Jim Cooper. He may have voted yes, but he’s been silent on Build Back Better, while his closest colleagues in the Blue Dog Caucus have worked tirelessly to tank President Biden’s agenda. **Congressman, where were you on this historic investment?** While you’ve been quiet, cashing checks from the Business Roundtable as they’ve tried to stop this bill, your constituents have wondered where you are. When I’m in Congress, you will never have to doubt where I stand — it’ll always be with the people. **[_If you’re with me, will you chip in $5 to our campaign today? With your support, we can unseat my conservative opponent and bring a new, progressive voice to Congress._](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xWIurlfE4kaqpZPqSu1iEiWF1SiairJ_Suthq5OCNen-T07zSjdpWXTjEL3caRDiX21BSpp6XxKu_MoJpGl0zFmlYLQ2XJvaELXLxBjagnctMsfjKN7JIDAPcMZEe83hVctxN2wzfFtlGUN0bTIVkN1riXX3orpnjx_HIg9xuB7GwmtzWWHMAkUH6IBHlXRR90JvJcs8y0S3p3Pk8QkgdsbHQ00tdNEyUtUgGlNED6ECrTq4JzxioKzfyX_OAjIVkXAXLp-9tO1x1jf5QSvlHFcW7Qs5zeCeqIzlGFua7q61tsgZYvbarw_1sfKuzdrS6AeMssC7AB5WU-Syl7ZgL60U0-RBm4XgqMTSXY8YTSd-poKnxI9E9TdamtPBG8a6Stkv-8mBirBmOwqQryJPxEy0X_y8vDHbLziG6ga8haKjSQHkdU19w9K9r1Bb5SFLt5uhX1ggDIfWdEMT9Eksxs/3h6/zZM2VbIqR4CDS0UxDeUKDQ/h3/Xkgs8Sol5QoA7388ehLfUzxeCbQuGj8fNMa1Gr_40FQ)** Have a wonderful weekend, Peter — and make some time today to celebrate this victory! clean_body: THIS is what real change looks like — and it was made possible thanks to the leadership and courage of progressives in Congress. | | | Peter, Congress just passed the Build Back Better Act — and I’m thrilled for this historic investment in working class communities! Despite corporate Democrats’ attempts to derail it, we’re getting: ✅ Green jobs ✅ Paid family leave ✅ Affordable child care ✅ Medicaid and Medicare expansion, ✅ Cheaper prescription drugs, ✅ And so much more. THIS is what real change looks like, and it was made possible thanks to the leadership and courage of progressives in Congress. When corporate Democrats wanted to kill investments in people to satisfy their corporate donors, the progressives refused to back down. ** This bill passed yesterday no thanks to my deficit hawk opponent, Congressman Jim Cooper. He may have voted yes, but he’s been silent on Build Back Better, while his closest colleagues in the Blue Dog Caucus have worked tirelessly to tank President Biden’s agenda. Congressman, where were you on this historic investment? While you’ve been quiet, cashing checks from the Business Roundtable as they’ve tried to stop this bill, your constituents have wondered where you are. When I’m in Congress, you will never have to doubt where I stand — it’ll always be with the people. ** Have a wonderful weekend, Peter — and make some time today to celebrate this victory! With gratitude, Odessa Odessa Kelly Candidate for Tennessee’s 5th Congressional District | To give by check: Odessa for Congress 2817 West End Ave, Ste 126-401 Nashville, TN 37203

Small businesses have suffered greatly these past few years. The consolidation of large companies has taken a lot of the room out of the air. The pandemic has caused intense shockwaves through all sectors of the economy. Small businesses are hurting, and I am determined to help.
I will be going to the Senate as the owner and manager of two different small businesses. I know what goes into cultivating success in a local economy, and I am focused on the needs of Floridians who have been so negatively impacted.
**[When I get to Washington, I will work for you, not giant corporations. I promise to focus on the needs of small businesses and local economies. I am interested in helping the people of Florida and strengthening our economy here. With your help, I will deliver.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38831109/317270438/359895892?refcode=211120-email-smallbiz&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWI0ZWUyNS0zYzRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d8AaLwwzEIm-UpNvht2x3PH4rbywpfdQOqAqf7EEq4o=)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michael=20Brown?=
subject: FW: 😡 Gross Incompetence!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
The pattern is clear. Whitmer ignored the warnings. And now Michigan residents pay the price. | | | |
---
| | | Peter:

The gross incompetence of the Whitmer administration has been on full display in recent weeks.

>From the botched response to the Benton Harbor water crisis to the latest unemployment benefit fiasco, this hasn’t been a good stretch for Governor Whitmer.

In Benton Harbor, the _**Governor ignored the scientific evidence and the pleas of the community**_. For three years she did virtually nothing to help Benton Harbor residents suffering with overly contaminated water. It wasn’t until a request was filed for intervention by the Environmental Protection Agency that the Governor finally pulled her head out of the sand.

She belatedly issued an executive order vowing to replace pipes within 18 months. While that action was necessary and should be applauded, _it’s still very troubling why she would wait and delay when the situation was more dangerous than the Flint water crisis several years back._

**Was it callous disregard for a poorer community in the state, or just blatant incompetence?**

When I first learned of the water problems in Benton Harbor, _I immediately visited the community and volunteered along with local residents to distribute bottled water to the citizens_. I talked with those most impacted, and quite frankly, was appalled at the Governor’s inaction.

Residents hadn’t heard from or seen the Governor in their city. Instead, she quietly slipped into town under cover of darkness one night. No public appearances to reassure residents, just a secret visit that didn’t help the situation at all.

It’s also a sad fact that none of the other candidates for Governor visited Benton Harbor to help. There will be other Benton Harbors to deal with, and Michigan residents deserve a Governor who will be proactive – leading, not hiding. That’s what I bring to the table: _**leadership**_.

**$3.9 Billion Lost**

Then there is the $3.9 billion “error” by the Whitmer administration._A report from the Officer of the Auditor General documents that the state paid out “at least” $3.9 billion in unemployment claims to people who were not eligible to receive the payments, according to auditors._

And because it was the state’s mistake, **the money will never be recovered**.

$3.9 billion in taxpayer money lost because of bureaucratic incompetence. The auditors stated that Whitmer’s process allowed “individuals without any prior attachment to the workforce” to collect payments. That’s bureaucratic jargon for people who did not have jobs to begin with.

$3,900,000,000 is a mind-boggling number that most people can’t wrap their heads around. Think of it this way: **3.9 billion seconds is the equivalent of 123.67 years.**

_But to Governor Whitmer and her cronies, $3.9 billion is no big deal – it’s just an “error.” Our tax dollars are just play money to them. And that’s not right._

So how did this “error” happen?

Steve Gray, Unemployment Insurance Agency Director at the time, _warned the Whitmer administration_ of the risk in their plan to push out new benefits rapidly. In a slide deck presentation in April of 2020, Gray stated, “we have a choice between speed and overpayment risk.” The faster money was paid out, the more risk that they would be paying people who weren’t eligible to receive benefits.

The Whitmer administration chose speed over accuracy. The result was a $3.9 billion loss. Director Gray resigned, but _Whitmer bears the ultimate responsibility_.

As her new director stated recently, one of the causes of the error was “shifting nearly our entire staff to remote operations.”

**That’s right, Whitmer’s own administration is now saying the Governor’s forced “work at home” scheme was a cause of this huge error.**

The _U.S. Labor Department warned the Whitmer administration_ in June of 2020 of issues with the criteria Michigan was using. Whitmer ignored those warnings.

The audit also noted that the Unemployment Insurance Agency “continued to include the four unauthorized eligibility criteria on its forms and sent conflicting documentation” to the U.S. Department of Labor.

The UIA now says it has corrected eight of the eleven findings from a January review, but the audit concluded the agency’s efforts were “not effective.” More disturbing, the audit found that there was an inappropriate “tone at the top” regarding internal controls and delays in corrective action.

**The pattern is clear. Whitmer ignored the warnings.
**
Whitmer _ignored the warnings_ in Benton Harbor.

Whitmer _ignored the warning_ of her former UIA director.

Whitmer _ignored the warning_ of the U.S. Department of Labor.

And now Michigan residents pay the price.

It’s time to Dump Whitmer. Michigan deserves better.

Please join my campaign and together let's Dump Whitmer.

[Your generous contribution of $25, $50, $100 or any amount will help us take back Michigan from the radical left.](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=c7b806c5eb&e=0636b97700)

Please make your most generous contribution today, and if you are able, please [volunteer](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=bc133b8aa0&e=0636b97700) to help too!

We need all hands on deck.

Thank you.

Michael Brown
_Conservative for Governor_

clean_body: The pattern is clear. Whitmer ignored the warnings. And now Michigan residents pay the price. | | | | | | | Peter: The gross incompetence of the Whitmer administration has been on full display in recent weeks. From the botched response to the Benton Harbor water crisis to the latest unemployment benefit fiasco, this hasn’t been a good stretch for Governor Whitmer. In Benton Harbor, the Governor ignored the scientific evidence and the pleas of the community. For three years she did virtually nothing to help Benton Harbor residents suffering with overly contaminated water. It wasn’t until a request was filed for intervention by the Environmental Protection Agency that the Governor finally pulled her head out of the sand. She belatedly issued an executive order vowing to replace pipes within 18 months. While that action was necessary and should be applauded, it’s still very troubling why she would wait and delay when the situation was more dangerous than the Flint water crisis several years back. Was it callous disregard for a poorer community in the state, or just blatant incompetence? When I first learned of the water problems in Benton Harbor, I immediately visited the community and volunteered along with local residents to distribute bottled water to the citizens. I talked with those most impacted, and quite frankly, was appalled at the Governor’s inaction. Residents hadn’t heard from or seen the Governor in their city. Instead, she quietly slipped into town under cover of darkness one night. No public appearances to reassure residents, just a secret visit that didn’t help the situation at all. It’s also a sad fact that none of the other candidates for Governor visited Benton Harbor to help. There will be other Benton Harbors to deal with, and Michigan residents deserve a Governor who will be proactive – leading, not hiding. That’s what I bring to the table: leadership. $3.9 Billion Lost Then there is the $3.9 billion “error” by the Whitmer administration.A report from the Officer of the Auditor General documents that the state paid out “at least” $3.9 billion in unemployment claims to people who were not eligible to receive the payments, according to auditors. And because it was the state’s mistake, the money will never be recovered. $3.9 billion in taxpayer money lost because of bureaucratic incompetence. The auditors stated that Whitmer’s process allowed “individuals without any prior attachment to the workforce” to collect payments. That’s bureaucratic jargon for people who did not have jobs to begin with. $3,900,000,000 is a mind-boggling number that most people can’t wrap their heads around. Think of it this way: 3.9 billion seconds is the equivalent of 123.67 years. But to Governor Whitmer and her cronies, $3.9 billion is no big deal – it’s just an “error.” Our tax dollars are just play money to them. And that’s not right. So how did this “error” happen? Steve Gray, Unemployment Insurance Agency Director at the time, warned the Whitmer administration of the risk in their plan to push out new benefits rapidly. In a slide deck presentation in April of 2020, Gray stated, “we have a choice between speed and overpayment risk.” The faster money was paid out, the more risk that they would be paying people who weren’t eligible to receive benefits. The Whitmer administration chose speed over accuracy. The result was a $3.9 billion loss. Director Gray resigned, but Whitmer bears the ultimate responsibility. As her new director stated recently, one of the causes of the error was “shifting nearly our entire staff to remote operations.” That’s right, Whitmer’s own administration is now saying the Governor’s forced “work at home” scheme was a cause of this huge error. The U.S. Labor Department warned the Whitmer administration in June of 2020 of issues with the criteria Michigan was using. Whitmer ignored those warnings. The audit also noted that the Unemployment Insurance Agency “continued to include the four unauthorized eligibility criteria on its forms and sent conflicting documentation” to the U.S. Department of Labor. The UIA now says it has corrected eight of the eleven findings from a January review, but the audit concluded the agency’s efforts were “not effective.” More disturbing, the audit found that there was an inappropriate “tone at the top” regarding internal controls and delays in corrective action. The pattern is clear. Whitmer ignored the warnings. Whitmer ignored the warnings in Benton Harbor. Whitmer ignored the warning of her former UIA director. Whitmer ignored the warning of the U.S. Department of Labor. And now Michigan residents pay the price. It’s time to Dump Whitmer. Michigan deserves better. Please join my campaign and together let's Dump Whitmer. Please make your most generous contribution today, and if you are able, please to help too! We need all hands on deck. Thank you. name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: One dollar, or one cupcake, at a time – we will win 🧁
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38833019/317273914/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk402-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDhkODQyMy0zZDRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=miEVStAmGn8dim_q6gESKJSP3XkjYRR3o8yPyNovxx4=)
Peter: I know that you've heard from me a lot recently about our race to defeat Sen. Grassley (R-IA) – but today I have a special story to tell you and I hope you'll take a moment to read it.
If you know anything about Iowa politics, you know that we take our presidential caucuses – and all the festivities leading up to them – very seriously. So, back in 2019, when I had eight Democratic candidates and hundreds of voters attending my Finkenauer Fish Fry event, there was a bit of pressure, to say the least. People were going to be eager to talk politics – and just as eager to eat.
Thankfully, I come from a family that knows the meaning of hard work – and the importance of showing up for each other when we need it.
So when I asked for my mom's help, she was there. **My mom baked nearly 1,000 cupcakes for our guests – chocolate, pumpkin, red velvet, you name it.** And when she ran out of space to store them in our freezer, she used my dad's pickup truck, the cold weather and some classic Iowan problem-solving to improvise a second freezer to fit them all.
But trust me, 1,000 cupcakes are nothing compared to everything my family has done for me – I wouldn't be where I am today without them. They taught me the value of hard work and the power of a scrappy, passionate team. **That's how I became the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue – and it's how I'm going to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley to become the youngest woman elected to the Senate.**
Listen, the numbers are on our side: Nearly two-thirds of voters here don't want to reelect Sen. Grassley. We can win but only with hardworking people like you who care about flipping this seat blue, fighting for working families and protecting our Senate majority. **[That's why today I'm asking you to make a contribution to my campaign of $5, or whatever you can spare, so that we have the resources to defeat Sen. Grassley, bring new leadership to Iowa and protect our Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38833020/317273917/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk402-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDhkODQyMy0zZDRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=miEVStAmGn8dim_q6gESKJSP3XkjYRR3o8yPyNovxx4=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38833028/317273919/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk402-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDhkODQyMy0zZDRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=miEVStAmGn8dim_q6gESKJSP3XkjYRR3o8yPyNovxx4=)
---
I know that we're going to win this thing – one dollar, or one cupcake, at a time. Thank you for standing with me.

– Abby

name: Morgan Harper
subject: My newest endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
This endorsement means a lot to me.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20211120-405-footer-ak&t=2&akid=405%2E90090%2EcL0c_P)
**I’m so excited to share that I was just endorsed by the Elect Black Women PAC.** This endorsement in particular is so meaningful to me because of how lonely, impossible, and downright intimidating it can be to run for office as a Black woman.
We’ve made huge leaps with diversity in politics, but folks will stay tell me (_to my face sometimes_) that I don’t belong, I can’t do this, and I’ll never win. That attitude is the reason there is not a single Black woman in the United States Senate.
[**_Having the Elect Black Women PAC behind me is another reassurance to me that I belong here._****_We belong here_**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/15436?t=3&akid=405%2E90090%2EcL0c_P)**[. Black women belong in politics. If you’re with me, can you donate $5 today? Now is the best time to contribute to our campaign.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/15436?t=4&akid=405%2E90090%2EcL0c_P) **
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/15442?refcode=em20211120-405&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=405%2E90090%2EcL0c_P)**
**According to the Center for Responsive Politics, Black women candidates raise on average half of what white candidates raise.**
**Yep, that’s right —**** _half_****.**
I’m not the typical candidate running for office in Ohio. I’m young, passionate, and I’m willing to talk about things like cryptocurrency and Big Tech that have a huge effect on our economy. I’m not taking a single dime of super PAC, fossil fuel, or corporate money and that means I’ll have to work even harder as a Black woman to keep up with my corporate-backed opponents. I knew the fight I was getting into and I’m proud of how far we’ve come doing this the right way.
[**_I need your help to power our campaign to Congress. This is a grassroots, people-powered movement and I wouldn’t want it any other way. So what do you say_****, can I count on your $5 contribution today?**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/15436?t=24&akid=405%2E90090%2EcL0c_P)
Thank you,
Morgan
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/15436?t=25&akid=405%2E90090%2EcL0c_P)
Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate in Ohio
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20211120-405-footer&t=26&refcode2=405_90090_cL0c_P&akid=405%2E90090%2EcL0c_P)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=405%2E90090%2EcL0c_P)

I’m not taking a single dime of super PAC, fossil fuel, or corporate money and that means I’ll have to work even harder as a Black woman to keep up with my corporate-backed opponents. I knew the fight I was getting into and I’m proud of how far we’ve come doing this the right way. Thank you, Morgan Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate in Ohio | | Email us: contact@morganharper.org

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: Time sensitive, act fast!
body:
This is all hands on-deck.

|
---
| | | Peter, I really need your help.

My fundraising deadline was yesterday, and I missed the goal by only $5,000... I was crushed when I heard the news.

**But I 've extended it for 30 minutes because I believe in our team and your dedication to our fight to take back the Senate!**

name: Marco Rubio
subject: What we are up against, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
My race in Florida will be the most closely watched race in the entire country.
|
---
| | | | Peter,

My race in Florida will be the most closely watched race in the entire country. Here's a play-by-play of what is going on in the fight for the Senate and for Trump's Legacy:

**In just the past few months:**
* Fox News has said my race could be the most expensive ever.
* CNN continues to move my race up on their list of Top 10 seats most likely to flip.
* The DNC and DCCC outraised their Republican counterparts in July.
* My opponent raised $4.6 million in Quarter 2 while spending over $2.2 million in Facebook ads since the launch of her campaign.
* My opponent raised $8.4 million and I was outraised AGAIN last quarter.

**In the last 24 hours since I last emailed you:**
* My liberal opponent has spent almost $20,000 more on ads.

**And by the time you have read this far into the email: **
* A Democrat has already donated $10 to flip the Senate and reverse everything we built under President Trump.

This is what we are up against, Peter. **[To hold our own against the Democrats, will you donate $10 of your own to fight back against the Left?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58826536:JsL5C42Nb:m:1:3253819041:05B3DA0CB26450930F41F84F46CA00B8:r "To hold our own
against the Democrats, will you donate $10 of your own to fight back against the Left?")**

Peter, thank you for standing with me and having my back every step of the way. But I need you to stand with me once again.

Fox News said my race could be the most expensive ever, CNN said my race was even MORE likely to flip blue, and now my opponent has outraised me. I need each and every patriot who receives this to join me in the fight to take back the Senate.

name: Kat Cammack
subject: ACTION NEEDED: Stop the spending!
body:

body:
Gov. Ron DeSantis is the worst of all the Trump proteges. |

Friend,

Florida has always been a swing state -- but recently, I’ve heard folks say it’s swung too **red** for us to win.

**_They’re wrong._** Florida is a tough state to win, but I’ve done it before, and I can do it again. In fact, recent polls have me neck and neck with Gov. DeSantis! We can beat him -- but we have to do it together.

**Let’s show the doubters that we’re willing to fight for Florida: today, tomorrow, and every day between now and Election Day 2022.

[I need 5,000 grassroots Democrats to show their support for my campaign to defeat Gov. DeSantis and flip Florida blue. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38846303/317276708/311251446?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmNjZTQ5ZS00MDRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sqySZ0OlUYEsI4K5p3gjNXa_WXH7oV1jZmlgU89xp30=&emci=f19c746c-6349-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=9bcce49e-404a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=8807089)**

**Gov. Ron DeSantis is the worst of all the Trump proteges.** He’s failed to lead on the COVID-19 pandemic, signed laws restricting abortion access, suppressed the vote, damaged Florida’s economy with his hyperpartisan actions, and refused to tackle the existential threat of climate change.

If Gov. DeSantis wins reelection and keeps Florida red, Republican governors across America will use him and his horrific record as a template in their own states.

**_We cannot allow that to happen._** **[Please add your name to my petition and publicly show that we need to keep fighting for Florida. Together, we can defeat Gov. Charlie Crist

subject: Gov. DeSantis won’t investigate Florida-based hate groups involved in the Jan. 6th insurrection

Team,

More Florida residents have been charged with crimes related to the January 6th Capitol insurrection than _any other state._

As a Floridian, I'm extremely troubled by that fact. I want to know why so many of our fellow citizens traveled to our nation's capital and sought to violently overturn a democratic election.

However, MAGA Gov. Ron DeSantis doesn't seem troubled at all. Instead, he's _**refusing** _to investigate the Florida-based hate groups involved in this egregious attack on our democracy.

**Floridians deserve answers -- and we deserve far better than our current MAGA governor.** [**Chip in $3 today to help me defeat Gov. DeSantis and restore accountability to Tallahassee. »**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/3449?t=8&akid=691%2E564421%2EGbR1kN) | [CHIP IN $3 TO DEFEAT RON DESANTIS AND HOLD THE INSURRECTIONISTS ACCOUNTABLE »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/3449?t=10&akid=691%2E564421%2EGbR1kN)

The January 6th insurrection was a threat to our democracy, so it was a threat to all of us. It didn’t matter who you voted for in the last election. Your democracy was under attack on that terrible day.

Investigating the insurrection should be a bipartisan matter. After all, the congressional committee examining the events of January 6th is bipartisan!

But MAGA Gov. DeSantis would rather engage in partisan politics and do Donald Trump’s bidding than ensure accountability for insurrectionists. In my view, that’s disqualifying \-- and it’s part of the reason I’m challenging Gov. DeSantis.

name: Aadland For Senate
subject: Reminder: Invasion of Privacy
body:
Democrats cannot stay out of our business
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OUCy7zeh4S_odCW-23lw97NVQ-V0SueMjIBFxwyOFqWeWTEynhyU6zXhpPiLhmirk6oTQDNbQXBIuuJwXaIbHU8tCWiycVKGXoHpOHGzDz5AVse8aVhC7M2U183IJBHwJXxAOE5FsBHt7xGBpG1zXtSkRAI00TDB&c=BdIcZa97NjWHCj4b3DCuWKr2jtiA4AgDCqP0amZAUMCyGqmJbMDiIQ==&ch=hra2ovcsNiuinOJXVryQhEXGeK5QGDATTIYw1Q-w-fcow_nBZzbWQw==)
---
|
---
|
# Taxing more is all Democrats know
---
Democrats cannot stay out of our business. Their goal is to tax, tax, and tax some more, so they can spend it on their pet projects, while laying a heavy burden on people, business and industry. Radical Left Democrats in power demonize prosperity while working to redistribute everyone's wealth but their own.
Unsurprisingly, the newly passed infrastructure bill contains more government invasion into our personal finances. It revises the 1984 tax code to force those involved in transactions who receive more than $10,000 in cash to report personal information about the sender to the IRS. This new rule includes cryptocurrency. This is a complete and Unconstitutional disregard for our right to privacy.
Offenders will face mandatory fines and up to five years in prison.
This is not about protecting you, your wealth, or your children's' future. This is all about control and protecting the power of those in charge. The Democrats are weaponizing the IRS as they attack freedom on all fronts, from colluding with Big Tech to censor free speech, to inhibiting our freedom to assemble, to attacking our right to bear arms. Now they are further attacking our rights to privacy. It seems their end goal is to ensure the government has ultimate power over how you spend your money.
At the same time, their reckless spending is out of control. And remember, they're spending our tax dollars while placing further debt-burden on our children. As spending continues to spiral upward, so does inflation. The government reported consumer prices soared 6.2% in October, the biggest jump in more than three decades. What does that mean? Your paycheck became worth less as the dollar lost value. Milk, gas, bread, toilet paper, and myriad other essentials are costing you more while your take-home pay doesn't go as far as it used to.
And now we are going into winter when home heating will cost up to 50% more than last year (in a country where natural gas is extremely plentiful).
Help me get the government out of your way. In the U.S. Senate I will stand against government oppression. As Ronald Reagan once said, "government is not the solution to our problem, government is the problem."
---
|
---
| |
---

* First, write your current lawmaker opposing this outrageous violation of your privacy.

clean_body: Democrats cannot stay out of our business | | | | == | | Taxing more is all Democrats know Democrats cannot stay out of our business. Their goal is to tax, tax, and tax some more, so they can spend it on their pet projects, while laying a heavy burden on people, business and industry. Radical Left Democrats in power demonize prosperity while working to redistribute everyone's wealth but their own. Unsurprisingly, the newly passed infrastructure bill contains more government invasion into our personal finances. It revises the 1984 tax code to force those involved in transactions who receive more than $10,000 in cash to report personal information about the sender to the IRS. This new rule includes cryptocurrency. This is a complete and Unconstitutional disregard for our right to privacy. Offenders will face mandatory fines and up to five years in prison. This is not about protecting you, your wealth, or your children's' future. This is all about control and protecting the power of those in charge. The Democrats are weaponizing the IRS as they attack freedom on all fronts, from colluding with Big Tech to censor free speech, to inhibiting our freedom to assemble, to attacking our right to bear arms. Now they are further attacking our rights to privacy. It seems their end goal is to ensure the government has ultimate power over how you spend your money. At the same time, their reckless spending is out of control. And remember, they're spending our tax dollars while placing further debt-burden on our children. As spending continues to spiral upward, so does inflation. The government reported consumer prices soared 6.2% in October, the biggest jump in more than three decades. What does that mean? Your paycheck became worth less as the dollar lost value. Milk, gas, bread, toilet paper, and myriad other essentials are costing you more while your take-home pay doesn't go as far as it used to. And now we are going into winter when home heating will cost up to 50% more than last year (in a country where natural gas is extremely plentiful). Help me get the government out of your way. In the U.S. Senate I will stand against government oppression. As Ronald Reagan once said, "government is not the solution to our problem, government is the problem." | | | | | == | | | | I need your help. Please donate to our fight so I can stand for you in the U.S. Senate. A quick donation from you goes a long way. Meanwhile, I'll work to make your donation matter. | == | You can help in two ways: First, write your current lawmaker opposing this outrageous violation of your privacy. Second, help me go to Washington to fight for you, your children and the future of our country. | | == | Together we can stand against the destructive economic policies of a heartless Biden administration. body:
We’re here to hold her accountable to Arizonans, and are making plans to primary her, starting now. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpEnMq3REs_6qpHFEbObeQSeVtQfDWNLS6IBFr9NtQcwPJ0QGpPQ0YAp1NVVI31e57UrG7TPMvqNSYOewsb1ldAk-3MHl4D9Kk5d2WUJ53jXRjAPebStYzjuTZ0LHRAwfsdFUA0zpw2B4h_y0JerVRAkNUCWooqol_Awk4KVNcxzzwKW63RgNZwSNAMAuKNAcwTcXfSVuUxVHI7QVsEdv55HlLPayPNNrEQ14weTkjqB-zU9BV5rU1VTYqWe93YZA9yQvUw3iZWK83wIYAsHaLzy9VoPBZcDQRq790q_h2f4uQ/3h6/8GfGE6oPS1GGQ1001ohpTQ/h0/Kl-wsVs-Si9Gk0-klyLs6SW-eo89-RqXmslHGW3zyxg)
Peter, Early yesterday morning — after an overnight delay — the House of Representatives finally voted to pass the Build Back Better Act, 220-213. _Now, it goes to the U.S. Senate for a vote._ **The Build Back Better Act is a key part of President Biden's agenda, and it is a huge victory for Arizonans.** Now, Senator Sinema must do her part in passing the historic legislation, and stop holding up progress. **[We cannot idly stand by while Sinema continues to obstruct, Peter. That's why we're here to hold her accountable to Arizonans, and are making plans to primary her, starting now. Can you chip in?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSr9qjduFXLjkovQaqhjq82okYaXJc8cH-rBmcj01v2uQAzRnnN6O3GjGepUGKEa11XT9zWc-PaN0uSSNvziYhapieKtEpXgb27I_e1-B0-ammyutMOpSJTXLldZgkbnafW8msd8OQHCRxOcft_I7jhtY5RizVcDtNXDwqYkguX3T_Yj4Ak64xcQTAssZwAxcolvrqvMaUCkV9ogvS5l-hhdNHQmQ8kR1gjeq-nNI3nEVCnrC84Fz-1F_W4sr1n0qK-vYwRXFtqylyf_HZ-HlUDDDHkXNodnxsqOA85GZRcV4kj0BSuhH7YeuBzRP3LvvfkQm9HahcDjnRJgyLNyQpGfkTH8rD6xF1PG5tHEsgWc8/3h6/8GfGE6oPS1GGQ1001ohpTQ/h1/zYheSX3_H_5lKn56r5r-6kXhfqyh6ycKtR1NA8J38rE)** [Contribute $5 »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSr9qjduFXLjkovQaqhjq82okYaXJc8cH-rBmcj01v2uRcj8eWnPT9h6Gqv26jHO-FxMMw2AeKtjED1klu3NYbvmBDkgeVPoXVIgXyAsKkR6SKO0HrLj90APE2Gktb4atphuCaGBOHkoJis4F4b8boTrAd7a61rrfVtUEk_pJCsfuR9naNIEW7zuz78oqjJ4yPSP7M14H2lcU6Rgfd0SZOlw0CCXWwSxMopFkTirNCup6haoln-IwPftZa7vSx66bto6VAqanCcwjWgOOqC4BSXdEYBtJ34tJfdc-e539OTNJXSce9Be11Zz3x_8DMvhIjG_AGjoDekVqBG1JcIPwW5C0oeoPT3f7LXs9Rl_S6PJQ/3h6/8GfGE6oPS1GGQ1001ohpTQ/h2/rwfM7MAG4cwT_J6Uix3I_QgRNbGOMxGbDVudsexmIVE) Since the beginning of this Congress, it seems as if Senator Sinema continues to get in the way of Democrats delivering for the American people. So far, the way she treats the Build Back Better Act is no exception. She advocates for taking out popular policies like paid family leave and prescription drug reform in the bill — ignoring the fact that Arizona Democratic primary voters are far more likely to support a candidate who supports the bill in full, and ignoring the fact that President Biden's agenda is broadly popular in Arizona. **Kyrsten Sinema isn't the right person to represent Arizonans in the Senate — not by a long shot.** But we can't wait until a primary challenger jumps in the race; beating an incumbent Senator is hard, so we need to act NOW to build the infrastructure we'll need to defeat her. **[It's not enough to just hold Sinema accountable to Arizonans; meaningful steps must also be taken in order to build up to a competitive primary challenger, which is why we do the work we do. clean_body: We’re here to hold her accountable to Arizonans, and are making plans to primary her, starting now. | | | Peter, Early yesterday morning — after an overnight delay — the House of Representatives finally voted to pass the Build Back Better Act, 220-213. Now, it goes to the U.S. Senate for a vote. The Build Back Better Act is a key part of President Biden's agenda, and it is a huge victory for Arizonans. Now, Senator Sinema must do her part in passing the historic legislation, and stop holding up progress. Since the beginning of this Congress, it seems as if Senator Sinema continues to get in the way of Democrats delivering for the American people. So far, the way she treats the Build Back Better Act is no exception. She advocates for taking out popular policies like paid family leave and prescription drug reform in the bill — ignoring the fact that Arizona Democratic primary voters are far more likely to support a candidate who supports the bill in full, and ignoring the fact that President Biden's agenda is broadly popular in Arizona. Kyrsten Sinema isn't the right person to represent Arizonans in the Senate — not by a long shot. But we can't wait until a primary challenger jumps in the race; beating an incumbent Senator is hard, so we need to act NOW to build the infrastructure we'll need to defeat her. 100% of your donation today will go towards grassroots groups based in Arizona that are laying the foundation for a successful primary challenge: More soon, Primary Sinema | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC** | | Sent via . name: Team AOC
subject: Our food relief program needs your support this Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Thanksgiving is about giving a hand to those in need.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20211120-2654-header&t=1&akid=2654%2E2526796%2E-bFc_Z)
With less than _one week_ until Thanksgiving, we’re launching a fundraiser today for three food assistance organizations that serve New York families in need.
100% of your donation will go to these three organizations – La Jornada NY Food Pantry, Rap4Bronx, and the Jewish Community Council of Pelham Parkway – to put food on the table for low-income families in the Bronx and Queens this Thanksgiving.
[If you’re able to lend a hand to those in need this holiday, please chip in $6 or whatever you can to help three incredible organizations ramp up their food distribution this Thanksgiving.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211118?refcode=em20211120-2654-P_FND_CHA_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2654_2526796_-bFc_Z&akid=2654%2E2526796%2E-bFc_Z)
**[Contribute to Food Relief →](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211118?refcode=em20211120-2654-P_FND_CHA_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2654_2526796_-bFc_Z&akid=2654%2E2526796%2E-bFc_Z)**
_100% of your donation will go directly to food distribution efforts._
Even before COVID-19, the Bronx had the highest rate of food insecurity in the country – with one in five Bronx residents experiencing food insecurity.1
These three organizations have a proven track record of getting food into the hands of the people who need it most. Here’s a bit more about them:
* **La Jornada NY Food Pantry** is a food pantry service located in the heart of Queens that has delivered hundreds of meals to the immigrant and poor communities of Queens.

* **Relief Access Program for The Bronx**(also known as Rap4Bronx) provides food, prepared meals, and groceries to community members. Last year, they distributed 500 turkeys and 800 pantry bags for Thanksgiving! They’re hoping to exceed these numbers this year.

* **Jewish Community Council of Pelham Parkway** operates the largest food pantry in the East Bronx. They distribute over 1,200 food packages per month which include three meals a day for three days for each member of the household.

Many members of our community continue to face food insecurity, and Team AOC has invested in fundraising efforts and partnerships to support local organizations’ food distribution programs throughout COVID and beyond.
We’ve seen this movement step up to achieve incredible things before. **Together our campaign has raised $7.36 million for mutual aid groups and other relief programs, and we need your help to continue to provide urgent relief to those in need – especially during the holidays.**
[If you are able to donate, please pitch in $6 – or whatever you can afford – and your donation will be automatically split between these three organizations providing direct food relief.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211118?refcode=em20211120-2654-P_FND_CHA_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2654_2526796_-bFc_Z&akid=2654%2E2526796%2E-bFc_Z)
Wishing you and your loved ones a Happy (early) Thanksgiving.
Team AOC
1 - [Hunger Free America](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10141?t=23&akid=2654%2E2526796%2E-bFc_Z)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211118?refcode=em20211120-2654-P_FND_CHA_GOL&t=24&refcode2=2654_2526796_-bFc_Z&akid=2654%2E2526796%2E-bFc_Z)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20211120-2654-P_FND_CHA_GOL&t=25&akid=2654%2E2526796%2E-bFc_Z)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=26&akid=2654%2E2526796%2E-bFc_Z) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=27&akid=2654%2E2526796%2E-bFc_Z) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=28&akid=2654%2E2526796%2E-bFc_Z)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=29&akid=2654%2E2526796%2E-bFc_Z)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=30&akid=2654%2E2526796%2E-bFc_Z)

Friends,

Big game hunting season is here and I couldn’t be more excited.

Hunting is safe, economically important, helps to manage wildlife populations, and promotes family traditions. It also helps foster an understanding and respect for the environment.

As Assemblymen and Co-Chair of the Legislative Sportsmen’s Caucus, I have made it my top priority to ensure New York sportsmen and women that the hunting and fishing traditions of New York are preserved. Our rights are under constant attack in the legislature and I will continue to stand in defense of our long-held traditions. I also am an outspoken advocate for land preservation, water protection, and rehabilitation in my district and across the state.

I will continue to make this my priority when I am elected to the United States House of Representatives in 2022. | [$20.22 ➔](http://links.colinschmitt.com/u/click?_t=2efbf9f7f9b54008ada1569759c619c2&_m=eeae34c0f7274020949798494c0e41a0&_e=b6PNGpi2svbEzFdHb0-YP42LYqnVbgAUKNSxNBdDmXwkUSp4ZPRm0mJUb0bGiq6xtY1vBQoRvwzWW653XJ_lUcNUgUuCc4x8-DSnD6YjCpWZ3YFgTH0ilZytivHlWdCh7QtEgXYzlHLcnzSOp_MnPgQ6hIfhNMbqpukwSPXtqgNlZVclJcHfyAL8CFQ6GqYQsfKokBSDCSQBTZsqpYh5c3qswwPGXczQU98Dlynmm8kHNpXpX-tk20kDfYdOLmzNpX-GKZKUEr8ukeMix1NwnvtG7ECZHuV89bKTxC9FYpg95tEGmSoYPHPNUIq6qeP6fCHw0zHBtdZGMb-EW_RD6hKwWLORORyr7nIaI45NhHVAzQfbkdTNY7pOKl00VcKxnqR2w5dGUAoh1YijALotPqC2tzWBzURessdoUNNlzYCBTxCVcaEDqomSxqUd444qtURWwczZye8QHfEjN0qNyZwWSnRPw2WA3rxmkvaAkYi_sExFw5M3bzMFI-X1ceU5) | | [$50 ➔](http://links.colinschmitt.com/u/click?_t=2efbf9f7f9b54008ada1569759c619c2&_m=eeae34c0f7274020949798494c0e41a0&_e=b6PNGpi2svbEzFdHb0-YP42LYqnVbgAUKNSxNBdDmXwkUSp4ZPRm0mJUb0bGiq6xtY1vBQoRvwzWW653XJ_lUcNUgUuCc4x8-DSnD6YjCpWZ3YFgTH0ilZytivHlWdCh7QtEgXYzlHLcnzSOp_MnPgQ6hIfhNMbqpukwSPXtqgNlZVclJcHfyAL8CFQ6GqYQsfKokBSDCSQBTZsqpYh5c3qswwPGXczQU98Dlynmm8kHNpXpX-tk20kDfYdOLmzNpX-GKZKUEr8ukeMix1NwnjBksNuichIfiUmi5x3TwnCNJCVOOu39fvwl8piqFIQK25pdkho87ai6q3vzbWAvC4JfJ_QAjTMJjLtGHaZZxgy6nEfKjoOQ03jZPlKsQtMk5JXkSwkikY-jarjiuWTONW_cz3j_WFPsfXFbKXX_5nz9eAMwJCxsy-ejDILmmPXvyrrwfQ43MegneaxIe4ws46A1Nhtodq_11LNV57J2EWhekKskhvkyQxSp7G16doqV)

body:
|
