| | [**_I’m sorry to bother you -- but I have 9 hours left to reach my Midnight Goal and I need a hand. You know I don’t reach out unless it’s important, so I’m personally asking: will you chip in $5 to reach my goal and close my campaign’s budget gap? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38850191/317279109/1129282168?refcode=20211120_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=5&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDU0YzVmNy00NDRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ReuX2S3Kyz9IwShqhgWK88KK2aq6Ji5G06IiwCP8at4=)
Getting this campaign off the ground has been hard work. (Worth it, but hard work.) **[Between attending community events to hear from voters all over the district:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38850193/317279111/1129282168?refcode=20211120_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=5&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDU0YzVmNy00NDRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ReuX2S3Kyz9IwShqhgWK88KK2aq6Ji5G06IiwCP8at4=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38850195/317279113/1129282168?refcode=20211120_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=5&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDU0YzVmNy00NDRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ReuX2S3Kyz9IwShqhgWK88KK2aq6Ji5G06IiwCP8at4=) **[And helping my wife, Lauren, care for our two young kids:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38850197/317279115/1129282168?refcode=20211120_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=5&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDU0YzVmNy00NDRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ReuX2S3Kyz9IwShqhgWK88KK2aq6Ji5G06IiwCP8at4=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38850199/317279117/1129282168?refcode=20211120_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=5&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDU0YzVmNy00NDRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ReuX2S3Kyz9IwShqhgWK88KK2aq6Ji5G06IiwCP8at4=) I’ve been working hard everyday to make sure I can flip this seat for Democrats.
And I know you work hard too -- just like my family and others across the country always have.

**[That’s why I don’t like having to ask you for money like this.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38850201/317279119/1129282168?refcode=20211120_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=5&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDU0YzVmNy00NDRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ReuX2S3Kyz9IwShqhgWK88KK2aq6Ji5G06IiwCP8at4=)**

But the hard truth is: building a winning campaign that can reach every voter is not cheap. [**_That’s why I’m humbly asking you to chip in $5, or whatever you can afford, to close my campaign’s budget gap and ensure I have the tools I need to win this important race. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38850202/317279121/1129282168?refcode=20211120_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=5&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDU0YzVmNy00NDRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ReuX2S3Kyz9IwShqhgWK88KK2aq6Ji5G06IiwCP8at4=)

I grew up in a working-class family. I know the struggles everyday people face. That’s why I’m running a different kind of campaign. I want to hear from as many voters as possible and learn how I can work for them in Congress. But that means hiring field staff and coordinating volunteers in every corner of the district. That means keeping our gas tank full and hitting the road to meet folks face-to-face. And that means running ads on TV and radio to make sure every voter knows I’m on the ballot, fighting for them and their families. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: The extreme right is targeting the Squad again
body:
#
Peter,
Earlier this week, the House censured conspiracy-theorist Paul Gosar, after he tweeted an animated video depicting him, a sitting member of congress, committing violence against Alexandria-Ocasio Cortez and attacking President Biden.
Republicans failed to condemn Gosar’s violent video, even criticizing the censure and calling it “unprecedented.” Congresswoman Lauren Boebert went further in defending Gosar, and attacked other members of the squad with hateful and racist statements.
Right-wing extremists are targeting the Squad with violent cartoons and inflammatory rhetoric. Since they were elected, AOC, Ilhan Omar, and other members of the Squad have become a subject of smears from the extreme right, in order to energize the Republican base.
**[For as long as AOC, Ilhan, and other Justice Democrats are fighting for working people in Congress — these hateful and violent attacks will continue. Will you chip in $3 to stand with us and help defend the Squad?**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/84499?refcode=em20211120-20584&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=20584%2E1203867%2EGhYo-K)
**[Contribute $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/84499?refcode=em20211120-20584&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=20584%2E1203867%2EGhYo-K)**
The extreme right, and the Republicans that stand with them, attack AOC, Ilhan, and the rest of the Squad because they know that Justice Democrats in Congress won’t stop fighting for economic equality, climate action, and racial justice.
**[When you contribute $3 to defend the Squad, you send a message to Boebert and Gosar, that our movement can’t be silenced. Can we count on you to make a contribution today?**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/84499?refcode=em20211120-20584&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=20584%2E1203867%2EGhYo-K)
In solidarity,
Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=23&akid=20584%2E1203867%2EGhYo-K) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=24&akid=20584%2E1203867%2EGhYo-K) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211120-20584-footer&t=25&refcode2=20584_1203867_GhYo-K&akid=20584%2E1203867%2EGhYo-K)**
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Friend,

Do you enjoy turkey, stuffing, and yummy Thanksgiving treats?

**I do - but I’m not looking forward to paying for them this year, thanks to Biden’s out-of-control inflation.** | [**SAVE THANKSGIVING**](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=3390b8ce569e44b39b60aeea1938afc2&_e=ujVpMksDhJC17RpYNKLTf851Z2Xcii-B4KHXuB5o_0zoi2cryG2VkCW8ylJxrYgNNJ7rMTkUnTwqyuXJquIzkfS7ZA9JZsqKM-8DBsp-7jW6FaGxWh4DM604-EIqB-VdTngFJdI7pX5ma9u3ViDJGBKqADAaPPk5upcxxZhI5pyKndc8qJyC_DRCVGYUfGQZCGGO1JI2HsdaE7lXImHN7284PREmonzmx8gKkAD9_rV1EVhQFaRVdpD6JQexZ0wRJlTTMQ2vMZf-hkpS0PA26742WlXSP5jsj7q6N_6pseFHLIMvhHxbp2hM9W0bBgJqgElNV5Ylrt96QjCGwZQFyRMeLXzPq0MrkdhoIrLKvGIAr-DpY5GlufXze3ljOgmbaUJ4xQQ37l4Cw1Hbn42DNaWnd5BtUOnM3qE07C2X1q2G0jeked1jSaZo4ATgc8mb58VyNomQ-Nz1ZQ2j4tNXMAGy7p7cRFoIBA29NuQ53q1CgezZmk8PpCo-cn7WU85_)
---

American families are being crippled by inflation at the hands of Joe Biden. The cost of turkey is up by 27% and Americans are slowly becoming unable to celebrate because of the egregious cost.

body:
I’m still looking for 12 more Democrats from your area to respond to this personalized survey
Friend, my Democratic colleagues and I are offering up a bold agenda to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care, put Americans back to work and fully recover from this pandemic.

_But from the GOP?_ I'm seeing nothing but conspiracy theories, obstruction and unmitigated attacks on our democracy that are stripping away voting rights.
---
So here’s the deal: Democrats will keep fighting, and we’ll keep getting things done for the American people. It's going to take your help though, friend.

**I’m still looking for 12 more Democrats from your area to respond to this personalized survey about what issues are most important right now. **Your feedback and input helps me fight GOP obstruction and pass bold legislation that will help everyday Americans.

I still haven't heard from you, so please respond before this survey expires at 11:59 p.m. by using this link: **[survey.valdemings.com/demings-senate-priorities-survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38850482/317279884/1263265566?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1728-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDc2MTM4Ny00NTRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UYBenQcIskKsochph6xMfqMVW_C3c6KWcQxhNvMXXkU=&emci=0b72825c-a148-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=d0761387-454a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=20244100)***

Friend,

Thanks to our Democratic majorities in Congress, as well as President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, Democrats are passing bold legislation that's making a meaningful difference in the lives of Americans. And thanks to the American Rescue Plan, direct stimulus checks went out to the people, small businesses got the help they needed and COVID vaccinations have ramped up big-time.

**I'm more determined than ever to move our country forward and Build Back Better – but as I begin my campaign for Senate, I need to hear from this team __ about what issues are most important. **
I'm running because I never tire of fighting for the issues that matter most. But there's a lot of work to do in the months ahead, and when it comes to acting on what's most urgent, I rely on the input of this grassroots team.
So I have a simple ask for you: complete my custom survey for you and share your feedback directly with me. | | | “As far as political precedent goes, the Republican Party looks set for success in the 2022 midterms. But while signs point to the Democrats losing at least one of the House or Senate, and perhaps both, **there is something perhaps standing in the GOP's way—itself.** ”

_-Newsweek_

Pundits have been declaring that Democratic chances in 2022 are DOA, but there’s one thing many are missing: **the Republican party is a hot mess.**

**$10,000,000** This is how much One Nation, a McConnell-linked super PAC, has pledged to spend in the coming weeks and months as part of the GOP's plan to flip the Senate. Mitch McConnell only needs to flip one seat to take back control, and New Hampshire is at the top of his list. This money will be used on TV, digital, and radio attack ads to rally Republicans' far-right base and smear Maggie's record. And in a swing state like New Hampshire, these tactics could work. **$5** That's how much we're asking you to donate today. It may not seem like much compared to the millions being spent against us. But when everyone gives, it adds up, helping our grassroots campaign stand up to the GOP's deep pockets. What you donate today will help our campaign respond to attack ads and share Maggie's bipartisan accomplishments across the state. It's clear that this will be one of the most competitive Senate races of the cycle. With outside groups like One Nation already pledging millions against us, it's only going to get more expensive. If we're going to keep New Hampshire blue, it's critical that we have the resources necessary to compete with the GOP's fundraising machine. **[So please, anything you're able to give before our weekend fundraising deadline will help us reelect Maggie by building the campaign infrastructure to do it.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38850659/317280970/-1803038125?refcode=e20211120_onenation-b&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGI5NWI1MS00ODRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nQT0XuYdvnGdgiET_K4Qm7uo8jn0q28anmarGCCSVSI=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Chip in $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38850661/317280972/-1803038125?refcode=e20211120_onenation-el-b&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGI5NWI1MS00ODRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nQT0XuYdvnGdgiET_K4Qm7uo8jn0q28anmarGCCSVSI=)

name: Rand Paul
subject: re: these power-hungry bureaucrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
[**FAUCI MUST GO: Chip in now to FIRE FAUCI! **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58826612:69Znu426N:m:1:3253819041:E7A15A5082824E2CFE51F43797147829:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58826612:69Znu426N:m:1:3253819041:E7A15A5082824E2CFE51F43797147829:r) | |
---
Peter,

There's no doubt about it: Anthony Fauci needs to resign.
* _He lied about masks. _
* _He lied about funding gain of function research._
* _And he's never going to tell the truth about the origins of COVID-19._

He's intentionally misled, misinformed, and failed the American people.

But here's the thing: a power-hungry bureaucrat like Fauci is never going to step down on his own accord.

Just look at this recent headline:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58826612:69Znu426N:m:1:3253819041:E7A15A5082824E2CFE51F43797147829:r)
That leaves us one choice, Peter. If Fauci won't step down, he must be FIRED.

**[I AGREE: FIRE FAUCI NOW>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58826612:69Znu426N:m:1:3253819041:E7A15A5082824E2CFE51F43797147829:r) **

We know if the media's favorite doctor had his way, COVID-19 would NEVER be in the rearview mirror.

You can tell by the way he downplays natural immunity, hypes up any "variant" of the virus, and ignores the most recent, effective treatments for Coronavirus.

There's no vaccine, no law, and no regulation that will satisfy Fauci EVER. He won't sacrifice the power if he has a choice. _That 's why he's basically telling us he's NEVER going to step down. _

But I refuse to allow Fauci's chaos to become permanent. I'm calling on the administration to do what is right and FIRE FAUCI NOW.

Will you join my fight by chipping in today?
[**FIRE FAUCI: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58826612:69Znu426N:m:1:3253819041:E7A15A5082824E2CFE51F43797147829:r)
[**FIRE FAUCI: $55**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58826612:69Znu426N:m:1:3253819041:E7A15A5082824E2CFE51F43797147829:r)
[**FIRE FAUCI: $35**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58826612:69Znu426N:m:1:3253819041:E7A15A5082824E2CFE51F43797147829:r)
[**FIRE FAUCI: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58826612:69Znu426N:m:1:3253819041:E7A15A5082824E2CFE51F43797147829:r)
Enough is enough.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

name: Aadland For Senate
subject: Reminder: Biden apologized for America once again
body:
COP26 Leaves America with a black eye
---
| | | | | | Volume 17 | November 17, 2021
---
|
---
| A Word From Erik
---
| | |
---|---
|
The COP26 Summit is over, and American once again suffered an unnecessary black eye as Biden kowtowed to the globalists.

Instead of being a leader on the world stage, Joe Biden once again apologized for America, taking a backseat rather than being a leader, allowing other countries such as China and India to have their way while pledging to reduce carbon emissions to such an extent that it will impact thousands of Colorado jobs and all Coloradans. And in a surprise announcement, the U.S. and China said they would cooperate to limit emissions to address climate change, all while China builds countless coal-fired power plants. Furthermore, do you trust China to live up to any kind of agreement with the US? I don't!

During the COP26 Summit--"Conference of the Parties"--Biden apologized for former President Trump's withdrawal from the Paris Accord, in a speech mocked by a Being-sponsored news agency. Once again, a weak Democrat is prostrating himself and our country, telling world leaders we are "behind the eight ball," and committing to zero emissions by 2050, an unreasonable and devastating goal that other countries simply cannot achieve; not to mention the Left cares not for the destruction that will be reaped upon our economy in the process.

Yet when India balked at phasing out coal mines, the Summit members relented. It seems India gets a pass where the US does not. But make no mistake, coal mines will be shuttered prematurely without sound reason; and if the withdrawal from coal is anything like our withdrawal from Afghanistan, tens of thousands of Coloradans will suffer.

Democrats claim that retraining coal workers to "green" jobs will mitigate the blow to communities in our state that rely on these mines to fuel their economies. But a study by Colorado Mesa University shows that over the long haul, green energy jobs will replace less than 15% of the vacancies left from closing the mines. Furthermore, this push to shut down coal power plants is nonsensical given new clean-coal technologies which capture 99% of emissions.

Who is running the show when it comes to climate change agreements? It seems it is China--who is building hundreds of new coal power plants and mining 80% of the lithium used to make solar batteries--and India.

When making agreements with the world on policy and economy, our leaders must put our country first. American cannot give away its position as a world leader. Unlike Joe Biden and Michael Bennet, I will fight for our country, ensuring we can all affordably heat our homes and power our transportation. I need your help to do this; I simply cannot do it without you.

The U.S. Senate seat in Colorado is winnable, and I have been promised some large-scale donor support, but I need to prove you are with me. To this end, even the smallest donation makes a difference. In the meantime, I'm working round the clock to meet fundraising goals. Please join our cause and stand up with me by donating today.
|
---
| | |
---
| Sebastian Gorka "America First" national radio show
---
| | |
---|---
|
Recently, I discussed several issues such as getting out to vote with Tron Simpson as he filled in for Sebastian Gorka on the nationally known "America First" radio show. You can listen to the discussion here:
| | | [Listen to Erik's appearance on "America First"](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yNOlQKhT-knBZ4ccsr__W4me74rn4PupwIoUpQp9EjvXmYxkQyyR478r5evQ8vb45U7IYWgzH4KD06VSeoZ5l3xVLHpxMMVKXSXNdFTfkdJ3pd2McWotZpHIEspB2_iPgaJV2teQjU_QtN-TKNEkmTHg-JXyf-HWszTwjqeHotOfKMTA6la7zj52y7TkulZ1KXpsx-JTng0xXpChZ5mFEpFwAqGNQzzr3o9v07cWWa5DVJSVJJFw5plnl4jUPjqB&c=g9nvCAQHHQ4rPJINYzvzwFjRulIaZ_aoBTtmmULvnyrqSye1r6eTRQ==&ch=UmbymUWkkTYCvFOSb4Qn2C_DSA_Ja5dEhAWwAGTrVkhGM9UEcbVL7g==)
---
| | |
---
| Campaign Update
---
| |
---|---
|
This past week, I traveled to Morgan, Weld, and El Paso counties to meet the many people who support our cause.

This week, I'll be in Westminster on Friday for a fundraiser, and return to Colorado Springs.

I sincerely hope to see you soon on the trail!
| | |
---
| Can you help?
---
| Erik's effort to represent Colorado in the U.S. Senate is a true grass-roots campaign. There is no family fortune behind this drive. No generations of beer barons, or Fat-Cat donors from California and New York backing our organization.
There's just us...and you. Anything you can spare will help Erik secure the nomination. Please consider a donation today.
Help Erik right this ship! Join the cause and share what you can spare. With our gratitude, Aadland for U.S. Senate Staff.
---
|
---
|
---
| | [Make a Donation](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yNOlQKhT-knBZ4ccsr__W4me74rn4PupwIoUpQp9EjvXmYxkQyyR420GOZgROiK9cTvvQvCNfVouszwViCxOUumKJe2mk8W6OgCUoDW1FjHvivz2l4yIR8XF5piiKhw5VLHvH6ijEHWkOtFRTXR1A3VsGofoqQFF7f8YlYSjFlITG6xqHeXHFJv-IPW60_e9JzZ_sEDS8-OPYHXa4M0x6g7IU_5DsELZ5c_g5zYKnM7_IDpQnQeo0NEFkhkotqSS&c=g9nvCAQHHQ4rPJINYzvzwFjRulIaZ_aoBTtmmULvnyrqSye1r6eTRQ==&ch=UmbymUWkkTYCvFOSb4Qn2C_DSA_Ja5dEhAWwAGTrVkhGM9UEcbVL7g==)

name: Tim Ryan
subject: There are too many millionaires in the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1487%2E3611125%2E_yza6O ][IMG]

Folks --

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6052?t=1007&akid=1487%2E3611125%2E_yza6O ]I need you to chip in $3 to our grassroots campaign today because the
last thing the Senate needs is another millionaire.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6052?t=1008&akid=1487%2E3611125%2E_yza6O ]Donate $3 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6017?t=1009&akid=1487%2E3611125%2E_yza6O ]Donate $25
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6018?t=1010&akid=1487%2E3611125%2E_yza6O ]Donate $50 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6019?t=1011&akid=1487%2E3611125%2E_yza6O ]Donate $100
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6021?t=1012&akid=1487%2E3611125%2E_yza6O ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6017?t=1013&akid=1487%2E3611125%2E_yza6O ]Other Amount

Nearly two-thirds of U.S. Senators are millionaires. Heck, every single
one of my GOP opponents is a millionaire! One even has a private yacht AND
a vacation home in the Bahamas.

How can we expect any of them to look out for working families when
they’re too busy schmoozing with right-wing billionaires and making
backroom deals with special interests?

An out-of-touch, far-right millionaire has no place representing Ohio in
the U.S. Senate. But I have to be honest -- their fortunes put us at a
huge disadvantage.

If we want to make history by flipping Ohio’s open Senate seat blue, we’ll
need a whole lot of people (that means you!) to help us overcome the GOP’s
fundraising machine.

I know $3 might not seem like a lot, but if everyone reading this email
makes a donation, we’ll have the resources for the early investments we
need to win this race. And we’ll have done it the right way -- with
grassroots support.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6052?t=1014&akid=1487%2E3611125%2E_yza6O ]Please, contribute $3 or more to help us flip Ohio blue and stop
Republicans from electing another far-right millionaire. Political
forecasters say we have a real chance at winning this race, but not
without you.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6052?t=1015&akid=1487%2E3611125%2E_yza6O ]Donate $3 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6017?t=1016&akid=1487%2E3611125%2E_yza6O ]Donate $25
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6018?t=1017&akid=1487%2E3611125%2E_yza6O ]Donate $50 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6019?t=1018&akid=1487%2E3611125%2E_yza6O ]Donate $100
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6021?t=1019&akid=1487%2E3611125%2E_yza6O ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6017?t=1020&akid=1487%2E3611125%2E_yza6O ]Other Amount

I’m proud of my working class roots. I was raised by a single mother who
worked her you-know-what off to give us the opportunities she never had.
But today, working folks like my mom are doing everything right and still
can’t make ends meet.

That’s why I’m running to cut workers -- not millionaires -- in on the
deal.

Thanks for your support,

Tim Ryan

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6017?t=1021&akid=1487%2E3611125%2E_yza6O ]Tim headshot

body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvDm21fvmGLhqUe-quR3_x0bPZYqqRmKw-ebpnqlyWdsbb4WUxyyDpjjPMxiSxHH8sy5URFDNUHJjAHhW2jjzImFYYrdDFlC1ti_vMZSrhQ9qedE875i9ZXhPBLpzu3KJvsVQYsFHoZiHxA9nswiCcTTwovLy4pfZmeWTGjT0eT6TUc4kvv6H9_jrkFp673likCZ0EnT4ecrDujuUislf44Mjiv9Zslj_Jbe7Q4NbezEiO4YWQhQWllSWrBVTsTo3C3o6VF5BEXHMnxIdoFcJlLD9zqOSu-htFdII6pt8gzYgYTmFJ2uBdoW6O1pU-IZ_tw/3h6/XA49XiiURMeRlCoLZvvMdw/h0/BV7pT6Rj9zybfIEVi0nmlIz9lXcJ7pw6QyAPpqhWorg) Team, Today is Transgender Day of Remembrance, a day where we can remember all the beautiful souls that were lost at the hands of anti-trans violence. At least 46 trans or gender non-conforming people were killed this year, making 2021 the deadliest year on record for anti-trans violence. Violence against trans people—especially Black trans women—is an epidemic. There are still not even federal protections against discrimination for LGBTQ+ people in law, because the Senate has yet to pass the Equality Act. But it takes more than legislation, we have to fight alongside our trans siblings every day of the year to protect their lives, affirm their rights, and demand an end to the bigotry pervasive across all of society. Today and every day, the least we can do is honor their memory. Tyianna Alexander, Samuel Edmund Damián Valentín, Bianca “Muffin” Bankz, Dominique Jackson, Fifty Bandz, Alexus Braxton, Chyna Carrillo, siblings Jeffrey “JJ” Bright and Jasmine Cannady, Jenna Franks, Diamond Kyree Sanders, Rayanna Pardo, Jaida Peterson, Dominique Lucious, Remy Fennell, Tiara Banks, Natalia Smut, Iris Santos, Tiffany Thomas, Keri Washington, Jahaira DeAlto, Whispering Wind Bear Spirit, Sophie Vásquez, Danika “Danny” Henson, Serenity Hollis, Oliver “Ollie” Taylor, Thomas Hardin, Poe Black, EJ Boykin, Taya Ashton, Shai Vanderpump, Tierramarie Lewis, Miss CoCo, Pooh Johnson, Disaya Monaee, Briana Hamilton, Kiér Laprí Kartier, Mel Groves, Royal Poetical Starz, Zoella “Zoey” Rose Martinez, Jo Acker, Jessi Hart, Rikkey Outumuro, Marquiisha Lawrence, and Jenny De Leon. Sending love today to their friends, families and communities. clean_body: | | | Team, Today is Transgender Day of Remembrance, a day where we can remember all the beautiful souls that were lost at the hands of anti-trans violence. At least 46 trans or gender non-conforming people were killed this year, making 2021 the deadliest year on record for anti-trans violence. Violence against trans people—especially Black trans women—is an epidemic. There are still not even federal protections against discrimination for LGBTQ+ people in law, because the Senate has yet to pass the Equality Act. But it takes more than legislation, we have to fight alongside our trans siblings every day of the year to protect their lives, affirm their rights, and demand an end to the bigotry pervasive across all of society. Today and every day, the least we can do is honor their memory. Tyianna Alexander, Samuel Edmund Damián Valentín, Bianca “Muffin” Bankz, Dominique Jackson, Fifty Bandz, Alexus Braxton, Chyna Carrillo, siblings Jeffrey “JJ” Bright and Jasmine Cannady, Jenna Franks, Diamond Kyree Sanders, Rayanna Pardo, Jaida Peterson, Dominique Lucious, Remy Fennell, Tiara Banks, Natalia Smut, Iris Santos, Tiffany Thomas, Keri Washington, Jahaira DeAlto, Whispering Wind Bear Spirit, Sophie Vásquez, Danika “Danny” Henson, Serenity Hollis, Oliver “Ollie” Taylor, Thomas Hardin, Poe Black, EJ Boykin, Taya Ashton, Shai Vanderpump, Tierramarie Lewis, Miss CoCo, Pooh Johnson, Disaya Monaee, Briana Hamilton, Kiér Laprí Kartier, Mel Groves, Royal Poetical Starz, Zoella “Zoey” Rose Martinez, Jo Acker, Jessi Hart, Rikkey Outumuro, Marquiisha Lawrence, and Jenny De Leon. Sending love today to their friends, families and communities. In solidarity, Kina Collins | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

Friend,

The radical left-led by AOC is attempting to push a multi-trillion dollar Green New Deal through Congress. This bill would radically change America as we know it. At a time when gas prices are at an all-time high, this Green New Deal and the far Left’s agenda will DESTROY our energy industry, our way of life, and our standard of living.

We have to fight back. Right now, brave America First Republicans in Congress are fighting to kill this bill and Save America, but they need reinforcements. Liz Cheney is too focused on fighting with President Trump to stand up for us. She doesn’t fight for Wyoming; she fights against our interests.

I will fight for you.

clean_body: | | | | This will destroy Wyoming Friend, The radical left-led by AOC is attempting to push a multi-trillion dollar Green New Deal through Congress. This bill would radically change America as we know it. At a time when gas prices are at an all-time high, this Green New Deal and the far Left’s agenda will DESTROY our energy industry, our way of life, and our standard of living. We have to fight back. Right now, brave America First Republicans in Congress are fighting to kill this bill and Save America, but they need reinforcements. Liz Cheney is too focused on fighting with President Trump to stand up for us. She doesn’t fight for Wyoming; she fights against our interests. I will fight for you. This moment requires bold leadership. I have demonstrated the ability to fight back against tyrannical government my whole career, and now I am going to Congress to fight for you. For Wyoming, Harriet Hageman | | | |

body:
&n; bsp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?2wf1a--fgxr-4qqlpo6&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

Hello! My name is Sam over at Republican HQ. I have a quick question that I was hoping to get your opinion on. [**Right now my data is incomplete -- could you spare ten seconds to answer this one question?**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2wf1a-1lq88-4qqlpo4/)
As I’m sure you’ve heard, my favorite President -- Donald J. Trump -- is launching a brand new social media app. I’m so excited to sign up! But when I was combing through the thousands of Patriots who pledged to join, **I was disappointed to see your name not on our official list...**
I know you’re busy but could you do me a favor and respond in the next 10 minutes? _I promise to not bug you again! So will you join?_
**[Yes: I Stand With Trump >>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2wf1a-1lq89-4qqlpo5/)**
**[No: I Don’t Support Trump >>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2wf1a-1lq8a-4qqlpo5/)**
President Trump is building his very own platform to stop Big Tech from controlling what we can and can’t see... censoring strong Conservative voices... and blacklisting content they don’t agree with.... _And the Liberals are desperate to stop him._
**Thousands have already signed a petition to BAN his app from the Apple and Google app stores -- they’ll do ANYTHING to stop him.**
President Trump needs to know we have his back.
[**So would you join? I’ll be on the lookout for your answer in 10 minutes from now.**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2wf1a-1lq8b-4qqlpo6/)
Thanks for all you do.
\-- Sam

name: Great America Update
subject: Where should I send this?
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6505%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=yDdn6G5BU2FNdYJ8BODgew&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67147%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=G%2bGfODeV1VdoNh1Xtx1%2fkg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67148%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ffwp3B2y3m4pX7jZmI4t1w&sysid=1)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67149%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4JDw6tgRWYwkvXgtLqPGvw&sysid=1),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67140%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CWd8Et7VdNZEx5WuZx3nwg&sysid=1) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67149%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4JDw6tgRWYwkvXgtLqPGvw&sysid=1)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67141%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fOou7mw7Cz6tD%2b7KTolzVg&sysid=1) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6505%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=yDdn6G5BU2FNdYJ8BODgew&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6505%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=yDdn6G5BU2FNdYJ8BODgew&sysid=1)

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zp4gaqjftgndfrrai2tecs3306vacurjdmh8an2g_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5gmeob1c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z3c9jrevp1dsv15eirg2v1dijd62m5iif8a22sr8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5gmeob1c9h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z25s60akthprknt4cj6v7hj58almj5os42nm9s7o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c5gmeob1c9h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
| This email was sent by: Self-Reliance Central
MATERIAL CONNECTION DISCLOSURE: You should assume that the sender of this email has an affiliate relationship and/or another material connection to the persons or businesses mentioned in this message and may receive commissions from purchases you make on subsequent web sites. You should not rely solely on information contained in this email to evaluate the product or service being endorsed. Always exercise due diligence before purchasing any product or service.

clean_body: Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “The Second World Wars ” on DVD: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | This email was sent by: Self-Reliance Central MATERIAL CONNECTION DISCLOSURE: You should assume that the sender of this email has an affiliate relationship and/or another material connection to the persons or businesses mentioned in this message and may receive commissions from purchases you make on subsequent web sites. You should not rely solely on information contained in this email to evaluate the product or service being endorsed. Always exercise due diligence before purchasing any product or service. name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Our vision for Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
We're building this campaign one $5, $10, and $15 donation at a time.
When Amy and I decided to run for Governor, we did so because we believe it’s the best way for us to do our part to **build a bigger, bolder vision for Texas.**
A Texas that includes all of us — one that is big enough for our dreams and big enough to make them happen. And a Texas that we're proud to pass on to the next generation.
The challenges we face today are the greatest in living memory. Our leaders have stopped listening to the people they were elected to serve, instead choosing to cater to their own political interests and the loudest voices in their party. They've prioritized mean, petty, and extreme fringe policies instead of expanding health care, crushing Covid, getting people back to work, and ensuring our electricity grid doesn’t fail us again this winter.
That's not our vision for Texas. In our vision for Texas, every Texan can afford to see a doctor, has the opportunity to pursue the education and the career of their dreams, and benefits from a government that will never fail its people like it did during the winter storm.
[If you can afford to, please make a contribution today to take part in building this movement for a bigger, bolder vision for Texas.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/49913?refcode=ema20211120-163371&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=163371%2E444211%2ELNjevX)

We're building this campaign one $5, $10, and $15 donation at a time, [so I hope you'll consider making a donation today. When you chip in — no matter the amount — you are helping to build a future that Texans deserve.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/49913?refcode=ema20211120-163371&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=163371%2E444211%2ELNjevX)
Let’s keep up the fight,
Beto

name: Team Kilmer
subject: A president with integrity and empathy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
clean_body: Today is President Biden's birthday, Peter. We're so grateful to have a president who leads our nation with integrity and empathy. President Biden campaigned on a promise to restore the soul of our nation, and he's been leading by example since his inauguration. Just think of how far we've come since President Biden was sworn into office less than a year ago today. With the passage of the American Rescue Plan earlier this year, we've gotten thousands of folks back to work and administered millions of life-saving vaccines. We've also passed numerous pieces of historic legislation -- including the Infrastructure Investment and American Jobs Act. These are accomplishments worth celebrating, and what better day to do so than on President Biden 's birthday?={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}} ={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}} President Biden proposed a big, ambitious agenda when he ran for office. It's clear he's not giving up the fight -- and neither is Derek. Derek is proud to work in partnership with the Biden Administration to deliver even more results to the American people. Derek and President Biden are both committed to building upon the successes of the American Rescue Plan, the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act, and more to keep moving our country forward. And our team is working every day to make sure Derek and President Biden have a strong grassroots team by their side to help get the job done for Americans and our nation's future. ={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}} Thank you, Team Kilmer Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign. ={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&firstname={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&lastname={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&zip={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}} = | = ---|--- Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer People for Derek Kilmer PO Box 1381 Tacoma WA 98402 United States Peter, thank you so much for being a supporter of Derek Kilmer and Democrats up and down the ballot. ={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&firstname={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&lastname={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&zip={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}} Our digital program helps us reach folks with the latest updates. But, if you'd rather not hear from our team, please =.

Dear Friend,
Marylanders know you can't have good government without checks and balances.

You know that one party rule will crush our economic recovery... just like it did before.

**Because if you have one party controlling both the legislature and the governor's office,**_**there is no dialogue and no check on power.**_

**And they will raise your taxes, simply because they can.**

Parents, taxpayers, and small business owners want a governor who will provide balance and responsible government to improve the lives of all Marylanders - not a governor who thinks raising taxes is the solution to our problems.
I will be that governor. Together, we'll cut taxes, grow our economy, and empower parents by expanding educational choice. But I can't do it without your help. [**Will you please consider a contribution of $25, $35, $50, $75, $100, or even $250 to help us make history next year?**](https://u21639199.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=DRhu97MwZOafZz0axKBSuHM4TyUiRDjO7WRT-2Bn4igr193XMreDNS7fl2A4g9SL86i-2FQV5YOPuH0GDsJb-2FO7Exu7Qkr5oJ-2BrH8PIjSt22tmnke98tIPBlaoel8n9GNgVL-t22_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6JJgOPuuW009qy2uZQuV12cN6AdqwAZQbMMihI6Koj9LRVv1gSaAqjDIVdu7Dyt0JK0j-2BFnMAB5mggcxo-2BLPz-2FDYF6h5c0FCf-2Bn8m0E79UDq2OjmECeTeC1AVS3Rse4mERDj-2Fx2Q0bGchFzOTuirkUT-2Fnos2sqYqVeA7BBe64H1ekihkvKAI6cYqUsFw7pVilz0JgW22BBOyt-2FcJKLjNAWndeEIFaAyVmUB3MzLZOsqRvxTiuzNq65GxwPyT9M11pk4liuwa5Kt80qLEBvSTo9g7MZFq9o4tsZ9LRxoetDR0Yzm1sCQ8-2FOEC1n3Zk0cPGffxsrJ0h-2B5dxPBgzqpRkweVsAvFYvxFpYAkm0O5O6V7msIKzei3V9r67JvA6Wu4C7o2squx9kk8YyOHmD6FXoTtzNehwTXGlKmyxr64KjVrlZ73BJYWF7BH-2FcIMqN8hOHu76dpduK4rY-2FGPOZTMahaFgk5mJ4VVRdC4iU-2BrBUafex-2FGu48aifTIOWhrF1jQ059q9vsZPP5YGrum0JwbucpQLaq50a460kRYW8ODqlpWQnyYiJHd1rXOWMbbzq7-2BCm2xNTO603mMGq-2BNlR0rEPdJlG-2F84PCV4ii3I-2FXZJ8l6lApnDcUFkrt7CruY670DHwv0t1IFKdZvXty-2FAKoBVtQhHLk6kJJd0NIBFAumC0vrXecttHj-2BvPwnSApTqGgme0E56uQhQdGtEsOuj9bgAvRTx7-2F1PgvwHrsQl5GvmFSkQHrQrOcXJqZ4PE70D4yrlhDhjbl5p9oTM-2BKposcoyOz0ZKVcaGCEsJYgo8uLY-2FfJAzIT02Ziw-2BWbdRikpRfZ2Acs95Dev1cKXU46pJXUaehkVHoQ2vKGO-2F7G-2FQ8Q9lHU-3D)

clean_body: | | | | Dear Friend, Marylanders know you can't have good government without checks and balances. You know that one party rule will crush our economic recovery... just like it did before. Because if you have one party controlling both the legislature and the governor's office,there is no dialogue and no check on power. And they will raise your taxes, simply because they can. Parents, taxpayers, and small business owners want a governor who will provide balance and responsible government to improve the lives of all Marylanders - not a governor who thinks raising taxes is the solution to our problems. I will be that governor. Together, we'll cut taxes, grow our economy, and empower parents by expanding educational choice. But I can't do it without your help. One party rule is bad for your family, and it's bad for Maryland. Join my team today to provide balance and create prosperity for all Marylanders. Thank you, Kelly Schulz | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | instagram.com/kellymschulz "Instagram" ---|---|--- Kelly Schulz P.O. Box 6528, Annapolis, MD 21401 Authority: Kelly Schulz for Governor, Inc. Treasurer: Sam Malhotra

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Take action to protect Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=uPqD1rrtSzqVn%2Fhs6qPMHo%2B4OQ04ODsd&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
The Supreme Court recently heard oral arguments from those challenging Texas' abortion ban, including from our own Department of Justice.
But while the conservative-majority Court is deciding whether to allow the most restrictive abortion ban in the country to be challenged, Texas women are being forced to travel out of state for abortion care. Those who don't have the resources to do so are being forced to carry their pregnancies - even in cases of rape or incest.
We cannot wait for the Supreme Court to act. This draconian law is putting far too many women at risk right now, with each passing day, each passing hour. As Justice Sonia Sotomayor said, **" Every day the Court fails to grant relief is devastating, both for individual women and for our constitutional system as a whole."**
Just recently, the House of Representatives passed its companion legislation to my bill, the Women's Health Protection Act. This legislation would guarantee a woman's right to make her own reproductive healthcare decisions. It would stop right-wing, extremist attempts to undermine the rule of law and legal precedent, as Texas Republicans have attempted to do. **I am calling on this team to help me pass this lifesaving bill through the Senate.**
Friend, the Women's Health Protection Act would enshrine a woman's right to access abortion services at the federal level and ensure it is safeguarded in all situations. That is what the majority of Americans want, and it is what our system of law demands. **But we need to pick up grassroots momentum massively to ensure this legislation is passed in the Senate.[Please, will you sign on now if you believe the Senate should enshrine abortion rights into law?](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-WHPA-SCOTUS?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1095-su-nd)**
[ ADD YOUR NAME >>>](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-WHPA-SCOTUS?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1095-su-nd)
We know all too well the reality of this moment, Friend: Donald Trump cemented an ideologically extreme conservative majority on the Supreme Court - pre-selecting and then appointing justices with a proven track record of being hostile to _Roe v. Wade_. If the court upholds abortion bans in Texas and other states like Mississippi, a woman's right to choose could disappear overnight in America.
That's why we must take legislative action that will protect women's healthcare decisions no matter what - and with the Supreme Court issuing decisions in a matter of weeks, it needs to happen this instant.
**I 'm still 650 grassroots signatures short of my goal, so I'm counting on you to speak up: [Urge the Senate to enshrine a woman's right to choose into federal law by passing the Women's Health Protection Act.](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-WHPA-SCOTUS?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1095-su-nd)**
Thank you,
Dick
[ Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1095-su-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=U257D9OsPYabuvOsEPiaSI%2B4OQ04ODsd&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: Wendy Rittenhouse
subject: NOT GUILTY.
body:
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6503%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=b%2fRx4t5q6ltJOH0Aj0DasA&sysid=1)
| | | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67144%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ny8oOtGl9FiR6skIeaqGSg&sysid=1)
---
|
---
Friend,

**Kyle was just ACQUITTED and is now officially FREE!**

This was a victory for the truth, for justice, and for every American's God-given and unalienable right of self-defense.

We are so overcome with emotion, and as hard as that was, we are thankful.

We are thankful for the millions of Americans who stood with Kyle from the start.

We are thankful for the many others who watched the trial with an open mind, realized that they had been lied to for a year and a half, and spoke out.

And we are thankful to the jury which put aside bias, considered the facts, and came to the right decision.

Now, we will try to return to something that resembles a normal life - **however that requires one more major push to settle our case-related debts and pay off what we hope will be our final legal bills.**

**[So please, take all that positive energy I know you're feeling and make an urgent donation to help us close this very ugly chapter in our lives.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67255%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aS84GPRJIkpg0TCM02coyw&sysid=1)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67257%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2YElNAcWYH1tANWZa6zV%2fA&sysid=1)
|
---
Any funds left over will be transferred into Kyle's scholarship fund so that he'll be able to graduate from college debt-free.

You'll be hearing from us again, but for now, and from the bottom of our hearts - thank you. Thank you. Thank you.

With love,

Wendy Rittenhouse
|
---

subject: Biden's Trojan horse ➡️

Folks, the pandemic has changed the world as we know it. But what will _never _change: **Our inalienable American rights.**

**Unfortunately:** Liberals _never_ let a crisis go to waste. State Democrats and the Biden Administration have used this crisis as a TROJAN HORSE to _trample_ our rights, and as a means to turn America into a socialist country.

**Fortunately: State Republicans are taking matters into our own hands.**

name: Team Schmidt
subject: Big weeks!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
It’s been yet another great past few weeks for our campaign. Not only have the last few weeks kept Derek busy with big wins and more lawsuits pushing Friend, **It’s been yet another great past few weeks for our campaign.** Not only have the last few weeks kept Derek busy with big wins and more lawsuits pushing back against the overreaching Biden administration, but we saw even more rock-solid conservatives join Team Schmidt too. [**If you’re ready to join them, too, sign your name to show Derek that you’re on our team! **](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=4aacf958a3be4812981e70d4364f6665&_e=d_Noe9pIxnd3kfiLEQVehjOzHrEVSfJwJgb51vjmFDJbXGwcqay7F_e5WhXGcgnrbZD7LB-9AbvWF06goqQ1BxN6FWV36u2QUe569Er_rid3S_QUm3Y8-cIH3Pw_IXiWmqgzTXEEKn89kh1J3G4Wbvuu4SEH2vHU3uqTVFdlP05tmgoYuOqMp3Iw4vZHB3Qcc96ThdBsD2k-DN9q6G-MGIHPjxqQwH2lAgJ60QrTAX7e4FFvVIElYbjkHoAQPH7d-SbocY70PT0OefoCs4_0zgr3pyMf3G-n2e56msOAcgsv-vxxjzvxpBaKIfmKpRBqiCduVXClxrtmaCIufOAZQPu0TjziRgEZwzCjTu5mskdpQLEttswHynMOpEFnfA9EmJCW1Jbrz2wmXAgDc-OxtVBIDfYRGaB_TdkC6D4f2psBs4WCrSIE8CSgNUbGnP2RG3xP1eFUh43fhnB7dgVb0r652dsiVKf38JkTUCDX7Lk%3D) Check out some of what each endorser had to say about Derek: _"Derek Schmidt has proven time and again that he is the leader we need in Kansas right now. He's never backed down from an important fight, and he knows what it takes to win - he's got the record that shows it. We are lucky to have him serving as our attorney general now as he takes the fight to Joe Biden over these terrible vaccine mandates, after spending the last year and a half successfully defending our liberties from our current governor's mandates and lockdowns. I'm confident Derek will get our state back on the right track as our governor and be the leader all Kansans are proud of."_ **_Former Kansas Republican National Committeeman Stephen R. Cloud_**

_“Derek Schmidt is a true defender of our freedoms. He’s fought every step of the way to ensure that Kansans are the ones who make decisions that most impact our lives, not bureaucrats. He’s especially always concerned with how our public policy will impact rural Kansans. We desperately need his leadership in the governor’s office and I’m proud to support him in this race. I would encourage all Kansans to join me.”_ **_State Senator Ron Ryckman Sr._**

_“Derek Schmidt has my support for Kansas Governor. Over the past ten years as Attorney General, Derek has shown his proven leadership of working with Law Enforcement and taking a proactive stance to protect our Constitutional Freedoms and Values for the citizens of our great State of Kansas!”_ **_Miami County Sheriff Frank Kelly_**

_"I've worked closely with Derek Schmidt throughout his tenure as our state's attorney general and he's always done an excellent job for the people of Kansas. He has the experience, the knowledge of the issues, and the conservative values our state needs in its next governor. He will provide the support for law enforcement so we can ensure Kansas remains a great place to live and raise a family. He has my full support for governor."_ **_Sedgwick County Sheriff Jeff Easter_**

_"Derek Schmidt is the right person for the job in the governor's race. I know that Derek WON'T veto a sales tax cut on food like Governor Kelly did in 2019. He will listen to Kansans instead of following New York's lead on pandemic response like Governor Kelly has done. He won't close down a youth mental health facility in Hays or reduce funding for intellectually and developmentally disabled Kansans, both of which Governor Kelly has done. He will lead with Kansas values and with the people of our state at the top of his mind. I'm proud to endorse him today."_ **_State Senator Rick Billinger_**

It’s clear that Kansans overwhelmingly support Derek Schmidt to be our next Governor, but now we need every single Kansas Patriot to join us in our fight against the Far-Left mega donors bankrolling Laura Kelly’s campaign. **[Will you join Derek on Team Schmidt today?](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=4aacf958a3be4812981e70d4364f6665&_e=d_Noe9pIxnd3kfiLEQVehjOzHrEVSfJwJgb51vjmFDJbXGwcqay7F_e5WhXGcgnrbZD7LB-9AbvWF06goqQ1BxN6FWV36u2QUe569Er_rid3S_QUm3Y8-cIH3Pw_IXiWmqgzTXEEKn89kh1J3G4Wbvuu4SEH2vHU3uqTVFdlP05tmgoYuOqMp3Iw4vZHB3Qcc96ThdBsD2k-DN9q6G-MGIHPjxqQwH2lAgJ60QrTAX7e4FFvVIElYbjkHoAQPH7d1AfLZwQC9FCRDeExs9EseMobxBZmVoYLIMXm4Rp1262TPHITTbik8lWMeRDLwQnzBFBPslkvM0GzAvcJqjlamc6Ac9EZgIwDRxfbLq27Ew3vbVFY4IUARQcQw0lfCVReFQf6J75bMF1m-wvd6hb8JCQ8jlxehmqo3LzVlOms1_F74rtAnGLKCr5M3JChRx6DleDFKv2NSHku1uvNNGn2nVVPGo8Zc4-bMGtWvbm2as4%3D)** [**WIN WITH DEREK**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=4aacf958a3be4812981e70d4364f6665&_e=d_Noe9pIxnd3kfiLEQVehjOzHrEVSfJwJgb51vjmFDJbXGwcqay7F_e5WhXGcgnrbZD7LB-9AbvWF06goqQ1BxN6FWV36u2QUe569Er_rid3S_QUm3Y8-cIH3Pw_IXiWmqgzTXEEKn89kh1J3G4Wbvuu4SEH2vHU3uqTVFdlP05tmgoYuOqMp3Iw4vZHB3Qcc96ThdBsD2k-DN9q6G-MGIHPjxqQwH2lAgJ60QrTAX7e4FFvVIElYbjkHoAQPH7dTzZ_ataRlJbMlAjvCTyR00rIlS8cYBFI7k_OCWuCUepQVn6d2SwxQSUKqrzC0n77_5brA2Ma1dNhLGwbX5ASQKxw9brqgOIlHPS2XE5t-PM1lkrPbOj2wssAl5msqxd3NwU1cA9laVgo_9ltngELnN6czn2Vlg2ih-LMX_AXZ9dfrjNQI3PjWoZyejZ4kkiis2drG4N6bqfqqUvI4SqikmKClcZDhZ9sGsGNgdVM1Ek%3D) Thanks, Team Schmidt | |
---
PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC.,
KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER.

State Senator Rick Billinger It’s clear that Kansans overwhelmingly support Derek Schmidt to be our next Governor, but now we need every single Kansas Patriot to join us in our fight against the Far-Left mega donors bankrolling Laura Kelly’s campaign. Thanks, Team Schmidt | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER. | | | ---|---|---

name: Peter Ambler
subject: Rittenhouse verdict
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
A 17-year-old arming himself with an AR-15 makes no one safer.
#

Friends,
Yesterday, Kyle Rittenhouse — who had been charged with five felonies, including shooting and killing two people, and injuring another — was found not guilty.
This verdict is a perversion of justice. Our nation is built on laws—not vigilantism. Murder, racism, and hate-fueled violence should be condemned, not celebrated. Too often, our legal system protects the right of white Americans to take the lives of others, especially people of color. Kyle Rittenhouse wielded his whiteness as a shield and his AR-15 as a weapon in the streets of Kenosha, where police officers thanked the self-styled militia members, including Rittenhouse, and let him walk away after killing two people.
Rittenhouse also benefited from our country’s weak gun laws. The gun lobby argues that everyone will be safer if we all arm ourselves, but this extremist idea is neither supported by most Americans nor any evidence.
As the tragic events on that night in August showed, a 17-year-old arming himself with an AR-15 makes no one safer. Rather than roll back gun safety laws, as the gun lobby is pushing the Supreme Court to do, we must strengthen gun laws that protect us all. Laws like minimum age requirements and assault weapon regulations don’t infringe on the Second Amendment—they’re commonsense protections. At the same time, extreme Stand Your Ground laws that encourage people to shoot first and ask questions later must be repealed.
Yesterday’s verdict sends a troubling message that will encourage further vigilante violence and murder. That is not a society in which we are safe or free. Rather than accept this version of America, we recommit to doing everything in our power to make this country safer.
I hope you are with us for all the battles to come.
All my best,
Peter Ambler
Executive Director
**Will you make a $3 donation to Giffords to support our work? Your donation will be put immediately to work in a campaign to pass universal background checks, keep guns out of the hands of people who shouldn’t have them, and keep our communities safe.**
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-nov21?refcode=em211120-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1221_3935704_z2FSoD&akid=1221%2E3935704%2Ez2FSoD)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=1221%2E3935704%2Ez2FSoD) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Brent Bozell
subject: The media is STILL lying about Kyle Rittenhouse
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58827480:JoNZo42cN:m:1:3253819041:EFCB81C1E67752F7DFB7951538C7521B:r)
Peter,

The liberal media is attacking the Rittenhouse trial with everything they have:

* The liberal liars at MSNBC are calling the judge a white supremacist.

* The liberal liars at CNN had one of Rittenhouse's attackers on Anderson Cooper, telling a different story than what he testified at the trial.

* The liberal liars continue to paint Kyle as racist and evil despite any evidence.

**The attacks on truthful reporting have escalated as the liberal bias in the media is being exposed more than ever before. **

Let me tell you how my organization, the Media Research Center (MRC) is defeating the liberal liars in the media. We are the only organization solely dedicated to exposing media bias.

_When the MRC was founded in 1987 over 75% of Americans trusted the liberal bias in the media ... now 90% DO NOT trust the Fake News media_.

[**I am asking for your urgent support today to help us expose the lies being told in the Rittenhouse trial. Can you click here to donate $10, $35, $50, or more?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58827480:JoNZo42cN:m:1:3253819041:EFCB81C1E67752F7DFB7951538C7521B:r)

Here is how the Media Research Center is TAKING DOWN the Fake News media:

* MRC records all Fake News media outlets to identify lies, half-truths, and lies of omission. In fact, we have over 800,000 hours of recorded video and audio from TV, radio, and podcasts.

* We use this content to expose the truth and show everyday Americans how the Fake News media is using their influence to enact socialism, advocate for Critical Race Theory, and sabotage conservatives.

* MRC is combatting online censorship by building MASSIVE social media pages to distribute the truth. I am proud to report MRC's social media team has several MILLION followers and we reach millions of Americans each week with our message.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58827480:JoNZo42cN:m:1:3253819041:EFCB81C1E67752F7DFB7951538C7521B:r)

Americans are waking up to the bias. Trust in the media is at an all time low. It's in large part due to our work.

But MRC does not have woke corporations supporting us. We rely 100% on Americans who believe in American values of truth over the media.

**I am reaching out to you to help us raise $25,000 online to expand our operations. **

[**Please send an urgent donation today to MRC and support our work.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58827480:JoNZo42cN:m:1:3253819041:EFCB81C1E67752F7DFB7951538C7521B:r)

Believe in America, not the media.

We are winning this battle for truth in reporting. But as we expose the media, their attacks increase. Your support can help us fight back.

Brent Bozell

name: Tim Ryan
subject: Ohio is winnable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcy Kaptur for Congress
body:
Protecting our Democratic Senate majority is not enough. If we want to stop Mitch McConnell from abusing the filibuster, we must expand our Senate majority. And flipping Ohio’s open Senate seat is our best chance to do just that. |
Protecting our Democratic Senate majority is not enough. If we want to stop Mitch McConnell from abusing the filibuster, we must expand our Senate majority. And flipping Ohio’s open Senate seat is our best chance to do just that. Marcy Kaptur | |
---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yrPlz6FFtVqmSIaDtydOaNPFe_FLO4bFaBK0Rd1lMWfT08EElPukhFfQsPDQKmUHLdUrCU9qUvAD1Umxk-latIJybHlKC-T-d90ZiZX3R1G9gF0ebtw_pRIhk6DQ46LUaybZLGVeaG90zvlEy6q8D70zKjpmQHSgx1TrJ67UvZ3kjvYBZ8CvFaAiv10zXdrvRYFXWz5gtGmzbGMgNbVKvnxIJBLOLhtx84E8zMC0rBA_0vqvOuGrkBuur4D2n_I14wKfdubGCMZOrHplE3L0buMekqr4KApH_xxxhZg0Dbi7sIwcBiRY_V2JN_JhE7SVkOItgv3NUHY1XSs4EQBVrSUL5YuJ03Jxt1FdM6u8CBEk_BQs0o0gLgRuEr2uvlyB4/3h6/iSib9H5NTviHicMA8a6Qjg/h0/PTuf9f4h4GiiHGnxkR75Elj8xv7LFgBq6trDYHolF2c)

| | Hello,
In a minute, I’ll ask you to split a critical donation between our friend Marcy Kaptur and my campaign to flip Ohio’s open Senate seat blue. **But first, let me explain why this race — and your donation — are so important today.**

Protecting our Democratic Senate majority is not enough. If we want to stop Mitch McConnell from abusing the filibuster, we must expand our Senate majority. And flipping Ohio’s open Senate seat is our best chance to do just that.

**A new poll shows this race in a dead heat. Now, all we need is you.**

[**Whether or not we can flip this seat depends on you. We need the resources right now — not next year — to build the team it’ll take to win. Will you split a donation of $10 or more to help us flip Ohio blue and expand the Democratic Senate majority?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yrPlz6FFtVqmSIaDtydOaNPFe_FLO4bFaBK0Rd1lMWfT08EElPukhFfQsPDQKmUHLdUrCU9qUvAD1Umxk-latIJybHlKC-T-d90ZiZX3R1GwsQh_Tidxc0eTVj7oL6NyZ03PKxbBxYrQcky039_9OO0G0g1PJMc7XkncyKPvMBf2Xe11ZL74qlR9oSd1hs1TKkF-m6Tcfmgmg82PYO_cZuYPyJs2QOIVpsfZrmnrt9PbrleD9xIKQzPQfHx0nliWGEopcYBQ_R2Np0ejDwAkIjo1tfDvUAdVzo-gdjqguDCeWDNkNBrbvhnRMbhVhuTjdKkQ7ujkafsM4C-yTQKd2ezCvEQpP6T4YhcE9fNSYMOlMYTdmI8i9dtrO9c7ZT56FG_rTJgTif6K8UsaIMM6qa/3h6/iSib9H5NTviHicMA8a6Qjg/h1/qv0W26Y17w1x5A6KGsNvknevGClYVOuGSFDloDtnIxU)

| [**DONATE »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yrPlz6FFtVqmSIaDtydOaNPFe_FLO4bFaBK0Rd1lMWfT08EElPukhFfQsPDQKmUHLdUrCU9qUvAD1Umxk-latIJybHlKC-T-d90ZiZX3R1G-JK3HFjppsnFBV-y7NQSrwm2ByTlneHcW4JAR1F090JeyHRF-WmIlBO-mqXfB9P8WSVR40BZ0or3MUygFAkkJyG7vwaMAQcjLojrIvaEPoBjXF1sb8_RhCnbl4kD2xOVZSf72aPFccRJFuicOVRYbDM4cs7igp0zqixkX2en7BgzL-_OF8vTkT2AMuKv9DWUfg05gPqnbZ2ZveqpvOeuEG8FSDh0kxVxlw6gOc7CfxtnMPjempFUWXKv6qd9I8ySszfsD99DiLSu2QhAZLbO73lsxNok2XQYxnHfasz1EVWqIPGresZTMLbI85E2AWbvA/3h6/iSib9H5NTviHicMA8a6Qjg/h2/WMtaSrpIhol2R4xa0tj-506iCyfIUOIVLG_gqk1ENT8)
---

Donald Trump has made this race his top target. That’s why he attacked me during his first rally since losing the election. **It’s clear we’ve got the GOP running scared.**

All of my GOP opponents are multi-millionaires. Billionaire tech giant Peter Thiel has propped up JD Vance with a $10 million super PAC. And Josh Mandel is a dangerous Trump-wannabe with his own share of Twitter rants.

Me? I’ve been on picket lines and in union halls my whole life. I’m still paying off my family’s student loans and mortgage. I’m fighting like hell to get workers the break they deserve — not prop up the friends and right-wing special interests.

**Folks,I believe we can win this race. CNN ranks us as one of the most likely seats to flip. But this is on track to be one of the most competitive and expensive races of 2022. So, I’m turning to you:**

clean_body: Protecting our Democratic Senate majority is not enough. If we want to stop Mitch McConnell from abusing the filibuster, we must expand our Senate majority. And flipping Ohio’s open Senate seat is our best chance to do just that. | Protecting our Democratic Senate majority is not enough. If we want to stop Mitch McConnell from abusing the filibuster, we must expand our Senate majority. And flipping Ohio’s open Senate seat is our best chance to do just that. Marcy Kaptur | | | | Hello, In a minute, I’ll ask you to split a critical donation between our friend Marcy Kaptur and my campaign to flip Ohio’s open Senate seat blue. But first, let me explain why this race — and your donation — are so important today. Protecting our Democratic Senate majority is not enough. If we want to stop Mitch McConnell from abusing the filibuster, we must expand our Senate majority. And flipping Ohio’s open Senate seat is our best chance to do just that. A new poll shows this race in a dead heat. Now, all we need is you. | Donald Trump has made this race his top target. That’s why he attacked me during his first rally since losing the election. It’s clear we’ve got the GOP running scared. All of my GOP opponents are multi-millionaires. Billionaire tech giant Peter Thiel has propped up JD Vance with a $10 million super PAC. And Josh Mandel is a dangerous Trump-wannabe with his own share of Twitter rants. Me? I’ve been on picket lines and in union halls my whole life. I’m still paying off my family’s student loans and mortgage. I’m fighting like hell to get workers the break they deserve — not prop up the friends and right-wing special interests. Folks,I believe we can win this race. CNN ranks us as one of the most likely seats to flip. But this is on track to be one of the most competitive and expensive races of 2022. So, I’m turning to you: Let’s do this, — Tim | | Paid for by Marcy Kaptur for Congress Checks may be mailed to: P.O. Box 899, Toledo, OH 43697, United States | | | | Sent via . Peter,
---
It seems like yesterday that we shocked the world by winning this race in a district that the media called “likely Democratic”.
---
_**But there’s less than a year until election day 2022, and we’re kicking things into high gear to defend my MUST-WIN congressional seat from Nancy Pelosi.**_
---
I won't lie to you, Peter -- we’re in for a tough fight. Nancy Pelosi’s DCCC has named me as one of her top targets, and Pelosi is determined to avenge her defeat last year.
---
_But we have one thing Pelosi never will: An army of loyal grassroots supporters who are willing to step up and support us when we need it most._
---

clean_body: We’re in for a tough fight. | Peter, It seems like yesterday that we shocked the world by winning this race in a district that the media called “likely Democratic”. But there’s less than a year until election day 2022, and we’re kicking things into high gear to defend my MUST-WIN congressional seat from Nancy Pelosi. I won't lie to you, Peter -- we’re in for a tough fight. Nancy Pelosi’s DCCC has named me as one of her top targets, and Pelosi is determined to avenge her defeat last year. But we have one thing Pelosi never will: An army of loyal grassroots supporters who are willing to step up and support us when we need it most. This upcoming election will be the most important election in American history. Our very way of life is one the line. If we don’t take back the House, the Democrats will radically transform our country into a socialist welfare state like communist Cuba. They’ll open our borders, defund our police, and pass partisan legislation that opens the door to large scale voter fraud. They’ll indoctrinate our children with “woke” ideas like critical race theory and strip away our constitutional rights. The country we know and love will cease to exist. But with your help, we can WIN this race, take back the House from Nancy Pelosi, and ensure America remains the greatest country in the world. Thank you, Maria Elvira Salazar Florida's 27th Congressional District Paid for by Salazar for Congress P.O. Box 431332, Miami, FL 33243

**AND WE CAME TO YOU on Thursday...**
[AND NOW, we’re coming to you ONE LAST TIME to ask you to sign President Joe Biden’s birthday card »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Biden_Birthday/?refcode=VPP_20211121_EMCARD_E2_T0_NS&t=6&akid=943%2E878179%2EXNbprV) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Biden_Birthday/?refcode=VPP_20211121_EMCARD_E2_T0_NS&t=7&akid=943%2E878179%2EXNbprV) | [CLICK HERE TO ADD YOUR NAME BEFORE 6 P.M.](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Biden_Birthday/?refcode=VPP_20211121_EMCARD_E2_T0_NS&t=8&akid=943%2E878179%2EXNbprV)

TODAY is Joe Biden’s first ever birthday as President of the United States!

From responding to the pandemic to finally passing his iconic infrastructure bill, _President Biden has hit the ground running since DAY ONE._

He has done so much for us since he took office — **_and we’re SO thankful!_**

That’s why we need YOU to sign his birthday card and ensure it is his BEST birthday yet! [DON’T WAIT, WE’RE SENDING THE CARD AT 6 P.M. »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Biden_Birthday/?refcode=VPP_20211121_EMCARD_E2_T0_NS&t=9&akid=943%2E878179%2EXNbprV)

---
Thank you,

_VPP_

name: John Fetterman
subject: They're calling it "Strikesgiving" ✊
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Across PA and the country, workers are standing up for themselves. I’m proud to support them.
#
Derek,
I wanted to take a quick moment today to talk to you about the brave workers in Pennsylvania and across the country who have, over the last few months and weeks, decided to stand up and say: _Enough_.
Enough working for pitiful wages in a pandemic. Enough from corporate executives that are seeing massive profits without giving workers their rightful share.
**Strikes are popping up in every corner of America, but especially here in PA. From cereal plant workers to iron workers to teachers, members are showing the true power of unions.**
I was lucky enough to spend some time with some of these workers. Take a look:
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37467?refcode=em20211120-3537&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3537%2E434096%2EpuU_O9)
_On the line with Kellogg factory workers in Lancaster, PA._
In mid-October, my team and I lent a hand on the picket line to the Kellogg’s factory workers on strike. These workers labored through the pandemic, and are just asking for fair pay and safe conditions.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37467?refcode=em20211120-3537&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3537%2E434096%2EpuU_O9)
_Meeting with the Ironworkers local on strike in Erie, PA on Halloween._
The Ironworkers at Erie Strayer have been on strike since October 4. They’ve been without a contract since April 1, and are just asking for a buck-and-a-half raise over three years.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37467?refcode=em20211120-3537&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3537%2E434096%2EpuU_O9)
_Scranton Federation of Teachers Local 1147 in Scranton, PA._
Then, I spent some time in Scranton with the local teachers who have been without a contract for *five* years, and have gone without health care since their strike began. They need a fair contract so that they can get back to doing what they do best: Teaching + caring for Scranton’s school kids.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37467?refcode=em20211120-3537&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3537%2E434096%2EpuU_O9)
Days later, we welcomed them to Harrisburg to rally for their health care and a fair contract. I was beyond honored to have them.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37467?refcode=em20211120-3537&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=3537%2E434096%2EpuU_O9)
_Kutztown University of PA Food Service Workers in Kutztown, PA._
Just this week, I joined the food service workers at Kutztown University of PA, who are the *only* food service workers in PA’s system of higher education not to have a union. It’s time for no more outliers, and to give these workers the representation they deserve.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37467?refcode=em20211120-3537&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=3537%2E434096%2EpuU_O9)
_UPMC Health care workers in Pittsburgh, PA._
And finally, I joined striking health care workers from the University of Pittsburgh Medical Center, right at home in Pittsburgh. UPMC is the *largest* private employer in the Commonwealth, and their workers have been our health care heroes for this entire pandemic. It’s simply wrong that they cannot afford necessities like their own health care.
Unions and workers built this country, everywhere, and I *firmly* believe the Union way of life is sacred. Congress needs to show that Washington has the backs of working people by passing the PRO Act, making the minimum wage a living wage, and then build on that by securing rights for workers across the country.
[**_If you agree that it's time we elect more leaders to the Senate who are ready to fight tooth and nail for workers and their families, then I'm respectfully asking you to throw a few bucks our campaign's way if your budget allows for it. We're facing an uphill battle against the PA GOP and their corporate funders and PACs, so any help at all would be deeply appreciated._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37467?refcode=em20211120-3537&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=7&akid=3537%2E434096%2EpuU_O9)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37467?refcode=em20211120-3537&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=26&akid=3537%2E434096%2EpuU_O9)**
If you send me to Washington as your Senator, I promise you: I’ll always be the first vote for these + every other working priority. ✊
In solidarity,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211120-3537-footer&t=27&refcode2=3537_434096_puU_O9&akid=3537%2E434096%2EpuU_O9)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=28&akid=3537%2E434096%2EpuU_O9)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=3537%2E434096%2EpuU_O9)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.
