Peter,

Have you had a chance to read the emails about our reception at Mar-a-Lago on December 1st?

Well, if you haven't, here is the deal: President Trump is holding a reception at Mar-a-Lago in Palm Beach, Florida to benefit our Senate campaign, and **he is reserving one spot for a lucky conservative who will be drawn at random after our contest ends on Monday at midnight!**

What you'll receive: complimentary airfare, hotel stay, and ticket to the event featuring President Trump!

How to enter: make a donation of _any_ amount before this Monday, November 22nd at midnight.

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: Pramila's email
disclaimer_text: paid for by making the largest corporations and wealthiest Americans begin to pay their fair share in taxes
body:
We wanted to make sure you saw Pramila’s big news from yesterday, Peter.
#
We wanted to make sure you saw Pramila’s big news from yesterday, Peter. The passage of the Build Back Better Act in the House was historic — but now we have to turn our fight to the Senate so we ensure they pass this transformative legislation without delay. [**Can you give Pramila’s message a quick read and then chip in $3 to keep her fight going in the pivotal weeks to come?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8697?refcode=em20211120-817&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=817%2E420207%2E17TnSa)
**[Chip in $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8697?refcode=em20211120-817&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=817%2E420207%2E17TnSa)**
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Pramila Jayapal**
Date: Fri, Nov 19, 2021
Subject: The House PASSED the Build Back Better Act! Now it’s the Senate’s turn:
Peter, we did it: **The House just PASSED the Build Back Better Act!**
Our historic legislation delivers on the promises that Democrats made to invest in working people across America, allowing them to wake up feeling better about their daily lives and the opportunities their families have.
We will continue working to level the playing field as we not only build back better but fairer. Now, the Senate must act quickly to send the Build Back Better Act to President Biden’s desk — _so we can finally make it law and invest in our communities._
[**I'm calling on the Senate to immediately pass the popular Build Back Better Act because working families can’t wait any longer. But I can’t do this alone. Can you chip in $3 or more to fuel our work to pass these transformative investments in working people once and for all? It’s time to deliver.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8697?refcode=em20211120-817&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=817%2E420207%2E17TnSa)
**[Chip in $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8697?refcode=em20211120-817&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=817%2E420207%2E17TnSa)**
I’m so excited about what we were able to accomplish here, Peter. Thanks to our organizing, the Build Back Better Act invests in:
* Universal preschool for all 3-year-olds and 4-year-olds
* Affordable, high-quality childcare
* Paid family and medical leave
* Home and community-based care
* Historic climate action
* Health care, Medicare expansion, and lowering the cost of prescription drugs
* Affordable housing
* An extension of the monthly Child Tax Credit
* Humane immigration reform
* Higher education and workforce development
* And MORE!

This is critical funding for so many of our progressive priorities that will directly improve the lives of working people — fully paid for by making the largest corporations and wealthiest Americans begin to pay their fair share in taxes. And we got it done with the slimmest of majorities and zero Republican votes.
But we know that this legislation still faces unprecedented opposition from Corporate PACs, Big Pharma, Wall Street, and fossil fuel companies as it heads to the Senate. **That’s why it’s so important we keep our eye on the ball and not let up until the Build Back Better Act is signed into law.**
**[This won't be easy, but if we can keep building a movement big enough to pressure the Senate to pass these transformative investments quickly — we will win. Chip in $3 or more now to help us keep up the fight for the full Build Back Better Act.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8697?refcode=em20211120-817&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=817%2E420207%2E17TnSa)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20211120-817-footer&t=24&refcode2=817_420207_17TnSa&akid=817%2E420207%2E17TnSa)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=25&akid=817%2E420207%2E17TnSa)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=817%2E420207%2E17TnSa)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

Fellow American,

Have you had a chance to read the emails about our reception at Mar-a-Lago on December 1st?

Well, if you haven't, here is the deal: President Trump is holding a reception at Mar-a-Lago in Palm Beach, Florida to benefit our Senate campaign, and **he is reserving one spot for a lucky conservative who will be drawn at random after our contest ends on Monday at midnight!**

What you'll receive: complimentary airfare, hotel stay, and ticket to the event featuring President Trump!

How to enter: make a donation of _any_ amount before this Monday, November 22nd at midnight.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bf6ecd9446ab4492984cf37550c3b1d0&_e=fmrynnMSJ0TkBWCgUt5PzRG0azV89pgPs9vM9gXlnSI9o3QTAtpDbUU1bvzxluMyAN-c5B0ZpEgUILqxmVxTJQ7DrlBndZ7ldEBqOWODM06XMRIJMzhdEHWzJ-S4W2yLal6UKHmmrXkAxK4MaMH5YZDSFSB23gW8ifQvkafSoBdQFucJx_kp8Fa-kcylsQtX5napTH0EXVfAZiV8UxXoDi3TPOeLf4GGlVaA3ECzoRk4PtEyst5W3pnCSO3t5zzZKejah18LzObVNn73Nu6rH6YX12GtqZSXMNjV1fBz9bevQt_RasAacj4Eldy0TFk2i-p_XsLKA7BvRdVBG0XOLuLnPOlk9FauLdx0-A4a5JVPuBsiMrWEn6Dk1C_TbOCRs7fWD6LSzWS-p2-ybrTejL2i7rwGPa20FJp0D5cXwbvnsq1TR5IfeesIv4Mkh8h_XN_XSkn_lOXfMQPW_eT8DVSFqHMvJMr8KV636BVvDaE%3D)

**WHY NOT ENTER?** There is no reason! You could spend an evening with President Trump and other special guests like Heisman Trophy winners Pete Dawkins, Doug Flutie, Mike Garrett, and Johnny Rodgers; Country music artists Brian Kelley and Travis Tritt; MLB Hall of Fame baseball player Tom Glavine; and WWE Hall of Fame wrestler Ric Flair! This is an evening you'll never forget!

**[You could be on your way to Mar-a-Lago in just a few short weeks by simply making a donation to our campaign of a few bucks!](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bf6ecd9446ab4492984cf37550c3b1d0&_e=fmrynnMSJ0TkBWCgUt5PzRG0azV89pgPs9vM9gXlnSI9o3QTAtpDbUU1bvzxluMyAN-c5B0ZpEgUILqxmVxTJQ7DrlBndZ7ldEBqOWODM06XMRIJMzhdEHWzJ-S4W2yLal6UKHmmrXkAxK4MaMH5YZDSFSB23gW8ifQvkafSoBdQFucJx_kp8Fa-kcylsQtX5napTH0EXVfAZiV8UxXoDi3TPOeLf4GGlVaA3ECzoRk4PtEyst5W3pnCSO3t5zzZKejah18LzObVNn73Nu6rHxRTssR7Hh8kg4rIqpLmWmRSzn7U_CJUMQT7t1ikvZJdwuTsDhSWHeT6cRDNmnjJY4Jnj3_SFCXfDhhOgXmcOPdqFpZ-VHiwQnWKUBujvP8q2PcY3uwfzchhSzH1KWHCLaOCA7-5q1YUSH-dUmV71EBBIdbAaJzXr6DzSizkcETfNTPr8OtoJsdzT-5aznkLouNOHJRi1ScCtdrA0_EiEVg%3D)**

name: Herschel Walker
subject: This means the Democrats will double down
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
**☞ GA Senate Ratings Change ☜
Lean Democratic -> Toss-Up**
Peter,

BIG NEWS! The ratings changes are in.

Just weeks after we launched our campaign in Georgia for the U.S. Senate, political pundits are now rating the race as a "Toss-up," which is movement in our direction from the previous rating of "Leans Democratic."

If you've read anything about the outcome of the recent elections in Virginia and New Jersey, then you understand why Republicans are in a strong position to flip the Senate next year if we have the resources to communicate our message.

In fact, Gov.-elect Glenn Youngkin's success in Virginia (which had been trending Democratic in recent years) was so strong that it reverberated across the country and set off "Alarm Bells" with some of the more liberal election forecasters.

Take a look for yourself:

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58827595:6daXG42N_:m:1:3253819041:311BF0161CF772C13FCF95029554AABB:r)
**I think after the recent election results in Virginia, every election prognosticator in the country realizes that our Senate race in Georgia is a toss-up.**

While I'm not a career politician, it's clear as day that national Democrats are going to see this ratings change as a signal they need to pour as much money as humanly possible into this race to keep this Senate seat in their column.

Therefore, we _must_ increase our own fundraising efforts to beat them. If you can make an investment in this critical toss-up race, please know there is no better time than today. **[This is a race in which every SINGLE DOLLAR is going to count. Please chip in $5, $10, $34 or even $100 right now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58827595:6daXG42N_:m:1:3253819041:311BF0161CF772C13FCF95029554AABB:r)**

[**Chip in $10 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58827596:6daXG42N_:m:1:3253819041:311BF0161CF772C13FCF95029554AABB:r)
[**Chip in $34 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58827597:6daXG42N_:m:1:3253819041:311BF0161CF772C13FCF95029554AABB:r)
[**Chip in $50 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58827598:6daXG42N_:m:1:3253819041:311BF0161CF772C13FCF95029554AABB:r)
[**Chip in _MORE_ ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58827595:6daXG42N_:m:1:3253819041:311BF0161CF772C13FCF95029554AABB:r)
My opponent was THE TOP FUNDRAISER IN THE ENTIRE COUNTRY over the last three months. We've got to be able to beat them at their own game.

While the ratings change is certainly encouraging, it's also going to motivate the Democrats to double down. Please stand with us at this important moment.

Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58827595:6daXG42N_:m:1:3253819041:311BF0161CF772C13FCF95029554AABB:r)
Herschel Walker

[**Donate Today ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58827595:6daXG42N_:m:1:3253819041:311BF0161CF772C13FCF95029554AABB:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58827599:6daXG42N_:m:1:3253819041:311BF0161CF772C13FCF95029554AABB:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58827600:6daXG42N_:m:1:3253819041:311BF0161CF772C13FCF95029554AABB:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58827601:6daXG42N_:m:1:3253819041:311BF0161CF772C13FCF95029554AABB:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58827602:6daXG42N_:m:1:3253819041:311BF0161CF772C13FCF95029554AABB:r)

This horrific misuse of your taxpayer dollars comes after a long line of fumbles when it comes to his administration and its neglectful relationship with the southern border.

Under President Trump, we were securing our borders. Joe Biden and his 'Border Czar' Kamala Harris have ruined that progress. We have to put a stop to this.

So, as the Trump endorsed candidate in North Carolina's Senate race, I am launching a new fight to close our southern border. Will you chip in below to join me? clean_body: He Does Not Care for Americans | TED BUDD IS THE TRUMP-ENDORSED REPUBLICAN CANDIDATE FOR U.S. SENATE IN NORTH CAROLINA Friend, $450,000 Dollars. That is how much Joe Biden wants to give to illegal immigrants who entered our wide-open southern border. | You read that correctly. He not only wants to reward them for illegally entering our country but he is also encouraging them to stay. This horrific misuse of your taxpayer dollars comes after a long line of fumbles when it comes to his administration and its neglectful relationship with the southern border. Under President Trump, we were securing our borders. Joe Biden and his 'Border Czar' Kamala Harris have ruined that progress. We have to put a stop to this. So, as the Trump endorsed candidate in North Carolina's Senate race, I am launching a new fight to close our southern border. Will you chip in below to join me? The southern border needs to be closed, we have to continue the progress made under Trump! - We have to fight back. It's time to stop Joe Biden and close the Southern Border. Sincerely, Ted Budd TED BUDD IS THE TRUMP-ENDORSED REPUBLICAN CANDIDATE FOR U.S. SENATE IN NORTH CAROLINA Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright © 2021 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

| | | [**SIGN ON: Cancel student debt!** ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmlf9yb9ilux69QpyOCfiDuwtxkUvkFoISi1hplUd6CpgXXxjviAH0l-bLuRAip5eUN557_oq0x2SpSkRZTiHy-c6knivCH25m_iowj9849JyY2pwktc7BGEOsLe2l7iXnVZ00YqsEVzaSCglLO-0xo-zSDOIl_iGnuC5EOGo8jYmiIhcUJCXnAxA4bxLXwJomeNO8SfWXRtdypaXme_sZnoTSXZ46jI3h6-6tTMrkMQJaVZPgWpsF3Sb-K_LjHz5KrZYI49vEBDwWxgOHMOu0gb_js2kJd7J0pdNyx_ojNrsmDQ3hfSdErEj8L2PWsUHHshck5TkB9bEMgi6SgV9vettqw1yvRwBviVgRgUnZdEUnM18B4T_gUBGmCneB-b-cqVOhSeZNDlajsZQhKUJ6TRfOd8hIACTV6VlBQdFk4YN82UDrrE4klKpqC4myj8b_rWfXq1YYEemj1WeYVjzSNoLTVZDgP9UohaTIgXyMC5ldbOy5IMd7ZRFWACKd8Ys4/3h6/ivSKXag1SDqiG-gILKtWhA/h0/E2JnyYQVM26DSwMsWprSZzQEQZ9bPeSEmWYpDVqug9c)
Money was tight and going to college was never a consideration for me because of what it would cost.
But, I worked hard to beat the odds and was the first in my family to attend college. I graduated from Barnard while working multiple jobs and drowning in student debt.
**Everyone should have the option to pursue a higher education. And no one should be left with crippling debt because of it.**
******[Join me in demanding all student loan debt be immediately canceled.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmlf9yb9ilux69QpyOCfiDuwtxkUvkFoISi1hplUd6CpgXXxjviAH0l-bLuRAip5eUN557_oq0x2SpSkRZTiHy-c6knivCH25m_iowj9849JyY2pwktc7BGEOsLe2l7iXnVZ00YqsEVzaSCglLO-0xo-zSDOIl_iGnuC5EOGo8jYmiIhcUJCXnAxA4bxLXwJomeNO8SfWXRtdypaXme_sZnoTSXZ46jI3h6-6tTMrkMQJaVZPgWpsF3Sb-K_LjHz5L7DedrgdhjvKVXiQnVz5-Vl7K8H1_Hb-6PMv1qEsj8Nagrx69FYuohaG7vCvTbwOiYz_diuIe0Y-hQrYHZIXBIYdn7dIc4rti9J3Sc89npxqCgatdiK0_SUjGlZ91d99SvMw5g3d3eKkvqREnuehnpGuBFRgjg1zMYmuS5ggiP8bRWHCMz-r_WPMhHYPeTjuhhry-SlTOckVcHHuqJpDJnU_VFMkVC8WKf2hXmHSdlJVRD2hpv4vpdOhjiKEbp3oU/3h6/ivSKXag1SDqiG-gILKtWhA/h1/JsqKyqR3be-gYkyXingoWZR1U81iuC2ygtsCouOFPRQ)**
Over 43 million Americans have student loan debt.
**Student loan debt is a women’s issue** — women hold 2⁄3 of it and repay at lower rates due to systemic inequalities like the gender pay gap, a lack of paid family leave and a lack of universal childcare.
**Student loan debt is a racial justice issue** — canceling up to $50,000 of it would alleviate a debt burden from 3 in 4 Black households and increase Black wealth by 1⁄3.
**Student loan debt is a multi-generational issue** — over 8 million borrowers are over the age of 50.
**Most importantly, student loan debt is a solvable issue.** 92% of all student loans are held by the U.S. Department of Education — **which means we can cancel all of it.**
We don’t have to sit back and watch crippling student debt hold back working families and hinder new generations from building wealth.
**[Take a stand with me here today. Sign the petition to cancel all student loan debt now!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmlf9yb9ilux69QpyOCfiDuwtxkUvkFoISi1hplUd6CpgXXxjviAH0l-bLuRAip5eUN557_oq0x2SpSkRZTiHy-c6knivCH25m_iowj9849JyY2pwktc7BGEOsLe2l7iXnVZ00YqsEVzaSCglLO-0xo-zSDOIl_iGnuC5EOGo8jYmiIhcUJCXnAxA4bxLXwJomeNO8SfWXRtdypaXme_sZnoTSXZ46jI3h6-6tTMrkMQJaVZPgWpsF3Sb-K_LjHz5Ir8IRY2J87xL3Btreq5p6xGiNUSfGKSkKR5mhUBDxThlOX44esfi6j93Wqfmc7Xh1kp8YfuT0k4wdx0L9bP7f6IKK-fDfpPY7UlbO2gWFnYC35pGDoB0xyyjeCm9YmnnRynl23VMJEtK4h_P8VAg3osgijnRr1ERuSk1kSeF-No67gcvpLuNjPPCuz8eCSCk_Vz-rIhxuBY6zXlntyFwjOchaQlyAzyjkm6IZmiVlk4QAcq3L_uUP7i8V30BVfH_8/3h6/ivSKXag1SDqiG-gILKtWhA/h2/YotY6Dkniy7H13zYaK-bCtbYNilz5121nBipgPqY8lM)**
Thanks for taking action with me today.
\-- Melanie D’Arrigo

| | | **“Let’s Go Brandon!” flags are here!!!**
Brandon has been doing such a good job recently that we decided to make him a limited-edition flag to cheer him on.

These Let’s Go Brandon flags are the perfect way to show that you stand with Brandon, and think he’s doing an amazing job! **[So root on Brandon and get your flag before we run out of this limited batch.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2wg5t-1lqhz-4qqlpo2/ "So root on Brandon and get your flag before we run out of this limited batch. ")**

---
| | | [GET MY FLAG](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2wg5t-1lqi1-4qqlpo0/ "GET MY FLAG")
---
When you buy your flag today, not only will you be supporting Brandon, but you will be helping House Conservatives as they fight to fire Pelosi and take back the House.

So if you stand with Brandon and against the socialist Democrats in Congress, then you NEED to claim your flag ASAP before we run out. We will NOT be reordering anymore once this batch runs out. **[Get my flag now>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2wg5t-1lqi2-4qqlpo1/ "Get my flag now>>>")**

Let’s Go, Brandon!

House Conservatives Merch Team

| |

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2wg5t-1lqi4-4qqlpo3/ "Trump Image Link")

**ATTN TRUMP PATRIOTS: TRUMP’S 2024 RUN HINGES ON FLIPPING 5 SEATS RED!**

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. She’s determined to ERASE Trump’s legacy and OBLITERATE his allies in Congress... _because she knows if we TAKE BACK THE HOUSE, Trump will run for PRESIDENT!_

We’re facing an uphill battle. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER. **[Can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2wg5t-1lqi5-4qqlpo4/ "%%=v\(@sFirstName\)=%%, can we count on you to step up?")**

subject: 2A and the right to self-defense
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3d74e4cb2767/were-off-and-running-5120685?e=ae2345792a)
---
| |
---
| |
# Your right to self-defense

Dear Fellow Oregonian,

Kyle Rittenhouse shouldn't have been charged with any crime to begin with, much less placed on trial, but at least the verdict was just. Make no mistake about it, this was an assault on the basic right to self-defense. What do you think the verdict would have been in Oregon?

I'm guessing that Tina Kotek will be the Democrat nominee I face off against in the fall general election. With Betsy Johnson dropping her Democrat title to become "non-affiliated," I'll essentially be squaring off in a three-way-race against two Democrats. It's no surprise that Tina came out swinging against the "white teen" after hearing the Rittenhouse verdict. She's racist. She's a gun-grabber. She weighs in on the side of criminals.

I believe our right to protect ourselves is inherent and God-given, whether against a criminal or a tyrannical government. Our Founding Fathers knew this, which is why they wisely penned our Second Amendment. Again, **the other candidates talk a good fight, but I'm the only candidate who has shown you in real-time, the actions to back up my beliefs.**
* _I was endorsed by Oregon Firearms Federation when I ran for City Council / Mayor._

* _In 2018, I was part of the committee within the Baker County Republicans who helped draft, get on the ballot, and pass our county-wide Second Amendment Preservation Ordinance._

* _This summer, I helped create and voted for our city-wide Second Amendment Sanctuary Resolution, which also passed._

Help me stop a candidate like Tina Kotek from taking Oregon farther down this insane "woke" path for the next eight years! Oregon can't take it.
_**Please chip in today! **_ I didn't come into this race beholden to large companies or wealthy individuals.**I am 100% grassroots! ** Some candidates aren't, and they're counting on buying this election with heavy TV advertising in the spring primary. Without the excitement from the base, they will absolutely go on to lose the general for us. Again. Even $5, $10, or $20 helps. If each of you dedicated just $20 per month to my campaign, my fundraising stress would be over!
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | Your right to self-defense Dear Fellow Oregonian, Kyle Rittenhouse shouldn't have been charged with any crime to begin with, much less placed on trial, but at least the verdict was just. Make no mistake about it, this was an assault on the basic right to self-defense. What do you think the verdict would have been in Oregon? I'm guessing that Tina Kotek will be the Democrat nominee I face off against in the fall general election. With Betsy Johnson dropping her Democrat title to become "non-affiliated," I'll essentially be squaring off in a three-way-race against two Democrats. It's no surprise that Tina came out swinging against the "white teen" after hearing the Rittenhouse verdict. She's racist. She's a gun-grabber. She weighs in on the side of criminals. I believe our right to protect ourselves is inherent and God-given, whether against a criminal or a tyrannical government. Our Founding Fathers knew this, which is why they wisely penned our Second Amendment. Again, the other candidates talk a good fight, but I'm the only candidate who has shown you in real-time, the actions to back up my beliefs. I was endorsed by Oregon Firearms Federation when I ran for City Council / Mayor. In 2018, I was part of the committee within the Baker County Republicans who helped draft, get on the ballot, and pass our county-wide Second Amendment Preservation Ordinance. This summer, I helped create and voted for our city-wide Second Amendment Sanctuary Resolution, which also passed. Help me stop a candidate like Tina Kotek from taking Oregon farther down this insane "woke" path for the next eight years! Oregon can't take it. Please chip in today! I didn't come into this race beholden to large companies or wealthy individuals.I am 100% grassroots! Some candidates aren't, and they're counting on buying this election with heavy TV advertising in the spring primary. Without the excitement from the base, they will absolutely go on to lose the general for us. Again. Even $5, $10, or $20 helps. If each of you dedicated just $20 per month to my campaign, my fundraising stress would be over! | "DONATE TODAY!" | Your gift of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or more will help me achieve critical goals like attending events in all 36 Oregon counties! _**The President’s policies have raised costs for your family. This Thanksgiving will be one of the most expensive on record.**_

Are you traveling to see family? Thanks to Biden’s war on our energy independence,**you can expect to pay $1.20+ MORE for each gallon of gas needed. **

Are you cooking dinner for friends and family? Be prepared to **pay between 5% and 20% MORE for your ingredients thanks to the President’s reckless spending and supply chain crisis.
**
Thinking of turning on the heat to keep the family warm during a cold Western New York November?**Biden’s got you there too – heating costs could skyrocket UP 43% from last year.
**
The President bought into the socialist wish list of the squad. The results he is delivering to American families? Higher costs, financial struggle, and unconstitutional mandates.

**Inflation surges just broke a 30 YEAR RECORD. **

Biden promised to be an uniter – he’s successfully united **every American family in struggling under his Turkey Tax and energy crisis.**

And even better, he has successfully united the American people against him, against the squad, and against their socialist dreams.

**We are seeing record engagement and energy – that means one thing, we are going to take back the House in 2022 and END THIS MADNESS. **

**Are you in?**

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Newsom's Embarrassing Statement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [The Rule of Law's Collapse](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzioo5r-YFzLD6MfmtkNI7vSu4P7kA1Gyrm44-qsnMPkS49g&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_nov_20b&n=1) Newsom's Health Secretary, Dr. Ghaly, just admitted there are no metrics for ending the State of Emergency. He added that even if it does end, Newsom will keep mask and vaccine mandates in place. The rule of law is officially a thing of the past. Newsom's disdain for the rule of law was clear after yesterday's Rittenhouse verdict. He immediately attacked the jury. Ordinary citizens reaching a decision based on evidence – the design of our Founders – goes against everything he stands for. In our trial against Newsom, the rule of law was the theme of [my opening statement](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziopef_gk3HgrZHlL4qO7ZjXtrJdKUQ2jxrbAmcFXim8QG1d4daQL_tbUJFWA5OtORtNb6NOcwoZjOv3J1dIiuSZz&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_nov_20b&n=2): _From this comes the most basic form of freedom – freedom from the arbitrary dominion and control of another. It’s what gives life to the premise that we as citizens are not mere subjects of state power but authors of our own political destiny. It’s what makes possible the great American experiment of self-government._ For 20 months we've fought to keep the spark of self-government alive. It's starting to pay off. Monday’s rally against Newsom’s student mandate drew 2,500 people, and dozens more school districts have written letters or resolutions opposing it. Even a Democrat legislator just agreed to [introduce a bill](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=ByhkdA7RrYhHtdiUMWUYvCnSX0QzZ0uDiS8dn5ZG89XV9K86BN0fPS6BQkKmrGziJEraD839XMHfNM-BB6sxH7CZuseqZJayM043lrPbPgD6ejRFXpqyanHuJJI_GNUJjEmoYSG3IoPyl-gMby5gBA1N7rCgWUYk_Kq9bHV9tjdeQXAY_P3A94SdF--2vzvrA1u6Xip448RL2H3lpDzcHA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_nov_20b&n=3) to reinforce the personal belief exemption. Granted, the Legislature remains largely useless; a dozen members are currently hobnobbing with lobbyists in Maui on an all-expenses-paid junket. That’s why we’ve taken matters into our own hands. Last year our institutions fell apart, and this year has been a horrifying version of Groundhog’s Day. But we can now write a very different story: restoring the rule of law, renewing the meaning of We the People. [Support citizen-backed representation](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv_IPFMzzv9WmdPghwMBSwX0JHWSzI75LyWvC6h1sivRLtVVWDof7SVZORZZbP1UPz4&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_nov_20b&n=4) [Share this Post on Facebook](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lRRCK90LByd_IZ7SYQ32hXdGYSh_QNx24op8gCjcFPsRBdD_8OFMVw-LIYJSa42Tddj5oCw5s_eM-HSb9_EdFrbwplCg4cCSzjuaVCGuBWU3Ts_uisL3NoF9XUbrdihlA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_nov_20b&n=5) Kevin Kiley
[](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=yFGvxrZFfEAGNDSajUG67jFpOTi1EXIJZKzd_Af4NVQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_nov_20b&n=6)California Legislator
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_nov_20b&n=7).

It’s a recipe for economic disaster [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=d3b69a594cf04af7b2d845c533c8ee93&_e=OHCiQeC2i1ZUeqn2eMXfEa-FKnhCMz_GtI5nm4XqIJhtd3iGrRdQcGLBqlTCOgLKTU92ojx7KbXAzwvIAM3THtW73CTlLB5vQjrMFDfqZE7tRGpdHMqcOOJNZ8cTxWAYRs_oi24gSJ5emS3g_x0BfpFJtABApC_D4DYpUJekQ1s3ZwHYUvG4Or89qrAWRnLHSNFzcYru31sWrJR6jrPwlZ1vGx4bDTeqI2ZaGlnTTL4qy9shr_j1ggfsE2Humet41wUuaNrffZXbkQxIdieE7BG4zv_JCojvjC-ZuaIIZggxMqSmqPPKeRTgCpoC8OX92kN2lrz-KbLsSzu7aghpcBbOxZpq4Af74Tj6GeVVGcF3T-F6QnNZ4R29E1Z8M6U9tsRpV045QEM5b_fFsr7-_iKZVIK2Djf070wsHSY2QIo%3D) Peter,

The Biden-Pelosi $1.75 trillion spending spree just passed the House. It will be a major tax increase on middle-class Americans, and House Democrats pushed it forward before Americans would be told the truth about its actual cost. **At a time when inflation is skyrocketing, energy costs are through the roof, and illegal border crossings are at an all-time high, Democrats are using this bill to:**
* Give tax breaks to the wealthiest Americans
* Make America more dependent on foreign energy sources (Russia and China)
* Grant mass amnesty to millions of illegal immigrants

This bill is a recipe for disaster for our economy, it will harm Wisconsin’s workforce recovery efforts, and it will bury future generations in debt if the Senate does not hold the line. [**TELL THE SENATE TO REJECT THIS BILL**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=d3b69a594cf04af7b2d845c533c8ee93&_e=OHCiQeC2i1ZUeqn2eMXfEa-FKnhCMz_GtI5nm4XqIJhtd3iGrRdQcGLBqlTCOgLKTU92ojx7KbXAzwvIAM3THtW73CTlLB5vQjrMFDfqZE7tRGpdHMqcOOJNZ8cTxWAYRs_oi24gSJ5emS3g_x0BfpFJtABApC_D4DYpUJekQ1s3ZwHYUvG4Or89qrAWRnLHSNFzcYru31sWrJR6jrPwlevywSxw15q0149ZfJ7CUGlp8e-f7asMmCrG_6TN--_8LkeKl8C7xokHGmmTn-Mu_aYocJej4D2U50r01dDzcOSMkJ8-MThjOLeA4UyyZ0zlPZSuhk9x62d3izR-uR52lmaHq4GBxq_vC-olxg2M4kMtvXdBDsBreJAJFu2TXYu7PTAWu8XserbHdCgGOjQ5e-FmXN6KX_Pom9_DEEyFzpQ%3D) Thank you, Gallagher Digital Team | |

name: John Kasich
subject: Change is coming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
People often ask me why I remain hopeful about our nation's politics despite the extreme polarization we see today. [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=02c4f8a3faff4aa29d979d1a3c96d0b7&_e=7QvA2RCPfpSxhM1selIVXQ8cw-rlW_blhj0-Trgv6i-uzOIpDRCPWtSa4luHcQxnscuGkyCW-ukVDfqV-kleFQazB5AeJRQrEfmpGOpDc0HDwUUtPmB2mIlS-SffjxotX4RKyYWavv0iK93d9kL0-6lxXjNRGdvpyQAxSiDqizMDe-WscZ_4umh2Kshx3IgokVXfZcGxF532d4wZj_v05u7uI3lu5MgTFMUp_idRCPNn3Qyil3Nc9t7WS52dyS8OabYxXKbPHGwo8NWkJwKDBg%3D%3D) Peter - people often ask me why I remain hopeful about our nation's politics despite the extreme polarization we see today.

The answer is because I believe in the power a small group of people to bring about meaningful change when they band together, speak with one voice and stand for something. [I discussed this point recently in an interview about the state of our country](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=02c4f8a3faff4aa29d979d1a3c96d0b7&_e=7QvA2RCPfpSxhM1selIVXZEAMd2AM688U-Ov5-Ns8okkK-Ke1xeBCDhORy5iQ5DgCTGGQKpW-nZDKATOcAA31h7jDQwB1BI5zs7PJsVvD5XCDGznZYTOUMdcpkZUksjJVL8sm6kYN3SCfI2Q3bjC9sG-F76QWn5ejXF9D1CKVYwRtgVy6SR6QuqNi6emsnb6pnnWdBCmUe-572ETCZFi3ncq_6I-NVzBx-fnDy_ti7mXyz6DDYyZcJwMzIIwrc5KDN2ZzaAX0VGrl76AMsVzRjfokdHawJ_wVYWgc5qhOJqhGqTbMuzvGwpYZnqfN5K8).

You see, I was in Congress for eighteen years and then I got out of politics for nearly ten years before running for governor. The important lesson I learned then is that there is life after being in Congress. There are bigger things, more meaningful things and ultimately, better ways to serve. **If standing up for America and our democracy causes someone to lose their Congressional seat, so what? Life goes on**.

Some say that I'm an eternal optimist but I have faith that people will ultimately come to their senses. To make it happen sooner, it's up to each of us to continue encouraging our elected representatives to stand up to do what’s right and say, "enough is enough!"

Just this week, despite pressure from GOP leadership, some Republican members of the U.S. House voted to censure another GOP congressman for his depiction of killing another member of Congress in a social media post. I imagine if you ask those Republicans why they voted that way, they'd reject the notion that they were being courageous and simply acknowledge that it was the right thing to do.

And soon after, GOP Leader McCarthy suggested that they may face political punishment for their votes. That's Donald Trump's playbook and not the actions of someone who hopes to be Speaker some day.

We saw in the recent Virginia race for governor that Trump's influence is diminishing and the pathway to winning elections is to reject the toxic behavior that is too common today, and instead take positions on issues that can win both moderate and base voters. **When I say that our efforts are working, this is exactly what I mean**. I'm out there every day raising awareness about these issues and doing what I can to make a positive impact - to restore sanity to Washington - and to support Republicans who are focused on helping people, not on tearing us apart. [But I need your help to keep up the fight](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=02c4f8a3faff4aa29d979d1a3c96d0b7&_e=7QvA2RCPfpSxhM1selIVXdFK1dCwYJ3nC2BbTnlVGNHSYkrHmt3twqxopNBkjcWWH_WK9ByHfFWVzVotFIPaPhD6hjcc_tef44fmWI7s9XIkKSHOmGeORmZwwkM_RWb0i6k-1Eq_V-j0VKKVlD65byCAxj7dE-OfMNdqZjCecEXfdUvaMNx6CDCas2SoMBYYLCqv79K5T_DdYOGwYknEdx1Gbocgj8trYELbtbS6WBa6P6VHHExps11zZe8qC5uLM_MDqkBYZE_a2-XCLCdycw%3D%3D). The funds we raise go directly into our advocacy efforts and I'm reaching out to [ask you to consider making a donation right now](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=02c4f8a3faff4aa29d979d1a3c96d0b7&_e=7QvA2RCPfpSxhM1selIVXdFK1dCwYJ3nC2BbTnlVGNHSYkrHmt3twqxopNBkjcWW-tnALwQzkteWvEkc5SXcGn_RmZVUnTb0x8MUbJfvmkd_Ufmd1GvwOCm8zQeFNDfDfwtDxKd5BEu8dmuyo5M9UMwtv4CFRTbwcJhBzaTS9gdXOTpN8q0u9NJaCJX4owkYTFcuYqmTmvbkGYfDMeSP7bTJgEz2Ck2WLbacUodtxyEzdn1dm7yU3K4UP_1pQ9t8P7OBLUlYRRTOsD5W0bRF6w%3D%3D) to help. I'm counting on you. [Donate Now](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=02c4f8a3faff4aa29d979d1a3c96d0b7&_e=7QvA2RCPfpSxhM1selIVXdFK1dCwYJ3nC2BbTnlVGNHSYkrHmt3twqxopNBkjcWWpK5hGjS0226eNk06k-Ih9jE9uPCkVEmM-FCfzQ5HJUKubCFQpKDfyIX6fuijBiOa-wRL6VqcJHEO_VHWOEThrfZDVIG172szxWA00fnjTntDZeXYoktU6fug-EvLDbzIGZJMdGFLTjkcFC12tbZ5Sbjq9dHJfHWZx16i92abhHRsimyJvvNE-W3nbZB8LE2-a9gU52j7p6BwXPQsWoAYgw%3D%3D) I'm so appreciative of all the work you're doing to heal the divisions in our country and get our government working again for all of us. Thank you! -John Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
candidate or candidate's committee.
www.JohnKasich.com
[Unsubscribe](http://links.johnkasich.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_s=02c4f8a3faff4aa29d979d1a3c96d0b7&_t=7hrXjbwxL3xJEnbEnImj8GztO7wx5oAIZeN5v1rZRC_hrMrnv_bzgFnsT7I5Cg5wbooO35BHQPzGyaCjJuyABrbAzKOmvtguZ1vpOvYjAjl8WNdNbFE_HWZjR2cCiNUPyVSc_B0DqGL-LEh4n_W6el2f4Zs8mlJRyA53w2R9z6I%3D)

name: Beto for Texas
subject: We can do so much better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Greg Abbott has simply stopped listening to, serving, paying attention to, and trusting the people of Texas.
#
Earlier this year, the people of Texas were abandoned by Governor Greg Abbott when the electrical grid failed and millions were left without power during a deadly winter storm.
Now, gas company CEOs stay warm with the $11 billion they made during the power grid failure — and Greg Abbott has done nothing to ensure Texans don’t freeze to death again in their homes this winter.
This is what happens when industry owns politicians. Greg Abbott has simply stopped listening to, serving, paying attention to, and trusting the people of Texas. We can do so much better.
[Beto is running for Governor to get past the small, divisive policies and politics of Greg Abbott. But it’s going to take all of us to make it happen. Will you pitch in your first donation now to help us elect new leadership in Texas?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/49913?refcode=ema20211120-163397&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=163397%2E444211%2EMaz_sx)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/49913?refcode=ema20211120-163397&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=163397%2E444211%2EMaz_sx)**
What do you get when the Governor of Texas is focused on the agendas of his donors, on positioning himself for the next election, on catering to the loudest voices in his party, and on keeping himself in power at any cost?
You get incompetence and fringe policies — like voter suppression, a draconian abortion ban, free-for-all gun laws, anti-mask mandates, and zero accountability or reform after hundreds of Texans died from a catastrophic power grid failure.
Now imagine if we had a Governor who believed in listening to the people who elected him. Who understood that Texas communities often already know what solutions they need — they just need someone to take action. A Governor who serves the people of Texas instead of special interests and corporate donors.
[Please, will you chip in now to help us defeat Greg Abbott and elect Beto as the next Governor of Texas?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/49913?refcode=ema20211120-163397&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=163397%2E444211%2EMaz_sx)
We are losing the big, bold vision that used to define Texas, a Texas big enough for all of us. Big enough for our dreams and big enough to make them happen. We’ve been offered something small, mean, and uninspiring in its place.
But it doesn’t have to be this way.
Thank you for showing your support today,
Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20211120-163397-footer&t=22&refcode2=163397_444211_Maz_sx&akid=163397%2E444211%2EMaz_sx)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.

_**Liberal Lisa Murkowski,**_**has decided to run for Senate for a fourth term.** She has been in office for almost TWENTY YEARS!
Did you know that the only reason she became a Senator was because of nepotism? Her father, who was Governor of Alaska, appointed her to the seat!
_**While she may have stayed in power, she has never won a majority of the vote.**_

Make no mistake, the very same drugs being illegally smuggled across our southern border, are being sold into our neighborhoods, communities, and schools. _**We 're not afraid to call this what it is: a National Security Crisis. It is flat out dangerous. **_ The Democrat's refusal to acknowledge the crisis at the border, let alone address it, has crippled law enforcement officers and border patrol agents. _They 've put our friends, family, and neighbors in unnecessary danger._ The crisis at the border will not cease, and the drugs will continue flowing into our communities unless we stand up and take action, TOGETHER. Fellow American,

Have you had a chance to read the emails about our reception at Mar-a-Lago on December 1st?

Well, if you haven't, here is the deal: President Trump is holding a reception at Mar-a-Lago in Palm Beach, Florida to benefit our Senate campaign, and **he is reserving one spot for a lucky conservative who will be drawn at random after our contest ends on Monday at midnight!**

What you'll receive: complimentary airfare, hotel stay, and ticket to the event featuring President Trump!

How to enter: make a donation of _any_ amount before this Monday, November 22nd at midnight.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=bae34494dc83410892ddded29b2cf80d&_e=lUDTgMdxPVkA5uIhS2Y-6UDN-8LPEyo5qtb8A1JY_yd_e6b0HwrdDDC6h-m4oxnKdYsBrJ10_KocBER5vf35HWURjbRgcyYRMdfQ_qevm-Y5uaiiB-mbQ9bc99YU-dFkwK28O2v6t_UbMNdXqQSYaVyYXNIkg0S5KZYAtPKorPUgzwoLovxO96sqNIpg6Qx99_15yhQkZWzUMp9IvOrSGUCAJ_gJxVXeX67QhDs7zjOSrj0W4EDHvNo9K9s4-yruQzok6TXpRJgwSDnoDbxfm4hcCqOTwFCBnL4hvXTN6De7N3PuM_6PcKxemngCjoDhDuuLs80YEE2JLxbtFDlkslpeMaLEQErTPujfWl3lwO0yXDUFnHS-McVtmHP4uShQCxbvY8gnPlSf9UrVI7mukY6Keosq9uaKpozvhv03UeWNycZgXKnpCL6cWwoyW8LomfS0PGVqc0CXgNDqt1-47NgiOG4bR3lNPDG1ZFdc_CY%3D)

**WHY NOT ENTER?** There is no reason! You could spend an evening with President Trump and other special guests like Heisman Trophy winners Pete Dawkins, Doug Flutie, Mike Garrett, and Johnny Rodgers; Country music artists Brian Kelley and Travis Tritt; MLB Hall of Fame baseball player Tom Glavine; and WWE Hall of Fame wrestler Ric Flair! clean_body: Mar-A-Lago awaits. President Trump and I are offering you the chance to have an evening you’ll never forget! | Fellow American, Have you had a chance to read the emails about our reception at Mar-a-Lago on December 1st? Well, if you haven't, here is the deal: President Trump is holding a reception at Mar-a-Lago in Palm Beach, Florida to benefit our Senate campaign, and he is reserving one spot for a lucky conservative who will be drawn at random after our contest ends on Monday at midnight! What you'll receive: complimentary airfare, hotel stay, and ticket to the event featuring President Trump! How to enter: make a donation of any amount before this Monday, November 22nd at midnight. WHY NOT ENTER? There is no reason! You could spend an evening with President Trump and other special guests like Heisman Trophy winners Pete Dawkins, Doug Flutie, Mike Garrett, and Johnny Rodgers; Country music artists Brian Kelley and Travis Tritt; MLB Hall of Fame baseball player Tom Glavine; and WWE Hall of Fame wrestler Ric Flair! name: Sign the Card
subject: Add your name to President Biden’s thank you card
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
The Bipartisan Infrastructure Law is a huge accomplishment! Would you please add your name right away?
| | | **BREAKING:** Joe Biden has OFFICIALLY signed the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act into law! This is a HUGE accomplishment, and he got this landmark legislation passed _in his very first year in office!_

**This infrastructure law** dedicates hundreds of billions of dollars to repair our roads, bridges, and highways; revitalizes America’s rail system; promotes clean energy and clean water; and so much more -- all while it **_creates millions of jobs all over America._**

Joe Biden made this happen, and we’re so grateful for his leadership. That’s why we're asking Democrats in Pennsylvania to sign a thank you card for President Biden, but your signature is missing. **Would you please add your name right away?**

name: Tim Ryan
subject: New poll shows Ohio Senate race in a dead heat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
New polling shows that no matter the matchup, if the race for Ohio’s Senate seat were held today, the outcome would be within single digits.
#
I have huge news, folks. This race is a dead heat:
**Tim Ryan 37%**
**JD Vance 36%**
**[Rush $10 now to split between my campaign and Jacky Rosen to help us keep the lead, flip Ohio blue, and expand the Democratic Senate majority>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38852890/317315542/-1171757041?refcode=jr_em_nd_211120_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjkwOTc3Yy04NjRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EkU8Dw56yC9CYPh07qZAqneCHV6VTlERzoYK10mWRnk=)**
New polling shows that no matter the matchup, if the race for Ohio’s Senate seat were held today, the outcome would be within single digits. In fact, I'm leading Republican JD Vance by just one point.
Vance has a $10 million billionaire-funded super PAC behind him and my other GOP opponents are multi-millionaires able to self-fund their campaigns. This poll is truly a testament to the power of our grassroots campaign!
**This poll proves we have what it takes to flip this open Senate seat BLUE and expand our Democratic Senate majority, but in a battleground race like this one, national Republicans are working overtime to stop our momentum. **
**[Can I count on you to split a $5 contribution today to my campaign and Jacky Rosen to make sure we keep the lead in this neck-and-neck race?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38852891/317315543/-1171757041?refcode=jr_em_nd_211120_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjkwOTc3Yy04NjRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EkU8Dw56yC9CYPh07qZAqneCHV6VTlERzoYK10mWRnk=)**
I truly can't do this without you. Thank you,
\-- Tim Ryan

**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38852892/317315544/-1171757041?refcode=jr_em_nd_211120_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjkwOTc3Yy04NjRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EkU8Dw56yC9CYPh07qZAqneCHV6VTlERzoYK10mWRnk=)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from this email list: [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/afe66144-8d48-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/9690977c-864a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjkwOTc3Yy04NjRhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EkU8Dw56yC9CYPh07qZAqneCHV6VTlERzoYK10mWRnk=&id=105090150)

name: YOUR INPUT REQUESTED (via DCCC)
subject: RE: our intense fight ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Can we count on your feedback? | | | | **DEMOCRATIC HQ PRIORITIES SURVEY:**

We have an INTENSE fight ahead of us to protect our House Majority.

And to come out on top, Democratic HQ needs to know what issues we should be focusing on.

So we're calling on 50,000 grassroots supporters to complete our November Priorities Survey before midnight on Sunday.

**Can we count on your feedback?**
****
---
[YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/We_)
---|---|---

We've slowly started to narrow our budget gap with House Republicans -- _and it 's all thanks to this incredible grassroots team._

But it'll take more than your $3 to defend our House Majority.

**In 2020, the input and feedback of our best grassroots supporters (like you) guided our winning strategy.**

And now, as we prepare for an **INTENSE** fight to protect our House Majority once again, we urgently need your updated feedback.

**[That's why Democratic HQ just launched our official November Priorities Survey -- and we're calling on 50,000 of our best grassroots supporters to complete it before it closes for good at midnight on Sunday.](https://links.e.dccc.)**

So can we count on you to be one of them?
| [TAKE THE PRIORITY SURVEY NOW >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/x4-WFAvw-)
---

Thanks,

DCCC
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45976608&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEyMjMyMTg0NAS2&l=14183623&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45976608&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEyMjMyMTg0NAS2&l=14183623&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.
